name: Robert Garcia

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Fascists have small dictators
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117546353/576840848/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDNkY2ZjMS03ZWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-F0tzXsRdaXXlYOtLiYqAgWzIoyfp21cjzUnd3FJYg=)
Hi folks, it’s Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia.
Across the country today — from D.C. to Long Beach — people flooded the streets, parks, and town squares for one simple idea: in America, we don’t do kings. We do democracy. We do accountability. We do the peaceful transfer of power. And when a president acts like he’s above the law, we show up. In our millions.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117546358/576840854/142174378?refcode=251018_RG_nokings-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDNkY2ZjMS03ZWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-F0tzXsRdaXXlYOtLiYqAgWzIoyfp21cjzUnd3FJYg=&emci=77c55abb-7eac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=903dcfc1-7eac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**
**This movement is big, it’s hopeful, and it’s happening right now in thousands of communities.**
**[So whether you marched with me today in Long Beach or you just followed along at home, I need you to add your voice by signing my petition to declare that we oppose Trump’s attacks on our democracy. We oppose fascism in every form; America is no place for dictators; And we will not be silent while this administration shreds our constitution.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117546363/576840860/142174378?refcode=251018_RG_nokings-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDNkY2ZjMS03ZWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-F0tzXsRdaXXlYOtLiYqAgWzIoyfp21cjzUnd3FJYg=&emci=77c55abb-7eac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=903dcfc1-7eac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117546368/576840896/142174378?refcode=251018_RG_nokings-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDNkY2ZjMS03ZWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8-F0tzXsRdaXXlYOtLiYqAgWzIoyfp21cjzUnd3FJYg=&emci=77c55abb-7eac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=903dcfc1-7eac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)
Thank you for standing up today — and for standing up every day.
In solidarity,
Robert Garcia
P.S. If you’re at a rally, stay safe, look out for one another, and keep it peaceful. Our strength is our numbers and our values.

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: We’re setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Nov. 4, 2025 will have massive stakes.
#
Peter,
I’ve told you time and time again just how important this race is for New Jersey. **But what you need to understand is, what we do here will have major implications for the country.**
This is the first major election since Donald Trump returned to office. Since then, we’ve seen nothing but chaos and corruption come from the White House — and New Jersey families have taken hit after hit because of it.
On November 4, New Jerseyans have an important choice to make: we can choose the career politician who’s going to copy and paste Trump’s disastrous policies into New Jersey, or we can choose a new way forward: a leader who will _always_ put our state first, and _never_ bend to the will of deep-pocketed Washington politicians.
And if we win, not only do we send a powerful message to the nation by choosing the path of affordability, opportunity, and freedom — we empower Democrats _across the country_ to stand up and fight back against the Trump administration, setting us up for major wins in 2026, 2028, and beyond.
Whatever happens, America is going to follow New Jersey’s lead, Peter. That’s why National Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this race, it’s why Donald Trump and his administration have attacked me repeatedly, _and it’s why we have to win this election._
**[The movement we’re building here in New Jersey is so much bigger than me or you — it’s about all of us coming together to build a new path forward for our state, and for our country. And if that’s the type of movement you believe in, I would really appreciate it if you split whatever you can between my team and State Democrats Committee to help power me to victory this Election Day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96775?refcode=em20251018-9594&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9594%2E614464%2EQfDsf2)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96776?refcode=em20251018-9594&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=2&akid=9594%2E614464%2EQfDsf2) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96776?refcode=em20251018-9594&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=3&akid=9594%2E614464%2EQfDsf2) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96776?refcode=em20251018-9594&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9594%2E614464%2EQfDsf2) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96776?refcode=em20251018-9594&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9594%2E614464%2EQfDsf2) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96776?refcode=em20251018-9594&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9594%2E614464%2EQfDsf2) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96776?refcode=em20251018-9594&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9594%2E614464%2EQfDsf2) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96775?refcode=em20251018-9594&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9594%2E614464%2EQfDsf2)

Thank you,
Mikie

clean_body: Abigail Spanberger needs your contribution as soon as possible to keep TV ads on the air. = Peter, we'll cut right to the chase. Abigail Spanberger needs your contribution as soon as possible to keep our most effective TV ads on the air. = This request is time-sensitive, so please... = = = = = = = A bunch of Virginians can recite these ads from memory at this point. It really seems to be moving the needle with viewers at home, some of whom hadn't realized the full scope of Winsome Earle-Sears' extreme agenda. But these ad buys are crazy expensive, so we're turning to this grassroots team for help. It may seem small, but all the $10, $25, and $50 contributions add up quickly. And they're necessary to close the budget gap and hold Winsome accountable. So, we'll ask one more time: = = Thanks for giving what you can, Spanberger HQ Alert By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: The Democrats
subject: re: Election Day 2025 →
body:
---
Hi Derek, **Election Day 2025 is officially under a month away.** Take a look at our calendar: [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?refcode=em_202510018_4920_fr&amount=7&refcode2=4941_22930333_akg0Gu&akid=4941%2E22930333%2Eakg0Gu) Here’s what’s at stake: **In Virginia** , we have a chance to flip the governor’s office blue. This is our _only_ opportunity to flip a governorship this year, and our chance to elect a Democratic trifecta that will check Trump’s power in the state. **In New Jersey** , we have another crucial governor’s race, which looks like it could come down to a few thousand votes. Just like in Virginia, winning this seat and electing Democrats up and down the ballot will secure the first line of defense against Trump and his allies on a statewide level. **In California** , passing Proposition 50 — the Election Rigging Response Act — would counter Trump’s plan to steal more congressional seats. If this legislation doesn’t pass, we could be facing _another_ two years of Trump with no guardrails from Congress. **In Pennsylvania** , voters will decide whether to retain state Supreme Court justices who will continue to make decisions on critical issues — like abortion funding and voting rights — that will protect Pennsylvanians from Trump’s disastrous agenda. **The outcome of this year’s elections will have a meaningful impact on millions across the country. This is also our chance to send a powerful message to Trump and his allies:_Democrats are fighting back — everywhere, at every level._** The DNC is the organization best positioned to distribute resources where they’re needed in this final stretch before Election Day. We’re investing heavily in these states to support Democrats’ on-the-ground organizing efforts, reach voters, and ensure that folks are informed and prepared to make their voices heard at the ballot box. [**But work like this wouldn’t be possible without the support of our grassroots supporters nationwide. If electing Democrats at all levels matters to you, we’re asking you to pitch in $7 or whatever you can today to win on November 4 and beyond.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?refcode=em_202510018_4920_fr&amount=7&refcode2=4941_22930333_akg0Gu&akid=4941%2E22930333%2Eakg0Gu) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_202510018_4920_fr&refcode2=4941_22930333_akg0Gu&akid=4941%2E22930333%2Eakg0Gu)**

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

**FIRST:****** Voters overwhelmingly elected Democrat Adelita Grijalva in a special election to Congress in Southern Arizona.**THEN:** When Adelita went to Washington to be sworn in, Speaker Mike Johnson refused — breaking the precedent he set himself when two Republicans were sworn in less than 24 hours after their elections — and leaving her community without a voice in Congress. **22 days later, he’s still refusing to seat her.** **NOW:** We’re fighting back to make Republicans pay for their obstruction by raising $10,000 every day they continue to delay swearing Adelita in — to beat them at the ballot box and flip the House next year. **Peter, this moment is too important to ignore. Speaker Johnson’s delay isn’t just partisan — it’s shameful, and leaves the people of Arizona’s 7th District without any representation. Blocking Adelita from taking office to protect their own power is an attack on our democracy — and we can’t let it stand!** **[Will you split a $25 contribution for 25 days of Republican obstruction between Zoe Lofgren for Congress and Adelita's campaign to help us reach today’s goal?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117546977/576878258/-634747134?amount=25&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FRS_1_2025-10-18_AGR_ARZ_ES-33680&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82OTYwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhOGYxZWRiNy04OWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Sy5ZOB3VQHE_WuX6NKaZ-WIgWWxG1nrZUNZaHOGHKfg=)**

name: Elizabeth
subject: 🚨Early voting is still going strong!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
clean_body: | | | Friend — Believe it or not, early voting is still underway...and more than 6,000 HD-22 voters have already cast their ballots! That’s real momentum, but if we want to win this race, we need to keep pushing right now. Every early vote we bank brings us one step closer to victory — and one step further from the chaos and lies the GOP is peddling. I am out there every day talking to voters, knocking doors, and fighting for working families. But I can’t do it alone. The other side is spending big to drown out our message. We need your help to fight back and finish strong. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. This is our moment. Don’t wait — every day, every dollar, and every vote matters. Thanks for your support. — Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Elizabeth Guzman, please .

President Trump did this on DAY ONE.| | | Hi, Peter. My name is Nancy Dahlstrom, Alaska's Lieutenant Governor, and I'd like to chat with you about this state quickly. On President Trump's FIRST day in office, he signed an executive order focused on _“Unleashing Alaska’s Extraordinary Resource Potential.”_ **And last year, the president said this about me:
_"Nancy is a proven fighter."_** **I'm running to be Alaska's next governor** , because we absolutely need a STRONG Republican in Juneau to make sure the oil, gas, mining, timber, and fishing industries are free of government red tape. We must make America energy independent with affordable resources. _Watch 👇_

name: Chip
subject: Texas is under assault
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
I will fight every single day for our God-given rights

| [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zuu7o24v07e5mnrgmthib9jr4gsdgv9465v5ovn0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o34sdh2bs)
Texas is under assault, Fellow American.

>From open-border politicians, radical leftists, and faceless foreign corporations that threaten our sovereignty, safety, and our way of life, **it's time to draw a line in the sand.**

That's why I am running for Attorney General - to protect our Texas way of life.

For so long, Texas was a conservative beacon. We have a proud tradition of rising to defend our homes, our freedoms, and our communities. Texas is anchored by liberty, freedom, and self-determination.

But radical Leftists moving here are threatening to turn Texas blue. Politicians like Colin Allred are flooding our state with Hollywood and Wall Street donors.

_**They will do whatever they can to turn Texas into California or New York.**_

[** DEFEND TEXAS ★ **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh0bumrpjr1p2ejsij8pos2urpg102cd4k52en2o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o34sdh2bs)
I will fight every single day for our God-given rights, for our families, and for the future of Texas.

> _No more Soros-funded judges and district attorneys putting criminals on our streets.
> No more judge-made mandates that Texans pay for illegals in our public schools.
> No more communities built on Sharia law._
**[Fellow American, I need your help to carry on our Texan legacy.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4l85q8gm3b01cvctcvq45d40psp3p9c4geqs2e8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o34sdh2bs)**

[** JOIN CHIP ROY FOR AG -> **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztguhk6afb6qq8tqvicp73gc2rm60dci9sdc70ug_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o34sdh2bs)
Texas deserves an Attorney General who is unafraid to fight, unafraid to win, and unafraid to defend Texas.

It was my honor to represent Texas and the 21st Congressional District in Washington and defend President Trump's America First agenda, but it's time for a new fight.

I'll bring the same fighting spirit I brought to the DC Swamp and Deep State in Austin, but I cannot do it without the support of patriots like you.

**[Even if it's just a couple of bucks- _even $5_ - your support today will help us defend Texas.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z283cn0c2nneils025tc6kcso2c18hh4c33slfj8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o34sdh2bs)**

I am counting on you, Fellow American. _**Let's win.**_

Thank you,

Chip Roy

[** DEFEND TEXAS ★ **](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2u3inm8o2oj8dl7kikca7381n5ilj42pnfv91po_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o34sdh2bs)

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart.

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgu4dfkvbq0avsvca9ufvb3l83892k8695bhl4oo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o32clh2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, Patriot. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble request from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, Patriot. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhr7adlb6luj5ut2lqmc38i3d1t1rouuctfpn0vo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o32clh2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And Patriot, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcsq2dctq0mj3m41t6k9h4ffhv00i2cbq59nim1o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o32clh2bs)**

Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. name: Katie Britt
subject: This is my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
My name is Katie Britt, and if it’s alright with you, I’d like to share a little about who I am. I’m not part of the D.C. cocktail circuit, and I never will be. That’s just not who I am.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zk1aqbnhh8aojjjiauu7omit9ncb867i99el1i20_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
| | Friend,

My name is Katie Britt, and if it’s alright with you, I’d like to share a little about who I am. **I’m not part of the D.C. cocktail circuit, and I never will be._That’s just not who I am._**

In 2022, I was elected to represent the great state of Alabama in the United States Senate. I became the first woman in Alabama’s history to hold this seat—but that’s not why I ran.

I ran because I’m a _**mom**_ , a _**wife**_ , and a _**conservative**_ who’s fed up with the direction this country is heading. I came to Washington to fight for our families, to protect our values, and to bring some Alabama backbone to a broken system.

I didn’t come here to make friends with the political elite. I came here to stand up for the people who don’t have a voice in the room—and I’m not backing down.
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlm0fn31psj96h3eaccrvbkfr261u9pstccffgcg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
Before coming to the Senate, I served as the first female president and CEO of the Business Council of Alabama, and before that, I was Chief of Staff to Senator Richard Shelby. **I’ve never shied away from a challenge—and I’ve never forgotten who I’m fighting for.** In every role I’ve held, my mission has been the same: _deliver real results for Alabama families and the American people._
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zd9cn4g3co0mu7u8med4rovmoerugp4m33kisk4g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
Before starting my career in public service, I earned my undergraduate and law degrees from the University of Alabama. That experience taught me how to lead, think on my feet, and fight for what I believe in—**and it laid the foundation for _everything_ I’ve done since.**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcs8air13a3g0rhhnd3ti0q9okhsie4pd8v4e5do_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zuekap469lhb8ee4ehjfpft81kg017q81g5dfglg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4vbptne6jlu4l4blqio42avv2f2lu34qnp5ptpg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
But long before that, I was just a small-town girl from Enterprise, Alabama. My dad ran the local hardware store. My mom taught dance to almost every kid in town. We didn’t grow up with wealth or political connections. **We came from hard work, grit, and doing things the right way._That’s how I was raised, and that’s exactly how I lead._**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z955tcbvkl1nun8bdkpoe8a4fjfa8u9u40tqjebo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
My husband Wesley and our two amazing kids are my rock. In 2011, a tornado tore through our home and nearly took our lives. That moment changed everything, and reminded me what truly matters. __**Faith** , **family** , and **resilience**.__
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjflu3betgagh4j5t9kshbqd23h7u8m391ukiuog_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4h4vrv4h30hs7aatnr9vt9krictuc5vnue5t3i0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5uiqlc5hn7pu4e5r5n1pvqn1v1lduhogfvmifu0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
I’ve lived a life full of hard work, determination, and breaking barriers. There have been challenges and triumphs alike, but I wouldn’t trade any of it.

My story is a testament to what America stands for—the American Dream. From a small town in Alabama, I rose to become my state’s U.S. Senator—a woman who’s breaking barriers and fighting for conservative values every day.

__**I’m living proof of the limitless opportunity and freedom that define this country.**__

But, I didn’t get here by playing it safe or staying quiet, **and I’m not about to start now.**

The radical Left wants to _silence_ conservatives like me. They want to drown out our voices and push their agenda without opposition, but I’m standing firm.

I’m fighting tooth and nail to keep up and push back hard, for Alabama, for our values, and for every American who believes in freedom.

**The support I’ve received so far means everything, but this fight is far from over.** We need the resources to keep going strong and hold our ground.

**[So, after hearing a bit of my story, will you take a moment to chip in whatever you can afford to help me keep up this fight? The road ahead won’t be easy, but I’ve faced tough battles before. And it would mean the world to have you standing with me.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6oqmrhb2fd9dd34kir31pnfts4igb4j2o4mb16o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)**
---
[ CHIP IN TO FIGHT WITH KATIE BRITT >> ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlalpjs8ctdka0kkm4m2fiq2a9fnqn20jba8ok9o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
Thank you, and may God bless America.

Katie Britt (R-AL)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z0g51db62ucrgornq6d6nkjvcf32qvl5uj569uso_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zi48q6ktj5dfjvdn4b4krhn9ihpv8jrn9j8kf7p0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?
---
[ STAND WITH KATIE >> ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z15b4bqiq2t8hc56i637rp1qlo5i3c445990cp68_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfirsfide457qcab947dctfrknr96cjmpcort41o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)
---
Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.
---

Pop Acta Media | First Look News
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zjlisq0ljanq5kbcjddvqr6qcsl6465bgkr5590o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkcqb4tjhe6rrfdljkeqjetjnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp35c1ie0oj7c8gq48bi4bh28pr3c1ge6o70clh649fg)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6i8hl5d2n6uctko5jpmla5htn94qa0a4bvp77sg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1o35c9h2bs)_

[](http://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2znqc3vien8o5dfm5ld9t6l5msthvgtf2hlq81rs8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr3c1ge6o70clh649fg)

name: Brandon Gill
subject: This is the most critical moment DOGE has ever faced
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: My situation is in your hands right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu3hhodbelt5f1vlgdqbk27se0cm3cn512kc3k10_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1p71c1h2bs)
---
Our future rests in your hands, Patriot. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble request from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, Patriot. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---
[ DONATE TO SUPPORT WINSOME >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zemk9gvpad5jqk53juagtobr1offgcbvqk04lt7o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1p71c1h2bs)
---
I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: **without your support, we will fall even _further_ behind. **The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to _irreversible socialism!_ I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And Patriot, I _**know**_ we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. **[I'm not asking you to write a big check; all I'm asking is that you send in a few dollars to support me and my team in this CRITICAL battle!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zohpqq74tbeks326d0upbo7mcn4ekb41evpvgbfo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1p71c1h2bs)**
---

---

---
[ DONATE $47 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zulh8sr88gsgrqvngjglahpurqp7724upaa6ta08_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1p71c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE $33 >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmoqpapjtf08jam95fb2fagna6l7jjd6ru73lmi0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1p71c1h2bs)
---
[ DONATE ANY AMOUNT YOU CAN SPARE >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv2ldb1autmuicr5av1bkan1k8184tofkvfeh8so_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1p71c1h2bs)
---
If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you _please keep me and my team in your prayers!_**I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!**Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears _Immigrant_ _Marine_ _First black female Lt. Governor of VA_
---

Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That 's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcv5mm43r8a2rkbkcr7es0aatgiop61an49dcds8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3hm1p71c1h2bs)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this.[LEND A HAND

name: Katie Britt
subject: Come take a stroll through the past with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
My name is Katie Britt, and if it’s alright with you, I’d like to share a little about who I am. I’m not part of the D.C. cocktail circuit, and I never will be. That’s just not who I am.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmi29br3u0rjagd3f0in4ud8c64860tf6ivdomtg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
| | Friend,

My name is Katie Britt, and if it’s alright with you, I’d like to share a little about who I am. **I’m not part of the D.C. cocktail circuit, and I never will be._That’s just not who I am._**

In 2022, I was elected to represent the great state of Alabama in the United States Senate. I became the first woman in Alabama’s history to hold this seat—but that’s not why I ran.

I ran because I’m a _**mom**_ , a _**wife**_ , and a _**conservative**_ who’s fed up with the direction this country is heading. I came to Washington to fight for our families, to protect our values, and to bring some Alabama backbone to a broken system.

I didn’t come here to make friends with the political elite. I came here to stand up for the people who don’t have a voice in the room—and I’m not backing down.
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z3etfvvdk13jmmk3o1i4bs08b9r1tum3h9f6rh48_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
Before coming to the Senate, I served as the first female president and CEO of the Business Council of Alabama, and before that, I was Chief of Staff to Senator Richard Shelby. **I’ve never shied away from a challenge—and I’ve never forgotten who I’m fighting for.** In every role I’ve held, my mission has been the same: _deliver real results for Alabama families and the American people._
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zk09hqgji5vbgl3m35tro3bc1qi0g853udq6end8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
Before starting my career in public service, I earned my undergraduate and law degrees from the University of Alabama. That experience taught me how to lead, think on my feet, and fight for what I believe in—**and it laid the foundation for _everything_ I’ve done since.**
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zukfgk9sc61cg5t3bqu2q7611d0prjn1if0on8s0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ziasv2lglitr7mt9bkvr3efgv7pgltm0vtj8ldfo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqcaho7tncmkvjmvi6doqreobp5ujmre3v2642c0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
But long before that, I was just a small-town girl from Enterprise, Alabama. My dad ran the local hardware store. My mom taught dance to almost every kid in town. We didn’t grow up with wealth or political connections. **We came from hard work, grit, and doing things the right way._That’s how I was raised, and that’s exactly how I lead._**
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvpmj2nf74i56tastji2j5f6l5ba9q6985rrbfe0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
My husband Wesley and our two amazing kids are my rock. In 2011, a tornado tore through our home and nearly took our lives. That moment changed everything, and reminded me what truly matters. __**Faith** , **family** , and **resilience**.__
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh0q0navsopfeesqvsdjf8nv3sa12qn5t4k9cml8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zd0303dlfrf9sjpo5vhsnmg1uf9odfbnu96r04ag_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2ztokubb9nn9qqff3kpkhknhu31h5v5lduffubovg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
I’ve lived a life full of hard work, determination, and breaking barriers. There have been challenges and triumphs alike, but I wouldn’t trade any of it.

My story is a testament to what America stands for—the American Dream. From a small town in Alabama, I rose to become my state’s U.S. Senator—a woman who’s breaking barriers and fighting for conservative values every day.

__**I’m living proof of the limitless opportunity and freedom that define this country.**__

But, I didn’t get here by playing it safe or staying quiet, **and I’m not about to start now.**

The radical Left wants to _silence_ conservatives like me. They want to drown out our voices and push their agenda without opposition, but I’m standing firm.

I’m fighting tooth and nail to keep up and push back hard, for Alabama, for our values, and for every American who believes in freedom.

**The support I’ve received so far means everything, but this fight is far from over.** We need the resources to keep going strong and hold our ground.

**[So, after hearing a bit of my story, will you take a moment to chip in whatever you can afford to help me keep up this fight? The road ahead won’t be easy, but I’ve faced tough battles before. And it would mean the world to have you standing with me.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zokhgrrkh39hjg8n8fj33ac1bv1rvl9s4j4qupsg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)**
---
[ CHIP IN TO FIGHT WITH KATIE BRITT >> ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zp5a50unfuhha9futgn26ro7g5r4hdcq2c2vmcvg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
Thank you, and may God bless America.

Katie Britt (R-AL)
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0vvktl4l879g5fd9jmc9g78th7tjlqti9r5tt8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
| |
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0odr0pglo754apsukpnjf470lf8o1m12mbqkbr0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?
---
[ STAND WITH KATIE >> ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2atj8ka1ggc6un2rb5b6hih3gvlcclkj53a6690_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---

---

clean_body: My name is Katie Britt, and if it’s alright with you, I’d like to share a little about who I am. I’m not part of the D.C. cocktail circuit, and I never will be. That’s just not who I am. | | | | | Friend, My name is Katie Britt, and if it’s alright with you, I’d like to share a little about who I am. I’m not part of the D.C. cocktail circuit, and I never will be.That’s just not who I am. In 2022, I was elected to represent the great state of Alabama in the United States Senate. I became the first woman in Alabama’s history to hold this seat—but that’s not why I ran. I ran because I’m a mom , a wife , and a conservative who’s fed up with the direction this country is heading. I came to Washington to fight for our families, to protect our values, and to bring some Alabama backbone to a broken system. I didn’t come here to make friends with the political elite. I came here to stand up for the people who don’t have a voice in the room—and I’m not backing down. Before coming to the Senate, I served as the first female president and CEO of the Business Council of Alabama, and before that, I was Chief of Staff to Senator Richard Shelby. I’ve never shied away from a challenge—and I’ve never forgotten who I’m fighting for. In every role I’ve held, my mission has been the same: deliver real results for Alabama families and the American people. Before starting my career in public service, I earned my undergraduate and law degrees from the University of Alabama. That experience taught me how to lead, think on my feet, and fight for what I believe in—and it laid the foundation for everything I’ve done since. But long before that, I was just a small-town girl from Enterprise, Alabama. My dad ran the local hardware store. My mom taught dance to almost every kid in town. We didn’t grow up with wealth or political connections. We came from hard work, grit, and doing things the right way.That’s how I was raised, and that’s exactly how I lead. My husband Wesley and our two amazing kids are my rock. In 2011, a tornado tore through our home and nearly took our lives. That moment changed everything, and reminded me what truly matters. Faith , family , and resilience. I’ve lived a life full of hard work, determination, and breaking barriers. There have been challenges and triumphs alike, but I wouldn’t trade any of it. My story is a testament to what America stands for—the American Dream. From a small town in Alabama, I rose to become my state’s U.S. Senator—a woman who’s breaking barriers and fighting for conservative values every day. I’m living proof of the limitless opportunity and freedom that define this country. But, I didn’t get here by playing it safe or staying quiet, and I’m not about to start now. The radical Left wants to silence conservatives like me. They want to drown out our voices and push their agenda without opposition, but I’m standing firm. I’m fighting tooth and nail to keep up and push back hard, for Alabama, for our values, and for every American who believes in freedom. The support I’ve received so far means everything, but this fight is far from over. We need the resources to keep going strong and hold our ground. Thank you, and may God bless America. Katie Britt (R-AL) | | | | I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong. Faith. Family. Freedom. The Left is doing everything they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored. From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul. This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere. Will you stand with me? Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc. Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Help me bring Antifa to justice
body:
I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs

| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zu1bgdd8cvjihm3qkc8q33ouabl5s3g9d7jgpi40_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. **[I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z82q7gvu228ogh338280imf0r7495c7hph704uco_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs) ****I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.**People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"**Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlafr2lghe55oothfunjlkr4qi8jojab6jaukb0g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.**No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice.[**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z4tik97c6h7cclc6o8niav06ip084u17oaaii8fo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.**_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.**For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.**So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7he3ab19mqkt6jikm8aa7rgl6p6vtba4lqj4sso_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmih6socaojvnu8cm5iapd9nrnqltjuuk2094n70_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs) **Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zv4ovf8r7mnurtidgpn2hriicr6q8202ek4oca58_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
**Andy Ngo**
---
|
---
| | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- **they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. [**Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zkdaabl4bvmatfkui0flai49p27ph3ri36is7j4g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ztuolel9vfi8rbs6ldjqopfda6uj5a31deoqhaho_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm8or4cjh2bs)
---

And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned. It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice. We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free. Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. | | Sincerely, | | Andy Ngo | | | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Pop Acta Media | First Look News PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Katie Britt
subject: Come take a stroll through the past with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
My name is Katie Britt, and if it’s alright with you, I’d like to share a little about who I am. I’m not part of the D.C. cocktail circuit, and I never will be. That’s just not who I am.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmvca7c3eq0iug8k3a59dteunk9848ivc8mt2li8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
| | Friend,

My name is Katie Britt, and if it’s alright with you, I’d like to share a little about who I am. **I’m not part of the D.C. cocktail circuit, and I never will be._That’s just not who I am._**

In 2022, I was elected to represent the great state of Alabama in the United States Senate. I became the first woman in Alabama’s history to hold this seat—but that’s not why I ran.

I ran because I’m a _**mom**_ , a _**wife**_ , and a _**conservative**_ who’s fed up with the direction this country is heading. I came to Washington to fight for our families, to protect our values, and to bring some Alabama backbone to a broken system.

I didn’t come here to make friends with the political elite. I came here to stand up for the people who don’t have a voice in the room—and I’m not backing down.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb1ijuivd8rvl6t3lcdctg6allddjq7gveqib310_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
Before coming to the Senate, I served as the first female president and CEO of the Business Council of Alabama, and before that, I was Chief of Staff to Senator Richard Shelby. **I’ve never shied away from a challenge—and I’ve never forgotten who I’m fighting for.** In every role I’ve held, my mission has been the same: _deliver real results for Alabama families and the American people._
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo66jcnn247aaogf29mmup2ft8d56vlmdnp42r5g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
Before starting my career in public service, I earned my undergraduate and law degrees from the University of Alabama. That experience taught me how to lead, think on my feet, and fight for what I believe in—**and it laid the foundation for _everything_ I’ve done since.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjruoc1uvovpn86a91t4hg1h4hp3iccrc0imltoo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvd5t1omu0udv14pcu980d8f63vv7sesln1kcipo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrn6vjmcv75cff45g4qp2q8mmqoj50k25jaq2a28_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
But long before that, I was just a small-town girl from Enterprise, Alabama. My dad ran the local hardware store. My mom taught dance to almost every kid in town. We didn’t grow up with wealth or political connections. **We came from hard work, grit, and doing things the right way._That’s how I was raised, and that’s exactly how I lead._**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zepp3srg4f5iq0jrdcq4te07ukcusog56q6h1l1g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
My husband Wesley and our two amazing kids are my rock. In 2011, a tornado tore through our home and nearly took our lives. That moment changed everything, and reminded me what truly matters. __**Faith** , **family** , and **resilience**.__
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze9g5j3aie05tdomdg310u0u75nmvmrr3a20jcio_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvm74vigupkb6i6ic3v90hq3c06vtaeboev38l4g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs3pkqtsh40vncoeqg7the6fg9r2p9cd1ei0ptv0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
I’ve lived a life full of hard work, determination, and breaking barriers. There have been challenges and triumphs alike, but I wouldn’t trade any of it.

My story is a testament to what America stands for—the American Dream. From a small town in Alabama, I rose to become my state’s U.S. Senator—a woman who’s breaking barriers and fighting for conservative values every day.

__**I’m living proof of the limitless opportunity and freedom that define this country.**__

But, I didn’t get here by playing it safe or staying quiet, **and I’m not about to start now.**

The radical Left wants to _silence_ conservatives like me. They want to drown out our voices and push their agenda without opposition, but I’m standing firm.

I’m fighting tooth and nail to keep up and push back hard, for Alabama, for our values, and for every American who believes in freedom.

**The support I’ve received so far means everything, but this fight is far from over.** We need the resources to keep going strong and hold our ground.

**[So, after hearing a bit of my story, will you take a moment to chip in whatever you can afford to help me keep up this fight? The road ahead won’t be easy, but I’ve faced tough battles before. And it would mean the world to have you standing with me.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z34abblbeu1r5pj3p5pqg669si6kem4b1emaatm0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)**
---
[ CHIP IN TO FIGHT WITH KATIE BRITT >> ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4usdnkvn1uqkpqmgj1eir9llpe5fdkamttebuf0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
Thank you, and may God bless America.

Katie Britt (R-AL)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8qv8nfnsedi6kn3q6imkuq0ifobvc5iiggsaivg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4cc54s9npvd2h77v8k9r62r8ahfe0dm0lfkakmo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?
---
[ STAND WITH KATIE >> ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6hk8lp3h955iurpf6i4ul50abdcqeuqaruco2ho_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1i98bgs62k9ndkieinklr7ian6f3h9o7241uuj8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)
---
Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc1cru5e9j90k12b8ojkkchflv665pcq38bghpu8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp35c1ie0ob7c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4d2jhuop1n6s7hsf1n4976tf8rsiqjf9bamc388_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpl8bl1hafkg4hf3j8jc63ooiljefjc82asv8kb8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm4pb1c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Do you stand with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
I have to know... do you have my back?

| | | [](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z49vtnstg8u6oeo2eekqh3ndgrmqsscmbevnku8o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmcob6c9h2bs)
---
| | Friend, Democrats lost the 2024 election. Period. **_But instead of following the voters ' mandate, they're now holding the government hostage to protect illegal aliens and fund their left-wing propaganda projects like NPR._** Democrats caused this shutdown. They own _every_ _single_ _minute_ of it. That's the honest-to-God truth. But you and I know the media is going to try and pin it on me and President Trump - and all because we REFUSE to sell out our country to illegal aliens. Let me be clear: I don't care what the media thinks. I certainly don't care what Schumer thinks. **_The only opinion I care about is YOURS_.** **So, are** _**you**_**with me? Do you have my back as I REFUSE to cave to the hostile Democrats who are putting illegals before Americans?[[link]](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7r37lodav5s8rgr63d1kmft4783ddfvdpf4fm88_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmcob6c9h2bs)**

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Help me bring Antifa to justice
body:
I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs

| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zho9649pdppha0dbq20bbdvc5invh85ushffsm88_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm6p32c3h2bs)
---
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. **[I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zihm266sudsfv8lacguj9egfsib6hk16iebj1ch0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm6p32c3h2bs) ****I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.**People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"**Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdq18q9rne5nm4p93ejvbe1apjvf8bgdrorn019g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm6p32c3h2bs) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.**No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice.[**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3o9q8dmq6sr47o2ft1h1pjp731uvkv7e2p77ueo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm6p32c3h2bs) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.**_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.**For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.**So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs7lh2ut6780njpf044d2jp7vfhv3l06ugcgbnn8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm6p32c3h2bs) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zflj1ti6u5lijh19aefk67bg9bs5kvkit8d9h8t8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm6p32c3h2bs) **Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpqt92uoadr5n9vht7uadu19s9rde6mjlqp1hip8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm6p32c3h2bs)
---
**Andy Ngo**
---
|
---
| | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- **they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. [**Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs7hk3uuekv6lfqeuuh3qg93b9klitvv1deo0788_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jm6p32c3h2bs)
---

clean_body: I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs | | | | My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019. This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.People like you needed to know what was happening. But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F* you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles. Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned. It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice. We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free. Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. | | Sincerely, | | Andy Ngo | | | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Victor Riches
subject: They told her daughter to lie We can not let them get away with it
body:
What she discovered was SHOCKING!

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztkr1vnu21h2g5mpcvniig18m3ec0po7cu2qgg08_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)
Friend,

When Amber Lavigne discovered a chest binder in her daughter’s bedroom, she did what any loving mother would do: She asked questions.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgc7vj0c39jk816fisgcb3v7i2d3vdjv6mrrg7fg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)
What she discovered was SHOCKING!

Public school officials in Maine **secretly provided her 13-year-old daughter with the chest binder** and encouraged her to _"socially transition”_ her gender, without Amber's knowledge or consent.

Even worse, a school counselor encouraged her daughter to _hide all of it from her mother_.

They didn’t treat Amber like a parent. They treated her like the enemy.

**That's why Amber turned to the Goldwater Institute.**

I am Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation’s leading liberty organization. Our American Freedom Network of pro bono attorneys provides legal support to protect the constitutional rights of parents like Amber Lavigne.

We filed a lawsuit on Amber's behalf against the school district for violating her constitutional rights.

We need to make sure this never happens again.

But we can’t do it alone.

[We need your help to defend the rights of parents like Amber across the country.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhj13t3uvh7ul66b6853n6fdf77vhsdeh9vdni2o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)

Will you stand with us today?
[Stand With Parents](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgd3vaun373at16hmtnp1nsvp1ddb17nvaqhrl58_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)
Amber’s story is not an isolated one.

School districts nationwide have decided they — not the parents — should have the final say over children’s lives.

It's disturbing, it's unethical, it's wrong... and yes, it's _unconstitutional_.

For more than three decades, the Goldwater Institute has led the fight to protect liberty, including the rights of parents to raise and care for their children.

Now, we're leading the legal battle to protect parental rights and promote academic transparency in public education.

[Please pitch in a tax-deductible donation of $10, $35, or even $100 to help us fight for parental rights in every state >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zue88qgbufpdfs3cifefedjb82jftgtl2u5defe0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)
[Donate $10](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zh4bokql8luehjupm24lbpejdqpreaqtnr86mjmo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)

[Donate $35](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq0odmte6cknp09itfe6rss8eelh9am716jho7b8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zk1a8epcvata6luvcmaehfpnqumtcligjtmukm28_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg915lhin516tqive6vqa526vcm33oev2aa503sg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zltvgdli272qqfmga8mou5l30b629p4k2gvshnvo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4j972vho2mqkub3lah0f8kevbeve3rhpm4lrep8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)

[Donate Any Other Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztr3iuioir2qmaedh2qr9htcnj7248qhha5qba7o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)
Amber's case has sparked national outrage – and earned her national support – from parents, legal experts, advocacy groups, and even attorneys general from multiple states.

But there are still school boards across the U.S. that have decided they know better than parents what’s best for kids, and they are cutting families out of the equation.

[Winning in court takes serious resources.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdpevl6peksbgglk0vuvbv6325k0nf481uts07a0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)

That's where we need your help.

Your support powers this fight.

[Please help us fight for the rights of parents with a tax-deductible donation right away >>](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7jkim1aa3g5fpg2dvcskr5jn32thbmqiihd4r9g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)
[Donate](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1tu55vso2629okk9m5vcgnaua11o8kj9f9nrdng_rp22sh2s8i6eor0c3jmeo36clh2bs)
Thank you for standing with us in defense of parental rights.

Victor Riches
President & CEO
Goldwater Institute

_The Goldwater Institute is recognized by the Internal Revenue Service as a 501(c)(3) organization. Our federal identification number is 86-0597661._
