name: Defenders of Wildlife
subject: Impact Report: The weirdness and woes of water wildlife
body:
Here's what's happening at Defenders of Wildlife

Here's what's happening at Defenders of Wildlife
                  

                  

(https://support.defenders.org/s/4107730/38SyG9Xl)

(https://support.defenders.org/s/4107731/38SyG9Xl)

WILDLIFE IN THE NEWS

“It's not something we can play around with, in terms of the timing and the funding. It's that endangered of a species.”

Chamois Andersen, Rockies and Plans Senior Representative, on stalled black-footed ferret recovery efforts during the government shutdown.

Read Here → (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107732/38SyG9Xl)

 

Marine mammals need our help: Defend the MMPA today!

America’s incredible variety of marine mammals – dolphins, whales, sea otters and even polar bears – are protected by the Marine Mammals Protection Act. But the MMPA is under attack in Congress by a new draft proposal. Our representatives need to hear from all of us right away! Sign a message to your representative urging them to stand against attempts to dismantle the MMPA and endanger marine wildlife! (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107733/38SyG9Xl)

 

Wolves Belong: Controversy Shouldn’t Stop Their Reintroduction (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107734/38SyG9Xl)

Mexican gray wolves, or lobos as they’re known, are the most endangered subspecies of gray wolf in the world. But despite slow growth, these wolves are still overwhelmingly killed by humans. Their recovery needs our help.

Read More → (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107735/38SyG9Xl)

Wolves Belong: Controversy Shouldn’t Stop Their Reintroduction (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107734/38SyG9Xl)

Mexican gray wolves, or lobos as they’re known, are the most endangered subspecies of gray wolf in the world. But despite slow growth, these wolves are still overwhelmingly killed by humans. Their recovery needs our help.

Read More → (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107735/38SyG9Xl)

Spend Your Spooky Season with Salmon (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107736/38SyG9Xl)

The return of cooler autumn days marks the epic return journey of Fall-run salmon. We share the spooky natural – and unnatural – realities of the salmon run phenomenon!

Read More → (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107737/38SyG9Xl)

Spend Your Spooky Season with Salmon (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107736/38SyG9Xl)

The return of cooler autumn days marks the epic return journey of Fall-run salmon. We share the spooky natural – and unnatural – realities of the salmon run phenomenon!

Read More → (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107737/38SyG9Xl)

Where Did the Night Go? (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107738/38SyG9Xl)

For many, childhood memories of dark skies and nocturnal wildlife are giving way to light-polluted nights. The extra light is bad news for many species like fireflies and bats that have adapted to the dark. Learn what animals are affected and how you can help!

Read More → (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107739/38SyG9Xl)

Where Did the Night Go? (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107738/38SyG9Xl)

For many, childhood memories of dark skies and nocturnal wildlife are giving way to light-polluted nights. The extra light is bad news for many species like fireflies and bats that have adapted to the dark. Learn what animals are affected and how you can help!

Read More → (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107739/38SyG9Xl)

Traveling and Turtles in Cape Romain (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107740/38SyG9Xl)

Travel is an opportunity to create unforgettable memories – and with some planning, you can give back to the community at the same time! Hear how one defender made a difference by volunteering to help sea turtles in Cape Romain.

Read More → (https://support.defenders.org/s/4107741/38SyG9Xl)

Becoming a recurring donor places you among our most committed and valued supporters. Your gift will help us fight around the clock to counter the growing threats to wildlife.

**[BREAKING: Court Gives Green Light to EVERY State to Protect Children](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUUUuOnTAQPI3Zgdw2j4GFF6MgpCwmyipZIn8aP2vwR7bhXT8iGQ6QXaurukrV9ftj_ZBud8H-kB6FPt2ay6oyyk8X7POwWHSsR3m5EIPFlVH2aIG2MF081hihzcBZgwLeBjoOI_RT8xQKe0Q5soHCqCSdYETV600jU5s28GicuJSAwgSUAvBOIUPzUAo3AKB0Iz09kpEVS6djKJhPWd2JLoR4TTF0OvpmF89aUyH8nbCFsEWabUcr9y5mS9hSjpRiroQtd6I24Ku0JgZZ8TrhS4lH1qijQcJnAMqHiXPChqP69R9G-JxyLAl1dcF-QR6NOzzhM3rp9q-llj5JZwPhc_nMHmt1t_Hle7NiqBgq4fPP9_bbr-_t_YomC5Nebt9dGd5IT-0l_Tdn_f9mTsH-BAAA__-Z1aA4)** Dear Fellow American,

Praise God! The U.S. Supreme Court has ruled, 6-3, in _United States v. Skrmetti_ that states can protect kids from harmful drugs and surgeries. Every child deserves to be kept safe from dangerous procedures.

This is a landmark victory for every child in our country, as the ruling will allow EVERY state to implement similar laws to protect children from the harms of gender ideology.

This win moves us that much closer to finally ending the practice of experimenting on children.
[ DONATE](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUUUuOnTAQPI3Zgdw2j4GFF6MgpCwmyipZIn8aP2vwR7bhXT8iGQ6QXaurukrV9ftj_ZBud8H-kB6FPt2ay6oyyk8X7POwWHSsR3m5EIPFlVH2aIG2MF081hihzcBZgwLeBjoOI_RT8xQKe0Q5soHCqCSdYETV600jU5s28GicuJSAwgSUAvBOIUPzUAo3AKB0Iz09kpEVS6djKJhPWd2JLoR4TTF0OvpmF89aUyH8nbCFsEWabUcr9y5mS9hSjpRiroQtd6I24Ku0JgZZ8TrhS4lH1qijQcJnAMqHiXPChqP69R9G-JxyLAl1dcF-QR6NOzzhM3rp9q-llj5JZwPhc_nMHmt1t_Hle7NiqBgq4fPP9_bbr-_t_YomC5Nebt9dGd5IT-0l_Tdn_f9mTsH-BAAA__-Z1aA4)
**Gender ideology is on the ropes.** Now we have to keep the momentum going and finish the job. Several cases and many clients are still waiting for justice from the lies of gender ideology, including:
* **Selina Soule** --she and several other female athletes have been standing up for fairness on and off the field for years. We've beaten back efforts to rewrite Title IX at the federal level, but many states, like Connecticut, continue to push policies that force girls to compete against male athletes.
* **Dan and Jennifer Mead** --their daughter's school secretly treated her as a boy, as part of the school's "social transition" policy. Many school districts around the country still have these policies in place.
* **Brian and Katy Wuoti** --this loving foster couple had their license revoked because they wouldn't agree to push Vermont's radical gender ideology agenda. They are challenging this illegal policy, along with another family.

[With your gift today,](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUUUuOnTAQPI3Zgdw2j4GFF6MgpCwmyipZIn8aP2vwR7bhXT8iGQ6QXaurukrV9ftj_ZBud8H-kB6FPt2ay6oyyk8X7POwWHSsR3m5EIPFlVH2aIG2MF081hihzcBZgwLeBjoOI_RT8xQKe0Q5soHCqCSdYETV600jU5s28GicuJSAwgSUAvBOIUPzUAo3AKB0Iz09kpEVS6djKJhPWd2JLoR4TTF0OvpmF89aUyH8nbCFsEWabUcr9y5mS9hSjpRiroQtd6I24Ku0JgZZ8TrhS4lH1qijQcJnAMqHiXPChqP69R9G-JxyLAl1dcF-QR6NOzzhM3rp9q-llj5JZwPhc_nMHmt1t_Hle7NiqBgq4fPP9_bbr-_t_YomC5Nebt9dGd5IT-0l_Tdn_f9mTsH-BAAA__-Z1aA4) we can represent more clients in court (free of charge) and advocate for more good laws that protect children. **Plus, you can help maximize the impact of a special $250,000 challenge grant!**

Thank you for your support. Countless children are now protected from much of gender ideology's irreversible harms.

In Christ,

John Bursch
Senior Counsel, Vice President of Appellate Advocacy
Alliance Defending Freedom

P.S. Praise God! The Supreme Court has acted decisively to protect children from harmful drugs and procedures, ruling 6-3, in _United States v. George Santos, who was serving seven-year sentence in federal prison after pleading guilty to fraud and identity theft charges.

# Sunday, October 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1781, British forces surrendered at the [Battle of Yorktown](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDFuhDAQAF9jukP2gjkoXKShu7QpkYH14cR4T_aCxe-jJE9IP5qR5uMxPawPPj7f7Y6GHU0RSw7IjGnidOyvhfb9YMzZRqac6eCtTCBB35S8qWFarQ_X1FarcYiATYVG3TvZdz3ortrMYDX0vUWlQUm93OXSuEVB281Sd4u2lTc_NiXVoKRsVVM7N-uh14OWskeYV9FKXD1Tqj_JR97QhYtOTPVCexXMxvzKonkTMAoYSyn1bJkDOo9hzTWlp4AxoE1RwJjwpHCwp2jTdSs2CRj_8CxgvCh9MZVYJbO-ig_B5-4uWvncrQ-_Of7Xo9PAdwAAAP__PPV9kg), signaling the end of British rule in the colonies and the birth of a new nation: the United States of America. Today’s [_Whatever Happened To_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAQRk9jd7YGbGxcUGyTLttuaU3MEFiBsWASlNuvslf46-_Te9L7c9_vGGI4n78xkWGX95NajcRMZefySteRU3ox1Yon51rzi33bJUg1CBjEtlsM8bPPvTWOSNLUkxHrAnrRUi29N2oCiaDdOtltRqEPwOOwTmvl5sOt2AfzpQkQmwCYxTQ691CbVpsC0CQftpuBbOBcxr85nOzJxU9-UxmPnPpoPPNVu-lXJ2-dvLXWxkQnY3Qx1_r9dPLmQ-VcPt_dIw_0pjJ4vC46yQ4NmcqDbO2LsVcLMYa6rN0Mz4Qh_rfwj9K8jfwXAAD__7A8ezI) feature explores the rise and decline of waterbeds, a $2 billion industry in the 1980s that has since become a nostalgic, niche item. We're sponsored today by [Laundry Sauce](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M2q2zAQhuGrkXc5jH7sWAsvCql3p9BVl2YijW21kmWkUULuvqTtHXT7MjwM34_P5RNDDMf2DRNNvObloGeNxExl4dLS6XJKjalWPDjXmhvvz0WB6i8SLtIuHkN8Labz00qkSHc0yesA4zCqfuj2CfRdqhHQDg7IOEcW3WqlJ1RAMGAXprcmQVoJYKT-WNd7b8fe9gAjqbsXBsgHzuXjZw4H77TGV35Q-XA5dXHamc8q9BehZqHmiO3w5VWxOXofCDWfJfvmuAo1806XGrYDuRW6nOh-4UZCz43TUnMrjoS-zX95oYZ3TuRDS0LfviYM8V90mE4M2yH07bsRSj-wBDxY6JuRGozVV21HA7Yrkz-fIcZQh6swsL2NP3_zf439mNTvAAAA__9R7pUV), the best-smelling laundry detergent on the market. We've tried, and yes, it works and it keeps your clothes and linens smelling amazing and fresh. We like it so much, we wanted to offer a special discount to _The Flyover_ readers in today's edition.

## Nationwide ‘No Kings’ Protests
At least 2,500 [“No Kings” rallies were held](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L9utDAQBPCnMR3IXv4XLj7pE91F6VIig9ewibGRvXfo3j66e4XUI43mN1-3-WbIU9g-zIGaXZwDXtkjM6aZ0_0413gcd8acTeCYc7zzfs0goS2VLNU4W0P-OTeF1Q4RsC5Qq76TQzdA2xW7BmfkgqbpneprWB26YRzbundOLW23uoL0q01JNSopG1VXzi3tOLRjK-WAsFjRSLTEMVXfkQLv6PwzPjBVazwKr3fmM4v6n4BJwGSW9SWotviKBUyf0RPTmgVMwTDFcJHF8ofClstkvCfMZUYuzxQZM5dvtIApc0xPUU9kRf1fQdcp1feySNqeF3lPuetFI7fDkH8P4T-999DwGwAA__-sUYXB) nationwide on Saturday as hundreds of thousands protested against Trump administration policies amid the ongoing government shutdown. Prominent Democrats like former second gentleman Doug Emhoff, California Gov. Gavin Newsom, and Sens. Bernie Sanders, Chuck Schumer, and Elizabeth Warren all [voiced their support of the rallies](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLtuhTAMQL8GtqDEvIcMXdhu144ogAG3eaDEXHT_vuKqf9DtSEe2fPz1GB-GLPnt0zjUvIbR45UsMmMcOZ7umINzJ2NKxnNIKZy8XyNIqIWSQvXjYsi-xipf9IoIWOaoVdvIrumgbvJdN6btVQmmrFY1Q9NAO3Vlj7BKwG4yMid9b1NS9UrKSpXFuk5139V9LWWHMC1ZJXEhDrH4DuR5x9W-whNjMQeXW70zHykrPzIYMhiu6yr8NN8Vt89guDGD4Uzijyw9UUw2bLcM4of8lsQRA2PiJN7RwiyOPCWOhil48R45j8UwJhFnb6DspOzzqJfjImspNW1Wyc0Zsu-z-F-_fGr4DQAA__-LQYtO) in person and through social media. Republicans have blamed the protests on far-left activism, claiming Democrats are supporting the protests to prolong the government shutdown while appeasing their progressive base. [House Speaker Mike Johnson](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSpCAURb9GMyxEUQwINjHrTTe0UB76dhAseDbTfz_V_QsTn6pb95x_j-Vh0GPY_5oTNLm4BCjZAxGkhdJ9Xls8z5sgZxMo5hxvOsoiuJCs5aydFmvQv5a-ttoBCOhq0O04cDUoIYf60LKXnBs1Sau6DSY1wDgoMfZr79bNKlOjfq-1vJ1azvu2a5xb5aTkJDlXIFZb9RwsUkzN_4iBDnD-FZ-Qmi2etdcH0ZWr7k8l5krMpZTGxe-3xZtXYr6iR8ItV2JOcN2rx82EzCim7WAmELKPJwuRfWHYM7tSJMiUWTYvZuHMzIFJzIQdEoadeXCEH37cZGMJzOF-UJ20vQp6j3kYq57vp0H_-Ui_CvvU4icAAP__YFKSuQ) expressed hope that once the rallies concluded, Democrats would focus on ending the shutdown.
## Trump Commutes Santos' Sentence
President Trump said Friday he had [commuted the sentence](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGOgzAQBdDTQEc0HrANhYtt0mXbLZHBY_DKYGRPEuX2K5IjbDka6eu__3MbbzbEsC_fdiPDPo07PUskZsoj5_t2zGnb7kyl2J1TKenO63NEQNkIaMQwOhvia-xqZzwRUluTEVpBr3qUql6NbiXowUvVKjdLNfeTnPw0WQUAGjXWwZxpAsQgADrRXryf5NDLQQL0hJOrOiAXOOXLbwo7r-TjKz0oX-a01dGszEep2q8KrxVe7XECztd5ZA5zpAqvb0qzUMoLNR9K85FZDmlvDptd2pveUqecaqWYyRMIpwevuwFBopi0xTobdzxDjKEoXXWwbDbEdw_-13gPg38BAAD__7Nng5U) of former U.S. Rep. George Santos, who was serving a seven-year sentence in federal prison after pleading guilty to fraud and identity theft charges. The New York Republican was sentenced in April after admitting last year to deceiving donors and stealing the identities of 11 people—including his own family members—to make donations to his campaign. Trump [posted on Truth Social](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGurCAQBuCnwQ4Dg7pSUNzGbm97S4MwKjcIBmbX7Nuf7J6cJzjVFJP8-b__332-2xBD2v7aAw2teU541YhEWGYqj-N0-TgehLXaRLnW_KD9mkFAz6XgUs_ehviau8abFRFQNWjkbRDjMEI_NLsRNy0FSCcWpcdVd7LzVg9adUqN1jtognmnSSG1FKKTql3Xpddjr3shRoTFs06gD5RL-z-HRDuu8ZWfWFqXjyaaneisTP1hMDGYrutq0-LeivefwXTmGCi4ymDyOdno-cfFYPpc_gPkFRNhcsg3zGVD_i3mxSULagStmmL8eYUYQx1urBPbYUP8tKBfTfc08BUAAP__S0WE-g) on Friday evening: _“George has been in solitary confinement for long stretches of time and, by all accounts, has been horribly mistreated. Therefore, I just signed a Commutation, releasing George Santos from prison, IMMEDIATELY. Good luck George, have a great life!”_ The former congressman [fabricated much of his personal and professional history](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OnTAQRp_GdHNlD_-FizR0mzYlMngMXhkb2cNe8fYRm7zBNtOMdPSd8-dj_jA--Lj9NgdpdmmO9C6BmCnPnK_jXNNxXEylmMiplHTx_p5RYgtKghpna3y456ay2hEh1RVp1Xdy6AZsu2rXPS7UONm2nWrMKldcxkW6ZXBDT42t18rrh6akGpWUjapfzi3tOLRjK-VAuFjRSLKeU359Jh95Jxfu9EX5taajCnpnPouofwmcBE7xPlPh5yVwesACJyWf0wucrgKPn8Bpo5Q3gn9WkCmQKWTB5XRA_IQz-5Ii7OnKBYxjyvBdA_7nsNDDTSZDocgUVxI4VVnb8-1D8KXrRSO3w_jwPZJ_VPZL498AAAD__41vjyE) before entering the House of Representatives. He claimed to have graduated from New York University and Baruch College — the latter on a volleyball scholarship — and worked at Citigroup and Goldman Sachs.
## Ohtani Sends Dodgers Back to World Series
Los Angeles Dodgers’ two-way superstar Shohei Ohtani delivered [one of the greatest single-game performances](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO8yAQhJ_G7hwti3FwQfE36fK3V1oYlsAJGws2ifL2J98rXDkaaUbf93Vf7jbltD_-240Mh7Ls9G6ZmKkuXJ_b4cq2PZlaszuX1sqT43tBQDUIGMS8eJvyZxl7bwIRkuzJiOsEetKopj4aKQPhLGcvRjFOEmEKq3cqEGhn0dk-mXNNgJgFwCjkJYRVzVrNCkATrr4bgXziUi_fJe0cKeRPeVG9uLL12UTmo3XyX4e3Dm_2OAHO6gyVk8vU4c0X_6DahhZLpDSUyHZPg5gQVycRBI0aLSlQVjuBUgZ0Vti-Gn-8U86pTdduhMdmU_695T-5ehn8CQAA____VH0I) in baseball history—perhaps even all of sports—on Friday to send the defending champions back into the World Series. With a 5-1 victory over the Milwaukee Brewers, the Dodgers completed a four-game sweep of the majors’ best regular-season team. The Japanese phenom [hit three home runs and pitched six scoreless innings](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL_O3CAQxJ_G7rAA_8MFRZrrvrQpLWyWg3zgtdi9c-7tI-cV0oxGGmk08_v1tX65lNPx_OkKWA64HnBRBmaoK9dXOXcs5cVA5A5GInxxvFYt9SiUFGpZvUv5sw6ttwFAQ9-CVfMkzWT0OLXRTsse9iHcsoQ-aK-87o3xxsy6n8PWJnu3KakWJeWg-i6EbVzMuIxSGtCbbwYJPjHW7jemgyOE_ME31G7H0mYbmU9q-h-NfjT6cV1XF_DP_eLOG_2gEyvTbSJGSAIjuyOJ4r6BRMmbiIkY60cQHF549E-oJDa3f4sLa_aCoCagtlp_XinnRNPcDPJZXMr_JvB_cXtb_TcAAP__gB2GIA), allowing two hits and striking out 10 batters. Ohtani is the only player in league history to hit multiple home runs in a postseason game he pitched. Ohtani’s skill set—as a full-time starting pitcher and full-time hitter who is among the very best at both—makes him [the unquestioned greatest player in the game](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGu3CAURVeDO0bwsJlxQZGG7qdNaWHzsImAZxnmI-8--rOF1Fe6Ouf8-Vq-XEyx7L9dRtMCLQV7TdgaXku73vncKOd3w1pdaVQrvdvRFxAwcSm4nBfvYrqXcfAmIAKqAY18avHSL5j0cJhtlkLrUQepNz0_lXJi2qan00p7JUAP0fy8SSFnKcQo1SOEdZpf0zwJ8UJYPRsF-tjoevylWNqBId30jddjozwkc7R2VqZ-MbAMbO_9gfUsPyMDm9PKwNZG183ALgxs9AzsqLUCIYCB_ajktPIzuZtCqLykrfJElbuyY8LKPfkdr8rrQQdGTkdzJfLWiXd3c085Flc2HC7jzx5TilU_2Sj27GL6QLb_Kvtt4F8AAAD__4EDjRc).

**Whatever happened to waterbeds?** The iconic waterbed was invented in 1968 and caught on swiftly, growing so popular that by 1987, waterbeds accounted for roughly 20% of U.S. mattress sales, with industry revenue reported at around $2 billion. By the 1990s, [the problems began to overwhelm the wavey fun.](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOpCAUxfGnwU5zQVAsKLaxm223NCiXkQ2IgTtD5u03s6_w9b-ck_z_PLaHDTFcz982oSGftwtbjUiEZaPySveRU3oR1movyrXmF51tEyBUz6Hny-ZsiJ9Nds54RIFjh4bPE-hJCzV1p0FrhRRyVhbE5PWyoxw1cqVHPh0SoAvmu8aBLxxA8nHwfleLVosC0Ch2xySgC5TL8DeHi0708ZPfWIYjpy6ak-iubPzFxMrE2lobEl5ko4-51q9hYrWFwhGRiXXmEuTXnZZ6fGPpT3vfeKHrmyUsO7raFePuFmIMdZqZhGeyIf5_ox8lehvxLwAA___w5Xuo) As every waterbed owner quickly learned, the beds were heavy, holding hundreds of pounds of water that had to be drained if you wanted to move the bed. They required constant maintenance and heating, and if they sprang a leak, you had a major problem to deal with. For all those reasons, landlords and insurers began adding legal and financial restrictions to waterbed ownership, limiting their use because of the weight and water-damage risk.

But the final nail in the mattress was that the dry competition caught up. Memory Foam and pillow-top mattresses grew more sophisticated, delivering plush comfort without all the waves—and without the maintenance issues. By the 2000s, waterbeds comprised less than 5% of mattress sales. Today, waterbeds exist mainly as niche specialty items used in back-pain therapy or by fans of retro nostalgia. _Did you ever have a waterbed? Was it trouble-free? Let us know your experience by replying to this email._

Republicans have blamed the protests on far-left activism, claiming Democrats are supporting the protests to prolong the government shutdown while appeasing their progressive base. expressed hope that once the rallies concluded, Democrats would focus on ending the shutdown. Trump Commutes Santos' Sentence President Trump said Friday he had of former U.S. Rep. George Santos, who was serving a seven-year sentence in federal prison after pleading guilty to fraud and identity theft charges. The New York Republican was sentenced in April after admitting last year to deceiving donors and stealing the identities of 11 people—including his own family members—to make donations to his campaign. Trump on Friday evening: “George has been in solitary confinement for long stretches of time and, by all accounts, has been horribly mistreated. Therefore, I just signed a Commutation, releasing George Santos from prison, IMMEDIATELY. Good luck George, have a great life!” The former congressman before entering the House of Representatives. He claimed to have graduated from New York University and Baruch College — the latter on a volleyball scholarship — and worked at Citigroup and Goldman Sachs. With a 5-1 victory over the Milwaukee Brewers, the Dodgers completed a four-game sweep of the majors’ best regular-season team. The Japanese phenom , allowing two hits and striking out 10 batters. Ohtani is the only player in league history to hit multiple home runs in a postseason game he pitched. See the full step-by-step method here: | Whatever happened to waterbeds? The iconic waterbed was invented in 1968 and caught on swiftly, growing so popular that by 1987, waterbeds accounted for roughly 20% of U.S. mattress sales, with industry revenue reported at around $2 billion. By the 1990s, As every waterbed owner quickly learned, the beds were heavy, holding hundreds of pounds of water that had to be drained if you wanted to move the bed. They required constant maintenance and heating, and if they sprang a leak, you had a major problem to deal with. For all those reasons, landlords and insurers began adding legal and financial restrictions to waterbed ownership, limiting their use because of the weight and water-damage risk. But the final nail in the mattress was that the dry competition caught up. Memory Foam and pillow-top mattresses grew more sophisticated, delivering plush comfort without all the waves—and without the maintenance issues. By the 2000s, waterbeds comprised less than 5% of mattress sales. Today, waterbeds exist mainly as niche specialty items used in back-pain therapy or by fans of retro nostalgia. body:
Social media users are reporting these signs along with vote-no operatives pretending to be No Kings attendees across the state. We can't let them get away with this.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mu_CLeqvqxY_3NhFhZtJ-C60OfNNWMebWE5L-wxPzboEtI3nOtV5yzXg-bTuNEGsTGxUTEPLJjZMlSKgTBCcDc7FZ83ec6EA4L7axOsxkjynx1saB8K9D4k2P52ChmkM-NS9bmM44aNe1UgyHa7ohyWfKY6DXiv-8RPgp6CqHyY0rYldDP_h6jrJDgOn8Zf5LgWuhyn_2OXdOWLNeFq-rNammLNZYFQRf5KgjNyzcJM=&c=kJX3uTqx9dZv0ltR_xjD9saahw3nEhdrBfIfIKt42vXgKrSf2I0dTA==&ch=SzKNNDfN3kReHHo3v9x8dTEdw5KG9vxoPBOa2ghq4XKrHajXAxRgig==)

|
Peter,
In over 33,000 cities across the United States, millions of Americans are participating in No Kings rallies in defiance of the Trump administration.
These protests carry an added weight in Pennsylvania where voters are 17 days out from the November 4th, 2025, Pennsylvania Supreme Court Retention election.
On the line is control of elections in the keystone state, the backbone of the Democratic party's blue wall strategy for winning Presidential elections since 2008.
MAGA is dead set on winning this election no matter the cost, investing millions into ads and mailers aimed at deceiving Democratic voters into voting no on retention--the GOP choice on the ballot (the ballots do not show the judge's partisan affiliation).
Now they've opened up a new front, deceptive false flag canvassing and signage at No Kings rallies across Pennsylvania:
---
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mu_CLeqvqxY_3NhFhZtJ-C60OfNNWMebWE5L-wxPzboEtI3nOtV5yzXg-bTuNEGsTGxUTEPLJjZMlSKgTBCcDc7FZ83ec6EA4L7axOsxkjynx1saB8K9D4k2P52ChmkM-NS9bmM44aNe1UgyHa7ohyWfKY6DXiv-8RPgp6CqHyY0rYldDP_h6jrJDgOn8Zf5LgWuhyn_2OXdOWLNeFq-rPQu_aqYiXHRx5ray6Wtjyk=&c=kJX3uTqx9dZv0ltR_xjD9saahw3nEhdrBfIfIKt42vXgKrSf2I0dTA==&ch=SzKNNDfN3kReHHo3v9x8dTEdw5KG9vxoPBOa2ghq4XKrHajXAxRgig==)
---
On the left is Scott Pressler, the GOP operative leading MAGA's covert push, with a deceptive sign placed at a No Kings Rally in Philadelphia. Social media users are reporting these signs along with vote-no operatives pretending to be No Kings attendees at rallies across the state.
Early Vote Action, the group responsible for this, is funded by Elon Musk and accused human trafficker Tristan Tate, the brother of masculinity influencer Andrew Tate.
The GOP's strategy of deception is working. Recent polling shows that Democratic and Independent voters alike are confused on whether or not to vote yes or vote no.
Democrats are hanging on by a thread here and if the election were held today, there is a real chance we would lose. We can't let them get away with this.
Defend our Courts is holding the line and pushing back against MAGA's insidious disinformation campaign. [Time is running out to save this court, please rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can afford so we can put it to work on the frontlines.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mu_CLeqvqxY_3NhFhZtJ-C60OfNNWMebWE5L-wxPzboEtI3nOtV5yzXg-bTuNEGsNIR13085yHknjZ8Hj_ADXWY41No16q7upskPjRge-c6AByqQmJoatzTTZaQWEiAfYLZ6gjdkNJrgHv72yEdi70-gBLD6CiajdXsnWf3nNGJvLrTzXAuhSwOpCZqRWKm9T4Sv_gqXNUqC0BR3OoVVDVjGpZRUTwUKYSk6SIfd8QCv_hR8qnRqMA==&c=kJX3uTqx9dZv0ltR_xjD9saahw3nEhdrBfIfIKt42vXgKrSf2I0dTA==&ch=SzKNNDfN3kReHHo3v9x8dTEdw5KG9vxoPBOa2ghq4XKrHajXAxRgig==)

clean_body: This is the most critical race in 2025, and it could end President Trumps agenda in Congress. | | | | | Friend, I won't sugar coat it: this politico article should be a wake up call to Republicans. George Soros, the DNC, and the Liberal unions are bankrolling Gavin Newsom's Proposition 50 power grab to let Democrats redraw Californias congressional maps without a census and steal 5-7 GOP house seats. This is the most critical race in 2025, and it could end President Trumps agenda in Congress. The Democrats are flooding this race with over $100 million from Soros, the DNC, and the liberal unions to rig California's maps and export their radical policies in California nationwide--open borders, high taxes, and woke nonsense. If Prop 50 passes on November 4th, Democrats will: Flip the house next year Impeach President Trump Reverse the Trump agenda Last year, over 6.3 million Californians voted for me in the senate race --the most ever for a Republican in our state's history. Now, my You Gotta Believe PAC** is fighting to turn out those over 6.3 million Garvey voters to vote NO on Prop 50 and protect our independent redistricting commission. Your donation will fuel targeted ads, door-to-door outreach, and voter mobilization to rally my team of over 6.3 million supporters to the polls. | | | | | | | Together, we'll mobilize a huge grassroots effort to stop Soros and Newsom and save Trump's agenda. # Sunday, October 19, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1953, Presidents Dwight D. Eisenhower of the United States and Adolfo Ruiz Cortines of Mexico commemorated the completion of [Falcon International Reservoir](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOpDX8GNcuPgbulx7JVriDazOsSN7FcLbn-AVrvqq-WY037f5hhw4rl_4JCefR5oj7SWQCOU5ph-Oa-Eo9MGCy5JEkH3BWSv9rwHVgJ09cjjmvvZuUd5CTQ7MoEYDg7H15pTvrRnJ6Af0tlvsaPq7JfAGjdUdUs3ulIECC6AAhlZ3g1IejB617dCYqlfkWVJuZaNrySMc6U25vadnHdwm8ipV97_SU6Wnfd9bKRumGDhSm_Ja6elKNR6PZjlOVHqiKPlkZ1WdnX_tHAKX4Wxbn8jhksvfLnk7_RsAAP__23l0pA) on the Rio Grande. The town of Falcon was displaced by the massive reservoir. A privately-owned Hill Country ranch with a historic climbing area is opening its property to the public for just a couple of days next week. ## 'No Kings' Protests Seen Across Texas
Thousands of [protesters gathered across the Lone Star state](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGy4yAMQE-DOzJIONgUFNu4-9tu6ZEBJ8wS4wFt_HP7HfsKv1LxZqT39Odr_qKU0_b4Ta_o-Hst8xaPliNzrPNW_qbt0dLG8ZsaLUthphQazajwLkFJsHOglD9z3wW3qGChiw4Go8YBzGC7pwsGogHEUSvdr9aPCqwZow0eKPSauuTOZaDAAigAc0NtlAow4IhW0zCIXsWQuNQbP-NlsuZPecd68-XVZfdk3pvQvwROAqfjOG7HSnRCgRNVTj5HgdPZJXDKxVM-Z3pH-W8PxLHJrcirVO61cGzcJPla2gkqP-V1VOCE4yAVrX6lFeQI2sietJF0J5K-vy9W60Wjv3fVhf1IOadmTv3Hi1K-bPlnP347_B8AAP__HUGOxw) on Saturday, participating in the nationwide "No Kings" protest of President Trump. The “No Kings” protests began earlier this year to oppose the Army’s 250th Anniversary Parade in Washington, D.C., held June 14, which coincided with President Trump’s birthday. Gov. Greg Abbott was one of several governors nationwide to order the state National Guard to a city ahead of the protests, sending the guard to Austin on Friday. You can find a video of the protests [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2upDAMhZ8GuoyS8BMoUmxDd7fdEjnYDNZmEkS8w523X8Er3M6SZZ_vO3--5i_gyOn5G17k5XvNc6KzRBKhY075L6dn4ST0DQVCyCLAWGC22nbKaGXGGYHjZ25r9EHjaGryxvV6cKZ3Y715txK60HUYwkB6RdvqBkEPLjjsuq6r2V_PjDajMdqY_mGbXms0zg52bMC5qtWELPl4yEY3yRo_-U3HY8mvOvpNZC9V86uyU2Wn8zwf5wpwLSs7vRkpV3a6rCo77Tmy8HKNKavbTu1HFiqiNth3SpyeCpYjl6JSPmRTd6KK_Cb1b0cQuo7t4FQ79I0JS6dMQ061Wo8qjBaVdnYNBpvVwVIfHveTY-TSXyLPF3C8ueVnbb-9_R8AAP__9UuTCg).
## Texas To Vote On 17 Constitutional Amendments
Seventeen constitutional amendments [will be](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkT3unDAQR09jOiPbfBgKijR0_7QpkcEDjGI8CA_L7u0j7xXSjF7103uaPz_Tj8OAcfvtDhj4vdIU4UkBmOGaIv3FuCWMDG-X3DwTs0Of3GSUaaRWUveTdxg-U134YVa-1wUM2raqs7q1fbEP_VKvpoZZr93sbddY3xjX-MbNq21quxQ45DGtdK-10rotTdUq5bU1nekrZ62oFXhkukre4Wuyhg-94CoXOoow7MxnEtUvYUZhxud5yp3uxBTPew64HODRlXRtwozuYlwCJGHGnCnMeFJAxiUjBFgYKWbOSsKMWuWTqamquuuEGT90X3K70YNkki4ESav8WsnzopMSeLlQTIx85zUXpDsg-gMiJ0lR8g5ydiEQS94xyUgvOGa4hBmLa_DngyFganP2djgM30r-v9-8BvMvAAD__8sipcI) on the ballot for Texans on Nov. 4, including measures to limit state taxation, require citizenship for voting, and codify parental rights. Among the measures on the ballot are proposals to prohibit the Texas legislature from imposing a tax on capital gains, to authorize judges to deny bail to offenders with serious felonies, and to bar the legislature from taxing securities transactions. All amendments on the ballot passed both chambers with a two-thirds majority and need only a simple majority vote from Texas voters to be adopted. You can read a summary of each amendment on the ballot [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSszAQg58GOjy7hh-HwsXfpMu1VzLreE08Z-wM3oTk7W_IK1wlVdInfV_mC8UU8_JFK1t5hTJn3mtiEd7mXH5iXmrMwi-q5FwRoegrzRr0vw6hw2n2FNN7HlpvHfgJW7ZoRjgZHM3U3iyEYeg1ukAQvBncBKCDH7wHNNf-pNtojzAEnBABcVS6HwE8Gn3SU0_GNAOwj1I2JTf-kIT0Lk_e1LWsbbI3kXtt-v-NPjf6vO-7qqWqKiSs5KUetdFnTnyVWPLhQ9nWQ3N58up46z5jHKVUpEuUlwct3KFRdx_azfr7HlOKdTxAlpVi-vTK3956Wv0bAAD__-rufoc).
## List: Bargain Vacation Spots in Texas
Nine Texas cities ranked among [the nation’s 30 most budget-friendly](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOpSAUxvGnwQ4D6IIWFNvYzbZbmqMcvSeLMIEzOr79xvsK03_58sv_78f8ARQp7X_gQM_fW54TXjUiM5Y55X-U9kqJ8RsqLEtmBgoVZqPML6mV1OMcgOI9903wiwqjbtBrZ9XgtHVj8_JBd-B63duwobKb2vp1GYzuNmdXM4x9Q_4500qPWiutbWs6q1TQzgxm7MA50SsMxLm0_MK3ZIt3PrG0az6a6F_Mn1V0v4WZhJmu62r3vEB66AUY6zMTZqpwUtrlkRPewkxc4MQozAQHFlqhyiNXlstX2JHlVghTiLfk_FWosgxYmRIw5VSFmZriw-dFMVK1D3A_gOLbwz-reHrzPwAA__9Zn4l0) vacation spots, according to a recent report, giving the Lone Star State the most cities on the list. Brownsville led the charge for Texas at No. 5 nationally with an average vacation cost of $1,336. Pearland and McAllen also cracked the top 10, ranking at Nos. 8 and 9, with average vacation costs of $1,362 and $1,405, respectively The survey ranked cities across the country based on multiple criteria, factoring in total costs for meals, drinks, lodging, and airfare. Busy day? Listen to our daily 15-minute podcast while commuting, cooking, or walking the dog—your Flyover fix, anywhere. | | 'No Kings' Protests Seen Across Texas Thousands of on Saturday, participating in the nationwide "No Kings" protest of President Trump. The “No Kings” protests began earlier this year to oppose the Army’s 250th Anniversary Parade in Washington, D.C., held June 14, which coincided with President Trump’s birthday. Gov. Greg Abbott was one of several governors nationwide to order the state National Guard to a city ahead of the protests, sending the guard to Austin on Friday. You can find a video of the protests . Texas To Vote On 17 Constitutional Amendments Seventeen constitutional amendments on the ballot for Texans on Nov. 4, including measures to limit state taxation, require citizenship for voting, and codify parental rights. Among the measures on the ballot are proposals to prohibit the Texas legislature from imposing a tax on capital gains, to authorize judges to deny bail to offenders with serious felonies, and to bar the legislature from taxing securities transactions. All amendments on the ballot passed both chambers with a two-thirds majority and need only a simple majority vote from Texas voters to be adopted. You can read a summary of each amendment on the ballot . List: Bargain Vacation Spots in Texas Nine Texas cities ranked among vacation spots, according to a recent report, giving the Lone Star State the most cities on the list. Brownsville led the charge for Texas at No. 5 nationally with an average vacation cost of $1,336. Pearland and McAllen also cracked the top 10, ranking at Nos. 8 and 9, with average vacation costs of $1,362 and $1,405, respectively The survey ranked cities across the country based on multiple criteria, factoring in total costs for meals, drinks, lodging, and airfare. body:
I have grassroots ballot chasers ready to go, I just need you

| | | | |
---
Friend, before I get into the latest from New Jersey, I want to _**[thank all of our sponsors](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmN6/?__vbtrk=MzI4MDEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI4MDEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_ who have stepped up to fund a voter registration staffer or ballot chaser this year.
Because of them, we are tied in the polls and ahead of our projections in New Jersey, and this race is 100% winnable.
Right now, my grassroots team is on the ground chasing mail-in ballots and preparing to launch our massive get out the vote program to **FLIP New Jersey** **from Blue to RED** this November, and we’re having great success.
[SPONSOR A BALLOT CHASER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmN6/?__vbtrk=MzI4MDEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI4MDEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Republicans are returning their mail in ballots at a higher rate than Democrats.** This is phenomenal news, but it’s not all good... So far, Democrat voters have requested almost 3 TIMES as many mail-in ballots as Republicans, and they still have more votes “in the bank” than we do.
Just like in Pennsylvania in 2024 for President Trump, this year in New Jersey **_we need to hit our magic number of mail-in and early in person Republican votes cast before election day_** so we can turn out the rest of our voters and win a decisive victory on Election Day.
We truly don’t have a moment to waste... mail-in voting is well underway, in-person Early Voting begins on October 25th, and Election Day is November 4th.
[SPONSOR A BALLOT CHASER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmN6/?__vbtrk=MzI4MDEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI4MDEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, the momentum is on our side, and the early returns are looking very good, but we have a lot of work to do in the next few weeks if we’re going to flip the Garden State red.
**We need your help to make the difference.** By sponsoring an Early Vote Action staffer, you’re fueling the grassroots work to flip New Jersey RED in 2025.**[Every new voter we register, every mail-in ballot we chase down, and every Republican we get to the polls brings us one vote closer to victory.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmN6/?__vbtrk=MzI4MDEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI4MDEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
**_[Please, take meaningful action today by becoming a sponsor of an Early Vote Action ballot chaser in New Jersey](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/bmN6/?__vbtrk=MzI4MDEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzI4MDEwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
_In Liberty,_
**Scott Presler**

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Help me bring Antifa to justice
body:
I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs

| |
---
| |
---
[](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkc2K2zAUhZ9G3sno39bCiySOs2mmZQrTpbiWrh0V2wqyktK3L4HpA8z245wDH-fX1V0hLnGb32DFzo8u7-6Gy33FMcdthq3ECUr6_dhL9E4woSlnlNtXjleh8xaFGlWFHW8Maxslpa1uneGBjRoYqoapyeiGI7DJSsOYBi5UFbvXFmfccq60NPUkveCyxVaxdtTCEMUwxJJy7dO2Y35CiU8cc4LgYS_1hqVaulsp953IAxEDEQNsGFKplzhiLn89bgVznfJMxCC1GVthkVofJqoMk7RtgqRWTwrsBLoJE5HDo6xuT4_skcj-2F_o-_mDCPPCK4b4WInsz9dP4mG9Q5w3IvuXDGskc8f-4k7D4Zs7vF2-_3Tv5w_340BPx89K8UT2pyP9L1_lLtz_xGWJu2mIYvMKcal9Wqvy5TOenfgXAAD__4wIkNs)
---
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I won't be the last. **[I'm asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkc2K2zAUhZ9G3sno39bCiySOs2mmZQrTpbiWrh0V2wqyktK3L4HpA8z245wDH-fX1V0hLnGb32DFzo8u7-6Gy33FMcdthq3ECUr6_dhL9E4woSlnlNtXjleh8xaFGlWFHW8Maxslpa1uneGBjRoYqoapyeiGI7DJSsOYBi5UFbvXFmfccq60NPUkveCyxVaxdtTCEMUwxJJy7dO2Y35CiU8cc4LgYS_1hqVaulsp953IAxEDEQNsGFKplzhiLn89bgVznfJMxCC1GVthkVofJqoMk7RtgqRWTwrsBLoJE5HDo6xuT4_skcj-2F_o-_mDCPPCK4b4WInsz9dP4mG9Q5w3IvuXDGskc8f-4k7D4Zs7vF2-_3Tv5w_340BPx89K8UT2pyP9L1_lLtz_xGWJu2mIYvMKcal9Wqvy5TOenfgXAAD__4wIkNs) ** **I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before. I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their "protest." As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. **People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush. "F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!" **Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects. I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn't have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you. That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law. Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkc2K2zAUhZ9G3sno39bCiySOs2mmZQrTpbiWrh0V2wqyktK3L4HpA8z245wDH-fX1V0hLnGb32DFzo8u7-6Gy33FMcdthq3ECUr6_dhL9E4woSlnlNtXjleh8xaFGlWFHW8Maxslpa1uneGBjRoYqoapyeiGI7DJSsOYBi5UFbvXFmfccq60NPUkveCyxVaxdtTCEMUwxJJy7dO2Y35CiU8cc4LgYS_1hqVaulsp953IAxEDEQNsGFKplzhiLn89bgVznfJMxCC1GVthkVofJqoMk7RtgqRWTwrsBLoJE5HDo6xuT4_skcj-2F_o-_mDCPPCK4b4WInsz9dP4mG9Q5w3IvuXDGskc8f-4k7D4Zs7vF2-_3Tv5w_340BPx89K8UT2pyP9L1_lLtz_xGWJu2mIYvMKcal9Wqvy5TOenfgXAAD__4wIkNs) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day. I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing. **No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though. Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That's why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages - but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime. So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment. Unfortunately it's going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice. [**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkc2K2zAUhZ9G3sno39bCiySOs2mmZQrTpbiWrh0V2wqyktK3L4HpA8z245wDH-fX1V0hLnGb32DFzo8u7-6Gy33FMcdthq3ECUr6_dhL9E4woSlnlNtXjleh8xaFGlWFHW8Maxslpa1uneGBjRoYqoapyeiGI7DJSsOYBi5UFbvXFmfccq60NPUkveCyxVaxdtTCEMUwxJJy7dO2Y35CiU8cc4LgYS_1hqVaulsp953IAxEDEQNsGFKplzhiLn89bgVznfJMxCC1GVthkVofJqoMk7RtgqRWTwrsBLoJE5HDo6xuT4_skcj-2F_o-_mDCPPCK4b4WInsz9dP4mG9Q5w3IvuXDGskc8f-4k7D4Zs7vF2-_3Tv5w_340BPx89K8UT2pyP9L1_lLtz_xGWJu2mIYvMKcal9Wqvy5TOenfgXAAD__4wIkNs) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse - open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order. By any means necessary. **_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They're doing it now against ICE. It's a sick strategy, but very smart - because so far, they've been successful. **For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences. **So now I'm taking justice into my own hands - with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkc2K2zAUhZ9G3sno39bCiySOs2mmZQrTpbiWrh0V2wqyktK3L4HpA8z245wDH-fX1V0hLnGb32DFzo8u7-6Gy33FMcdthq3ECUr6_dhL9E4woSlnlNtXjleh8xaFGlWFHW8Maxslpa1uneGBjRoYqoapyeiGI7DJSsOYBi5UFbvXFmfccq60NPUkveCyxVaxdtTCEMUwxJJy7dO2Y35CiU8cc4LgYS_1hqVaulsp953IAxEDEQNsGFKplzhiLn89bgVznfJMxCC1GVthkVofJqoMk7RtgqRWTwrsBLoJE5HDo6xuT4_skcj-2F_o-_mDCPPCK4b4WInsz9dP4mG9Q5w3IvuXDGskc8f-4k7D4Zs7vF2-_3Tv5w_340BPx89K8UT2pyP9L1_lLtz_xGWJu2mIYvMKcal9Wqvy5TOenfgXAAD__4wIkNs) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkc2K2zAUhZ9G3sno39bCiySOs2mmZQrTpbiWrh0V2wqyktK3L4HpA8z245wDH-fX1V0hLnGb32DFzo8u7-6Gy33FMcdthq3ECUr6_dhL9E4woSlnlNtXjleh8xaFGlWFHW8Maxslpa1uneGBjRoYqoapyeiGI7DJSsOYBi5UFbvXFmfccq60NPUkveCyxVaxdtTCEMUwxJJy7dO2Y35CiU8cc4LgYS_1hqVaulsp953IAxEDEQNsGFKplzhiLn89bgVznfJMxCC1GVthkVofJqoMk7RtgqRWTwrsBLoJE5HDo6xuT4_skcj-2F_o-_mDCPPCK4b4WInsz9dP4mG9Q5w3IvuXDGskc8f-4k7D4Zs7vF2-_3Tv5w_340BPx89K8UT2pyP9L1_lLtz_xGWJu2mIYvMKcal9Wqvy5TOenfgXAAD__4wIkNs) ** Please don't wait - if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](https://email.editor.conservativebroadcast.net/c/eJyUkc2K2zAUhZ9G3sno39bCiySOs2mmZQrTpbiWrh0V2wqyktK3L4HpA8z245wDH-fX1V0hLnGb32DFzo8u7-6Gy33FMcdthq3ECUr6_dhL9E4woSlnlNtXjleh8xaFGlWFHW8Maxslpa1uneGBjRoYqoapyeiGI7DJSsOYBi5UFbvXFmfccq60NPUkveCyxVaxdtTCEMUwxJJy7dO2Y35CiU8cc4LgYS_1hqVaulsp953IAxEDEQNsGFKplzhiLn89bgVznfJMxCC1GVthkVofJqoMk7RtgqRWTwrsBLoJE5HDo6xuT4_skcj-2F_o-_mDCPPCK4b4WInsz9dP4mG9Q5w3IvuXDGskc8f-4k7D4Zs7vF2-_3Tv5w_340BPx89K8UT2pyP9L1_lLtz_xGWJu2mIYvMKcal9Wqvy5TOenfgXAAD__4wIkNs)
---
**Andy Ngo**
---
|
---
| | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- **they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. clean_body: I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs | | | | My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs. And unless we do something to stop them today, I won't be the last. I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019. This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before. I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their "protest." As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety. The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks. I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on. People like you needed to know what was happening. But I didn't go unnoticed for long. Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush. "F* you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!" Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles. Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects. I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger. The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn't have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you. That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law. Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury. Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day. I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved. Wrong. To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing. No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned. It's not much of a surprise, though. Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That's why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages - but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime. So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment. Unfortunately it's going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice. We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family. Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse - open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order. By any means necessary. Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem. And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They're doing it now against ICE. It's a sick strategy, but very smart - because so far, they've been successful. For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free. Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors! As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences. So now I'm taking justice into my own hands - with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty. Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger. This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't. This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe. And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver. By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. Please don't wait - if we don't fight back and win now, these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support. | | Sincerely, | | Andy Ngo | | | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. | | | The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. (C) The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | Pop Acta Media | Conservative Broadcast PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

### **1.[The politics of despair](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=44e21fd99a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Kyle Sammin_
There has always been loose talk of civil war in certain corners of the online media world. People who believe, for whatever reason, that America’s differences are too vast to bridge and that separation — even to the point of war — is the only solution.

After Donald Trump’s election in 2016, the tumult of Covid and the George Floyd riots, multiple attempts on Trump’s life in 2024, and now Charlie Kirk’s assassination, the would-be separatists are no longer laughing. And their numbers, on both sides, are growing.

We’ve counseled in these pages the need to [step back from the brink of destruction](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=97af4e4c05&e=b7b3eddce2), noting Abraham Lincoln’s appeal to “the better angels of our nature.” He spoke those words to a nation on the razor’s edge. A month later, the rebels fired on Fort Sumter and a bloody civil war began. We, in 2025, are not so far gone as all that. But it bears repeating that the lines between Democrat and Republican, liberal and conservative, left and right, must never be allowed to harden into the battle lines between friend and enemy.

**Why It Matters**. Opponents of liberal democracy have been spreading the seeds of that lie wherever they could for years now. While it once grew on the left alone, now it has found purchase on the right, as well. It is not surprising that this kind of thought has increased since Kirk’s death, because it is fundamentally a politics of secular despair.

Lincoln, again, shows the way. “We are not enemies, but friends,” he said in that same inaugural address. “We must not be enemies. Though passion may have strained it must not break our bonds of affection.”

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ea182ccee2&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Millcreek Township School District violated First Amendment by suing citizen, court says](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5e6979b079&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Beth Ann Rosica_
School districts are prohibited from suing citizens for defamation because it is considered a violation of the First Amendment. However, that didn’t stop a suburban Erie school district from trying — at the taxpayer’s expense.

Millcreek Township School District (MTSD), according to a former elected school director, is engaged in a five-year plus legal battle because it objected to his requests for information and comments he made publicly. The school board and superintendent first denied legitimate requests for information from this duly elected school director, and then investigated and censured him, removed him from committee, and silenced him at meetings when he attempted to speak as an elected official.

Ultimately, the school district sued, alleging “defamation” against both itself and the superintendent, despite the fact that school districts are [prohibited](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f184854b5b&e=b7b3eddce2) from bringing forth such actions based on a 1964 U.S. Supreme Court ruling.

**Why It Matters**. Millcreek used taxpayer dollars to fund both of these suits and alleged Aliota’s critical comments about the district and its superintendent were not protected under the First Amendment.
The district sued one of its own school board directors for engaging in free speech, protected under the First Amendment.

The school district’s response to these issues is hard to understand, and the legal advice from their attorneys is questionable.

The judge was unequivocal in his opinion that the board was wrong to bring forth the defamation suits. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7e0b177819&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Presler’s posthumous birthday present to Kirk: a Bucks early-vote drive](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fe0b401f6a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: Attack of the clones — Sherrill and Spanberger](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a97a792943&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: There’s no conflict in supporting capital punishment and being pro-life](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=89bac42788&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: My Q&A with Philadelphia District Attorney Larry Krasner](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fbea2a19da&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Ben Mannes: Dugan wins endorsements, Krasner sends out more grants](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=982b4e423f&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Emily Kreps: Judicial restraint on the line — PA Supreme Court retention and the Constitution](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=234818042b&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Ada Nestor: No Kings, just chaos](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1ccaf96bc6&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stew Bolno: No Kings Day, Trump, ‘fascism,’ and public protest](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c391705dc9&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. What we're reading**
The 2026 midterms are more than a year off, but some Pennsylvania Democrats are already making plans for 2028. Against Republicans? No, against one of their own. [Holly Otterbein at Axios reported this week](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=166e7038fa&e=b7b3eddce2) that “top Democrats in Pennsylvania are maneuvering to run against Sen. John Fetterman in a 2028 primary contest, threatening to tear the party apart in the biggest battleground state in the nation.”

We at _Broad + Liberty_ have certainly had our criticisms of Fetterman, but it smacks of bizarre hubris for Dems here to plot against a Senator with increasing cross-party appeal when they are losing voters statewide year after year. Well, good luck with all that.****
---
|
---
|
# **5\. More sports podcasts**
_On Pattison_ — a part of the Fideri News Network — is expanding into the podcast scene, with new offerings from veteran broadcaster **Mike Missanelli** , journalist **Anthony SanFilippo** , and many more. Read about them all [here](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=35818a66b0&e=b7b3eddce2).

body:
Although the iconography may fit right in at a No Kings rally, these signs and canvassers were part of the GOP’s insidious ploy to dupe Pennsylvania voters into removing their own justices.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mYpwvbyZ64R1qHwpAZ54hwoFnGKBnTxlvyTVgryLFBu7oBgF_qAmQJ5A7iQcJer_rHb9HL9YEehRHsr_HBO8jR9BMw04fPSsT7v12te6YelHQvdUw59XBcABClQFPYAulKXXdrCefsKxyJWUggqxq1tV9rw6_8QlcpidLPjMhiojptZCJuOQWBAYxJ0OHcbFoA-KqluC36bACn1MWKE6r0T8rKD7vbMncDf1aGkrE6s=&c=fgI_goAGiMSREPviwxcnBdpMKByDDHAnbs5TG4x5KlUBwwZaCj6v0w==&ch=NweBAd3-gh0wkJkjTvqu35qEavwOESDcM1npVfGsz5GdQYyVg9ZvZw==)

| Peter,
Yesterday millions of Americans took to the streets to participate in No Kings Rallies protesting Donald Trump.
In Pennsylvania, MAGA took advantage of these protests and used them to spread malicious disinformation to voters in the run up to the state's upcoming Supreme Court Retention election which will take place on November 4th.
The far-right is doing everything they can to take over this court because if they win here they can rig the vote in this critical swing state in 2026 and in 2028, pass an extreme abortion ban, and gerrymander the PA congressional map.
To secure a win they are spending tens of millions on ads and mailers intended to trick Democrats into voting no on retention (the GOP ballot choice). Yesterday we saw these tactics deployed against No Kings attendees across Pennsylvania:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001mYpwvbyZ64R1qHwpAZ54hwoFnGKBnTxlvyTVgryLFBu7oBgF_qAmQJ5A7iQcJer_rHb9HL9YEehRHsr_HBO8jR9BMw04fPSsT7v12te6YelHQvdUw59XBcABClQFPYAulKXXdrCefsKxyJWUggqxq1tV9rw6_8QlcpidLPjMhiojptZCJuOQWBAYxJ0OHcbFoA-KqluC36bACn1MWKE6rxUcYWtsgBVop7kP31ebvUo=&c=fgI_goAGiMSREPviwxcnBdpMKByDDHAnbs5TG4x5KlUBwwZaCj6v0w==&ch=NweBAd3-gh0wkJkjTvqu35qEavwOESDcM1npVfGsz5GdQYyVg9ZvZw==)
---
Voting no is the Republican ballot option in this race. These signs and canvassers were at these rallies to trick Democratic voters into supporting MAGA.
---
| | | | Although the iconography may fit right in at a No Kings rally, these signs and canvassers were part of the GOP's insidious ploy to dupe Pennsylvania voters into removing their own justices.
Because the November 4th ballot does not provide partisan information to help guide voters on whether a yes or no vote is the Republican or Democratic choice, the GOP is doubling down on tricking liberal voters into voting no.
Unfortunately, the GOP's efforts to poison the well is playing out exactly the way they've wanted it to. Polling released this past week showed that voters are deeply confused on whether to vote yes or no.
Defend Our Courts is pushing back and saturating our voters with ads and mailings to counteract the GOPs messaging push and assure voters that a YES vote is the right way for Democrats to vote here.
This election is just 16 days away and we need to supercharge our counter-disinformation efforts or we will lose this court to MAGA tricking our voters. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---
Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from YourCapitalMinds.com, an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. We appreciate your adherence to our intellectual property rights. If you require assistance, you can reach us via email at mailto:support@yourcapitalminds.com "support@yourcapitalminds.com". * * *
Tell the world you're standing for faith, family, and freedom. | | | | [](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4dsv9&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, _We are Charlie Kirk._ That's the rally cry of millions of Americans — and the message they carry with their "We are Charlie Kirk" wristbands.
---
[](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4dsv9&__onlt=h)
---
We want you to have one. To join the movement carrying Charlie's legacy forward. **When you give any amount today, we'll send you your wristband — a bold symbol of the mission we carry on.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4dsv9&__onlt=h)
---
This isn't just a wristband, Friend. It's a symbol. Of conviction.
Of courage.
Of the movement Charlie built. **When you wear it, you're telling the world you stand for America. For faith. For family. For freedom. And for the vision Charlie ignited.** Your donation fuels the next generation of leaders who will defend these values and never surrender. **Give today and we'll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://trk.thedcbugle.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4dsv9&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Charlie stood fearlessly for truth, freedom, and the next generation. _Now it's our turn._ Tell the world: You're unafraid to stand with Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA to save America. Make your first gift today and claim your wristband as a symbol of the mission you've joined.
---
**For Charlie,** The Turning Point USA Team
---

Peter, are you registered to vote? The deadline to register is tomorrow!

**_[Check your voter registration status here!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117571548/576927522/88266837?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251019_EN_VRDeadline_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_Tomorrow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDgxMDRjOS1mMWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjmvMnKNIrOErKKITvq8eyJK6XwoHqMsEB69gYg2dCA=&emci=698a9d75-a1ab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=048104c9-f1ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)_**

**_[Fill out the online voter registration form](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117571553/576927527/747805259?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251019_EN_VRDeadline_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_Tomorrow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDgxMDRjOS1mMWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjmvMnKNIrOErKKITvq8eyJK6XwoHqMsEB69gYg2dCA=&emci=698a9d75-a1ab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=048104c9-f1ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)_** (it just takes 10 minutes)
Or, download the paper application and **_[register in person at your county elections office](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117571558/576927531/-799781144?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251019_EN_VRDeadline_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_Tomorrow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDgxMDRjOS1mMWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjmvMnKNIrOErKKITvq8eyJK6XwoHqMsEB69gYg2dCA=&emci=698a9d75-a1ab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=048104c9-f1ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296#accordion-cdc8c772ae-item-4445679a1c)_**!

Will this November be your first time voting, or do you need a refresher on how to vote?
**_[Find out what you need on Election Day!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117571563/576927536/1766602680?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251019_EN_VRDeadline_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_Tomorrow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDgxMDRjOS1mMWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjmvMnKNIrOErKKITvq8eyJK6XwoHqMsEB69gYg2dCA=&emci=698a9d75-a1ab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=048104c9-f1ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)_**

Want to vote by mail-in or absentee ballot? **_[Make sure you’re on the list!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117571566/576927543/1431353034?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251019_EN_VRDeadline_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_Tomorrow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDgxMDRjOS1mMWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jjmvMnKNIrOErKKITvq8eyJK6XwoHqMsEB69gYg2dCA=&emci=698a9d75-a1ab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=048104c9-f1ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)_**
Don’t forget, the deadline for mail-in ballots is October 28th!

**If you are already registered, check in on your family members, friends, and neighbors and make sure they are registered to vote too!**

Together, we can break a voter turnout record in PA this November!

The way I look at it, we aren't just deciding Virginia's future this November.
_We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond._ By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable.
Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come.
That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. It's why Donald Trump keeps attacking me. _And it's why meeting our fundraising goals is so important._
But as I learned working cases at CIA and crafting laws at the U.S. Capitol, you're only as good as the team around you.
[_**Peter, can I count on you to contribute a small amount before midnight to help us win the biggest election of 2025? With the polls tightening, your $25 is urgently needed to turn out the voters who'll flip Virginia blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117571654/576927750/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU4MTA0YzktZjFhYy1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yc7DLnSnMGAYlSQbJTqyuPQdtmoZL8o-xIEafFjCJZ0=)

clean_body: More than 600,000 votes have now been cast in our race for Governor. Will you pitch in to help us win the biggest election of 2025? = Hi, Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. You're one of my top supporters, so I wanted to be the first to tell you: As of this morning, more than 600,000 votes have now been cast in our race for Governor. = If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = = = The way I look at it, we aren't just deciding Virginia's future this November. We're setting the tone for 2026, 2028, and beyond. By embracing a politics that puts Virginians first — not a president, not a party; by drawing on the powerful conversations I've had with thousands of Virginians; and by laying out a common-sense agenda, starting with a plan to make all of our lives more affordable. Our victory at the ballot box will pave the way for Democrats for years to come. That's why far-right Republicans have spent tens of millions of dollars against me. It's why Donald Trump keeps attacking me. And it's why meeting our fundraising goals is so important. But as I learned working cases at CIA and crafting laws at the U.S. Capitol, you're only as good as the team around you. = = = = = = = I'm honored by the trust you've placed in me, and I hope that you'll continue to follow our campaign from here until November 4th. Thank you for the continued support, Abigail Spanberger By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Donald Trump himself voted by mail in 2020, by the way. |
