| | Let’s get a few facts straight about mail voting:
* It’s one of the more secure, most accessible methods of casting a ballot.
* Millions of Americans rely on it.
* It’s essential for seniors, military families, disabled voters, and rural communities.
* Study after study shows fraud is virtually nonexistent.
* And Donald Trump himself voted by mail in 2020.

But now Trump has launched a crusade to ban mail voting as part of his attempt to restrict which Americans have a voice in our democracy: **“We as a Republican Party are going to do everything possible [to] get rid of mail-in ballots.” —Donald Trump** [**Fair Fight is doing everything we can to defend the freedom to vote, including protecting access to mail voting — will you make a contribution of $30 or any amount to help stop the MAGA GOP’s voter suppression?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117572378/576930155/1371676716?amount=30&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20251019_T1_TrumpMailInVotingNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2MzODU1Ny1mM2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HOkfLCGInt_8xjLPWz83whr2YP7QjTZRvQ3oKmOS5hc=) _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ | [Chip in $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117572379/576930158/1371676716?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20251019_T1_TrumpMailInVotingNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2MzODU1Ny1mM2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HOkfLCGInt_8xjLPWz83whr2YP7QjTZRvQ3oKmOS5hc=) | [Chip in $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117572382/576930159/1371676716?amount=25&express_lane=true&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20251019_T1_TrumpMailInVotingNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2MzODU1Ny1mM2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HOkfLCGInt_8xjLPWz83whr2YP7QjTZRvQ3oKmOS5hc=)

Republican extremists want to win elections by keeping voters they deem “undesirable” away from the ballot box. They place different obstacles in the process to try to prevent those Americans from voting.
And if elections don’t go their way, they can point back to the disinformation they spread about different voting methods to try to claim there’s been fraud. Exhibit A: Trump has told lies about so-called fraud to try to discredit mail voting ever since its widespread use in the presidential election that he lost.
**So we have to be ready to protect access to the ballot box, and we have to be able to promote trusted, accessible information about voting in the face of MAGA suppression and disinformation — but this work relies on grassroots support.**
[**Please pitch in any amount to help defend the freedom to vote and ensure free and fair elections.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117572387/576930180/1371676716?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20251019_T1_TrumpMailInVotingNOR_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1M2MzODU1Ny1mM2FjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HOkfLCGInt_8xjLPWz83whr2YP7QjTZRvQ3oKmOS5hc=)

clean_body: Donald Trump himself voted by mail in 2020, by the way. | | | Let’s get a few facts straight about mail voting: It’s one of the more secure, most accessible methods of casting a ballot. Millions of Americans rely on it. It’s essential for seniors, military families, disabled voters, and rural communities. Study after study shows fraud is virtually nonexistent. And Donald Trump himself voted by mail in 2020. But now Trump has launched a crusade to ban mail voting as part of his attempt to restrict which Americans have a voice in our democracy: “We as a Republican Party are going to do everything possible [to] get rid of mail-in ballots.” —Donald Trump = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Republican extremists want to win elections by keeping voters they deem “undesirable” away from the ballot box. They place different obstacles in the process to try to prevent those Americans from voting. And if elections don’t go their way, they can point back to the disinformation they spread about different voting methods to try to claim there’s been fraud. Exhibit A: Trump has told lies about so-called fraud to try to discredit mail voting ever since its widespread use in the presidential election that he lost. So we have to be ready to protect access to the ballot box, and we have to be able to promote trusted, accessible information about voting in the face of MAGA suppression and disinformation — but this work relies on grassroots support. = In solidarity, The Fair Fight Team = = | 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight - All rights reserved. name: SIGNATURE MISSING [VPP]
subject: Please don’t abandon Jane Fonda’s fight >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Trump is counting on Democrats sitting idly by.
| **Jane Fonda needs you in her fight!**

Trump will do anything to SILENCE her and other incredible Democrats taking a stand — but we won’t let him.

**That’s why we’re calling on YOU to co-sign the Committee for the First Amendment._Otherwise, we risk losing EVERYTHING._**

[**Please, add your name by your ONE-TIME extended midnight deadline »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251019_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=6&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym) | [SIGNATURE MISSING: CO-SIGN THE COMMITTEE FOR THE FIRST AMENDMENT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251019_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=7&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym)
---
Together,
The Voter Protection Project
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251019_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=8&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym) | [25,000 SIGNATURES NEEDED: CO-SIGN THE COMMITTEE FOR THE FIRST AMENDMENT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251019_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=9&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym)
---
80 years after McCarthyism, Trump and his MAGA mob are using the same tactics to scare and SILENCE anyone who disagrees with them.

**Jane Fonda is a Democratic HERO — so she needs YOU in her corner to fight back._Trump will do anything to stop her!_**

[**Will you join Jane Fonda’s movement to defend free speech and stand up to Trump by adding your signature now? »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251019_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=10&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym)
[SIGN: I SUPPORT THE FIRST AMENDMENT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251019_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=11&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym)
---
**_IF we sit idly by,_** Trump will ELIMINATE free speech and punish anyone who dares to speak out against his MAGA authoritarianism.

**_BUT IF we all band together,_** Trump doesn’t stand a CHANCE against our grassroots momentum — we can SAVE our democracy!

[**So please, SIGN NOW: Co-sign Jane Fonda’s Committee for the First Amendment »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251019_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=12&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym)
[SIGN: I SUPPORT THE FIRST AMENDMENT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fonda-committee?source=VPP_20251019_EMPET_E1_T0_NS_RS&t=13&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym)
---
Thank you for doing what’s right,

_The Voter Protection Project_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21524%2E878179%2E5oICym)

name: Horrible Supreme Court news (Fight For Reform)
subject: Republicans are ecstatic...
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23522%2E4449941%2Eu4jKow) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23522%2E4449941%2Eu4jKow) [**HORRIBLE BREAKING NEWS FROM THE SUPREME COURT:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69536?t=3&akid=23522%2E4449941%2Eu4jKow) | [**“Supreme Court agrees to hear Republican-backed effort to lift caps on campaign spending”**

_CNN_ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69536?t=4&akid=23522%2E4449941%2Eu4jKow) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69536?t=5&akid=23522%2E4449941%2Eu4jKow)
---|---

[SIGN NOW TO END _CITIZENS UNITED_ BEFORE THEY RUIN ALL OUR PROGRESS →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69536?t=6&akid=23522%2E4449941%2Eu4jKow)
---
Friend – this could change everything in a TERRIBLE WAY.

This case (backed by Vice President J.D. Vance) would allow BILLIONAIRE DONORS to drop TENS of thousands of dollars into party committees without any caps.

The Supreme Court has already ruled in FAVOR of _Citizens United_ and money in politics. So it’s never been so CRUCIAL that we show WIDESPREAD SUPPORT for getting money OUT of politics once and for all.

That’s why Amy Klobuchar is sounding the alarm:
[]()
[**So please Friend, before it’s too late: Sign to END _Citizens United_ and stop billionaire donors from rigging our elections →**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69536?t=7&akid=23522%2E4449941%2Eu4jKow)
[SIGN THE PETITION →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69536?t=8&akid=23522%2E4449941%2Eu4jKow)
---
Thanks,

_Fight for Reform_

clean_body: | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending Citizens United state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, | | ---|--- Friend – this could change everything in a TERRIBLE WAY. This case (backed by Vice President J.D. Vance) would allow BILLIONAIRE DONORS to drop TENS of thousands of dollars into party committees without any caps. The Supreme Court has already ruled in FAVOR of Citizens United and money in politics. So it’s never been so CRUCIAL that we show WIDESPREAD SUPPORT for getting money OUT of politics once and for all. clean_body: There’s no time to waste, we need to make up the difference NOW! | Friend - I've been in some tough situations before, but this could be the hardest mountain I'll have to climb... While I was barred from accepting any campaign donations during Virginia's legislative session, my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was RAKING IN hundreds of thousands of dollars! I'm not kidding - a liberal group gave Spanberger $500K all in one go, Friend! This is a BAD situation that will only get worse if folks like you don't step up to the plate! I'm coming to you with a plea from the bottom of my heart; I'm doing everything I can to win this race, make history, and keep logging conservative wins. But I know I can't do this all on my own; it's going to take all of us, and I really mean all of us , to win. If you can't afford to send in even just $17, I'll understand. That's right - all I 'm asking is that you send in $17 or more to help me catch up with my Democrat opponent's LUDICROUS fundraising numbers! Look, this race is tied. The ONLY thing holding me and my team back from winning right now is my liberal opponent's crazy cash advantage. I know we can close the gap and win this race together, but we need to get to work RIGHT NOW! Thank you for being a critical part of my team, Friend. I can't tell you how much I appreciate your support. -Winsome Earle-Sears Mother Marine Lt. Governor of Virginia I’m Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn’t over yet! It’s going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. ** | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Enemies within
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I believe fundamentally that every human being is worth fighting for, and that everybody deserves dignity and respect no matter what they believe.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1900%2E791427%2EgXRBS_)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct25.q9Ch2B&refcode=em251019-1-180&t=2&akid=1900%2E791427%2EgXRBS_)
Friend — Here’s a big difference between MAGA and me.
MAGA politicians proudly tell us every day that they hate their fellow Americans.
From the White House to Congress to Fox News, Trump and the people who keep him in power have made it clear that they don’t see the millions of Democratic or progressive voters in our country as fellow Americans who they happen to disagree with — **they see them as the enemies within.**
Just look at the way Trump is running the country. He’s weaponizing the justice department to go after Democratic elected officials. He’s using the National Guard to occupy and bully “Democrat cities” He’s using the government shutdown as an excuse to cut funding for “popular Democrat programs” that help millions of Americans. He labels peaceful protesters as “Antifa” and threatens to throw them in jail.
**My politics just couldn’t be more different.** I believe fundamentally that every human being is worth fighting for, and that everybody deserves dignity and respect no matter what they believe.
I want the Trump voter who tells me to go back to Somalia to have universal healthcare and a good-paying job.
I want the folks in deep red districts to enjoy the same affordable, safe, and rewarding life that I want for folks in deep blue districts.
Because I understand that it’s not the regular people who are left behind by the system who are the problem — it’s the system itself, which works everyday to pit working class Americans against each other while billionaires make away like bandits.
So Trump’s press secretary can call us “Hamas terrorists, illegal aliens, and violent criminals” all she wants. **It’s not going to stop me from going to Congress and fighting every day for the rights and futures of ALL Americans,** not just the ones I agree with or the ones who vote for me.
If you agree with my humanity-first vision for our country, **[please consider making a contribution today to help us continue to build our grassroots movement and bring Americans of all stripes together to fight for the working class.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-oct25.q9Ch2B&refcode=em251019-1-180&t=3&akid=1900%2E791427%2EgXRBS_)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_

---
****
| **[CHIP IN MORE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/13?c0=io-em-oct25.zG_BsN&refcode=em251019-1-180&t=5&akid=1900%2E791427%2EgXRBS_)**
---
****
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=1900%2E791427%2EgXRBS_)**. Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=8&akid=1900%2E791427%2EgXRBS_)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=9&refcode2=1900_791427_gXRBS_&akid=1900%2E791427%2EgXRBS_)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Toxic
subject: What MAGA did to these No Kings protestors is shocking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Although the iconography may fit right in at a No Kings rally, these signs and canvassers were part of the GOP’s insidious ploy to dupe Pennsylvania voters into removing their own justices.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K4nvTWKdDKrOt3DIFF_cAz9h2jcp35Q7c9XyzS5Rmg0_O9LvEzIYe8gP0U24ytTzCSDLP_dxb1NqPiJXEhvgI-hzbQzKJxE1lm_gOyBZH1-tKz9RwahMFMTDY2dA6vXvVc0sNY_B5oZOcsLpIXW_Bnv2lb8mQhjSiz_2rW8zpDhMV_fxrJ-T7QRy6nv6PTOSANPhfbOooG1xfuwSCeqOU0CbwomKZPlkkrhGP6S6AJTCndsGXXsPZQ==&c=UO52pl1WSurDyHp17gw0oFV3mzdo8hw2d3GD6IulUcv23iRSumYARQ==&ch=5auU6vO-jiTzEMelo5yF30HXvs1xRYpR_VRhvbeR7DUxa7NYBqQe0A==)
---
| Peter,
Yesterday millions of Americans took to the streets to participate in No Kings Rallies protesting Donald Trump.
In Pennsylvania, MAGA took advantage of these protests and used them to spread malicious disinformation to voters in the run up to the state's upcoming Supreme Court Retention election which will take place on November 4th.
The far-right is doing everything they can to take over this court because if they win here they can rig the vote in this critical swing state in 2026 and in 2028, pass an extreme abortion ban, and gerrymander the PA congressional map.
To secure a win they are spending tens of millions on ads and mailers intended to trick Democrats into voting no on retention (the GOP ballot choice). Yesterday we saw these tactics deployed against No Kings attendees across Pennsylvania:
---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K4nvTWKdDKrOt3DIFF_cAz9h2jcp35Q7c9XyzS5Rmg0_O9LvEzIYe8gP0U24ytTzCSDLP_dxb1NqPiJXEhvgI-hzbQzKJxE1lm_gOyBZH1-tKz9RwahMFMTDY2dA6vXvVc0sNY_B5oZOcsLpIXW_Bnv2lb8mQhjSiz_2rW8zpDhMV_fxrJ-T7QRy6nv6PTOSANPhfbOooG1xfuwSCeqOU0CbwomKZPlkB9B9fvE-qX8RtTU4qGi0tQ==&c=UO52pl1WSurDyHp17gw0oFV3mzdo8hw2d3GD6IulUcv23iRSumYARQ==&ch=5auU6vO-jiTzEMelo5yF30HXvs1xRYpR_VRhvbeR7DUxa7NYBqQe0A==)
---
Voting no is the Republican ballot option in this race. These signs and canvassers were at these rallies to trick Democratic voters into supporting MAGA.
---
| | | | Although the iconography may fit right in at a No Kings rally, these signs and canvassers were part of the GOP's insidious ploy to dupe Pennsylvania voters into removing their own justices.
Because the November 4th ballot does not provide partisan information to help guide voters on whether a yes or no vote is the Republican or Democratic choice, the GOP is doubling down on tricking liberal voters into voting no.
Unfortunately, the GOP's efforts to poison the well is playing out exactly the way they've wanted it to. Polling released this past week showed that voters are deeply confused on whether to vote yes or no.
Defend Our Courts is pushing back and saturating our voters with ads and mailings to counteract the GOPs messaging push and assure voters that a YES vote is the right way for Democrats to vote here.
This election is just 16 days away and we need to supercharge our counter-disinformation efforts or we will lose this court to MAGA tricking our voters. [Please can you rush a donation of $50, $25, or even $5, to help us ensure every Democrat targeted by disinformation hears that a yes vote is the only way to protect this court.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001K4nvTWKdDKrOt3DIFF_cAz9h2jcp35Q7c9XyzS5Rmg0_O9LvEzIYe8gP0U24ytTzCSDLP_dxb1NqPiJXEhvgI-hzbQzKJxE1lm_gOyBZH1-tKz9RwahMFMTDY2dA6vXvVc0sNY_B5oZOcsLpIXW_Bnv2lb8mQhjSiz_2rW8zpDhMV_fxrJ-T7QRy6nv6PTOSANPhfbOooG1xfuwSCeqOU0CbwomKZPlkE1udMVDca1B4L28kp-g4Vw==&c=UO52pl1WSurDyHp17gw0oFV3mzdo8hw2d3GD6IulUcv23iRSumYARQ==&ch=5auU6vO-jiTzEMelo5yF30HXvs1xRYpR_VRhvbeR7DUxa7NYBqQe0A==)

clean_body: Although the iconography may fit right in at a No Kings rally, these signs and canvassers were part of the GOP’s insidious ploy to dupe Pennsylvania voters into removing their own justices. | | | | | == | Peter, Yesterday millions of Americans took to the streets to participate in No Kings Rallies protesting Donald Trump. In Pennsylvania, MAGA took advantage of these protests and used them to spread malicious disinformation to voters in the run up to the state's upcoming Supreme Court Retention election which will take place on November 4th. The far-right is doing everything they can to take over this court because if they win here they can rig the vote in this critical swing state in 2026 and in 2028, pass an extreme abortion ban, and gerrymander the PA congressional map. To secure a win they are spending tens of millions on ads and mailers intended to trick Democrats into voting no on retention (the GOP ballot choice). Yesterday we saw these tactics deployed against No Kings attendees across Pennsylvania: | == Voting no is the Republican ballot option in this race. These signs and canvassers were at these rallies to trick Democratic voters into supporting MAGA. | | | | Although the iconography may fit right in at a No Kings rally, these signs and canvassers were part of the GOP's insidious ploy to dupe Pennsylvania voters into removing their own justices. Because the November 4th ballot does not provide partisan information to help guide voters on whether a yes or no vote is the Republican or Democratic choice, the GOP is doubling down on tricking liberal voters into voting no. Unfortunately, the GOP's efforts to poison the well is playing out exactly the way they've wanted it to. Polling released this past week showed that voters are deeply confused on whether to vote yes or no. Defend Our Courts is pushing back and saturating our voters with ads and mailings to counteract the GOPs messaging push and assure voters that a YES vote is the right way for Democrats to vote here. This election is just 16 days away and we need to supercharge our counter-disinformation efforts or we will lose this court to MAGA tricking our voters. == | | | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == Pennsylvania needs you now. Thank you in advance for your support. Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. name: Jon Ossoff for U.S. Senate
subject: An important update for everyone who cares about Georgia’s U.S. Senate race.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

**You deserve an explanation.**
**It is Sunday, October 19th, and we’re sharing an important update for everyone who cares about Georgia’s U.S. Senate race.**
Please don’t skip this quick but important request. _Today, we’re asking you to give $5.75 to reelect Jon Ossoff._ If you believe Trump and his administration pose an existential threat to our Republic, we hope that means reelecting Jon and taking back control of Congress is worth at least $5.75 to you.
Many people give because they want to stop a MAGA takeover in Georgia. Others, because they see the good work Jon is doing in the Senate, and want to see that work continue. If you feel the same, please add your $5.75 today. _Thank you._

**Please donate any amount that feels right to you.** Our average online donation is about $27. Many first-time donors give just $5.75. The most important thing isn’t the amount of the donation, it’s that you’re chipping in to support Jon at this important point in the race. _Thank you again._
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $5.75](https://act.electjon.com/go/2716?c0=ossoff-em-oct25.zMsr2W&refcode=em251018-1-subs-b&t=1&akid=948%2E5691347%2ES9kIN0)**

****

### About Seth Moulton

name: Mamdani Victory via Our Revolution
subject: Billionaires are flooding the airwaves in these final days - help us elect Mamdani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1011&refcode=email-20251019_v&akid=9635%2E5885482%2EOB0rfC ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Pro-Trump hedge fund billionaire Bill Ackman just dumped a staggering $1
million into a super PAC with one goal only: to stop Zohran Mamdani from
becoming New York City’s next mayor.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?source=email-20251019&t=1060&akid=9635%2E5885482%2EOB0rfC ]Pro-Trump billionaire Bill Ackman gives $1M to anti-Mamdani effort

We knew Wall Street would panic as voters rallied behind Mamdani’s
powerful movement to create a NYC for the working people, not a playground
for the wealthy. But $1 million, overnight, in attack ads and negativity
in the final days of the campaign? That’s a new level of billionaire
meddling.

Our Revolution is hitting the streets to counteract this flood of money
with real conversations with as many voters as possible. Our canvassing
WORKS to move and turnout voters – but we need to quickly scale up in
these final days.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251019nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9635%2E5885482%2EOB0rfC ]Rush a donation now to help Our Revolution fight back against the
billionaires’ dirty money and fuel Mamdani’s people-powered movement all
the way to Election Day:

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251019nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9635%2E5885482%2EOB0rfC ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251019nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9635%2E5885482%2EOB0rfC ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251019nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9635%2E5885482%2EOB0rfC ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20251019nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9635%2E5885482%2EOB0rfC ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Our incredible volunteers have been meeting voters door-to-door, from
Sunset Park to Harlem. We’ve mobilized hundreds of volunteers to canvass,
phone bank, and get out the vote. We’re hearing over and over that NYC
needs a mayor who will fight for rent control, public transit, and an
affordable city for New Yorkers – and over and over again, our
conversations are moving voters from “undecided” to “yes.”

But now, anti-Mamdani super PACs, fueled by Ackman’s fortune, are
blanketing the airwaves and flooding social media and mailboxes with
last-minute attack ads. And the polls are tightening as dirty money pours
in.

With less than 21 DAYS left, we need to double down NOW to counteract this
Big Money interference. While we know that attack ads are no substitute
for real conversations and organizing, the truth is we can’t compete with
Wall Street’s deep pockets without urgent help from supporters like you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/33691?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251019nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9635%2E5885482%2EOB0rfC ]If 500 supporters donate $20 each, we can expand our canvassing operations
and reach even more voters by phone and text. And if you can give more, we
can push even harder. Chip in now to fight back against Bill Ackman’s $1
million Super PAC blitz and power Our Revolution’s ground game for Zohran
Mamdani ASAP.

When we organize, we win.

name: James Talarico
subject: Call time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
I want to pull back the curtain on how most politicians running for the U.S. Senate raise money.
Most Senate candidates — in both parties — start their campaigns locked in windowless rooms doing “call time.”
They don’t do big public events. They don’t invest early in on-the-ground organizing. Instead, they spend hours on the phone calling mega-donors to ask for thousands of dollars at a time.
It’s soul sucking. But that’s what most DC consultants and party establishment operatives tell you is required to win.
We’re throwing out that playbook. Yes, we’ll need to raise money — but it doesn’t have to be at the expense of talking to the Texans we seek to represent.
That’s why we’re investing in a grassroots campaign.
Folks like you power this movement. We’re not beholden to billionaires and corporate interests.
I’m betting that if we run a campaign people can believe in — one that breaks the rules and puts people first — folks will do their part to ensure we have the resources to win.
[**If you agree that this is the right way to run a campaign, I hope you will consider donating to support our movement today. Every dollar helps keep me on the road meeting Texans.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251019-1-ak&t=1&akid=179%2E1347274%2EzJV6jy)

name: Laura Gillen
subject: 2,900 pages of racist, antisemitic, and homophobic messages
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
This is the direction today’s GOP is heading: more hate, more division, and more dangerous extremism.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117576739/576944208/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-10-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmZhYjRiZC1mYWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_NGMMuz6ajBR00mzpq1VMUZn8_swYPASgLUnMqSuFk=)
---
| Peter,

_Politico_ uncovered 2,900 pages of racist, antisemitic, and homophobic messages exchanged by top leaders in the Young Republicans, including many here in New York.

They joked about gas chambers. They glorified Hitler and the Nazis. They used racial slurs over and over again.

And here’s the worst part: these extremists weren’t operating on the fringes of the New York Republican Party. They were endorsed and celebrated by people like Anthony D’Esposito and Elise Stefanik— one of the most powerful Republicans in Congress and likely candidate for governor in New York.

This is the direction today’s GOP is heading: more hate, more division, and more dangerous extremism.

New Yorkers deserve better. We deserve leaders who reject hate, not enable it.

[_**If you agree, I need you to stand with me today. Chip in whatever you can to help us defeat this brand of extremism and defend decency, dignity, and democracy.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117576740/576944209/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-10-19_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYmZhYjRiZC1mYWFjLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_NGMMuz6ajBR00mzpq1VMUZn8_swYPASgLUnMqSuFk=)

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

| | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492

Not more difficult. Impossible. This is Congresswoman Sharice Davids from Kansas’ 3rd Congressional district — and Donald Trump has made it his number one priority to gerrymander me out of office. [But Peter, I didn’t flip this seat from red to blue by running scared when the going got tough, and I’m not going to start now. I’m more energized than ever to defend this seat — and our democracy — from the far-right, but I need you standing with me to do it. Will you split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action before midnight?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2907a92a-611a-43ec-bcd1-ddef73375e94/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| There’s a pretty obvious reason why Donald Trump wants me out of Congress: I don’t fit his mold of what a “Kansas politician” should look like. And Peter, he’s right. I do stand out in Washington — and I’m proud of it. I’m the first LGBTQ+ Native American woman ever elected to Congress. I was raised by a single Army mom, paid my own way through college, and even had a career as an MMA fighter before I ran for elected office. Maybe that background doesn’t make me a “typical” politician. But I think that’s a good thing. But Donald Trump disagrees. Instead, he wants to end all competitive Congressional elections in Kansas and install a hand-picked, far-right extremist in my place. [Kansas Republicans know they can’t win my district here in Kansas unless they cheat, so they’re trying to stack the deck and pray that we won’t notice. That’s why I need your help. Can you chip in a split donation right away to help me and Blue Amp Action keep fighting back against this partisan power grab while we still have the chance?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T876567bd-5f53-4cee-a53e-4f4776edb9b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: The Democratic National Committee
subject: UPDATE: DNC ramps up crackdown on scam PACs
body:
---
**Scoop: DNC ramps up crackdown on alleged “scam PACs”**
— Axios The DNC is taking action against bad actors who are trying to exploit grassroots donors. Derek, If you're anything like us, your inbox and text messages are filled with campaigns and organizations asking for donations. We wish that all of these groups were spending your hard-earned money to help elect Democrats. But the sad reality is that some of them tell you your donation is going to help elect Democrats, when _really they’re just keeping the money for themselves._ **So the DNC is taking action.** Earlier this week, we sent a cease-and-desist letter and worked with ActBlue to de-platform a PAC that is claiming to “help brave Democrats and fuel the fight nationwide.” The PAC has raised over _half a million dollars_ in the last year — solicited primarily through misleading text messages — but has spent less than $10,000 in support of or opposition to any political candidate. That’s less than 2% of their total raise. It’s completely unethical, Derek. And we’re going to keep working to root out bad actors like these. When you choose to chip in your hard-earned money to an organization or campaign, we know that’s a decision you don’t make lightly. You deserve to know that your contribution is actually going toward electing Democrats. You’re not an ATM, and you don’t deserve to be treated like one. **Here at the DNC, we will keep working to hold bad actors in this space accountable, and we will continue to be upfront with you about where your contributions go. Today, a donation will go towards funding our on-the-ground organizing work to win upcoming elections in states like Virginia, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and California.** [**If work like this matters to you and you’re in a position to give, we’d appreciate your support at this link.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251019_4927_fr&refcode2=4944_22930333_VQtHqA&akid=4944%2E22930333%2EVQtHqA) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251019_4927_fr&refcode2=4944_22930333_VQtHqA&akid=4944%2E22930333%2EVQtHqA)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-october-2025?refcode=em_20251019_4927_fr&refcode2=4944_22930333_VQtHqA&akid=4944%2E22930333%2EVQtHqA)**
---
****
Thank you for everything you’re doing and we’ll keep you updated,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

# Hello Capitalists,
In a new section for The Capitalist, **" Do Your Own Research"** breaks down financial subjects to equip our readers with the knowledge to make better financial decisions in their lives.
A lot of this stuff can seem complicated and secretly we all wish we were way more financially literate than we are, and know more than we do, so thats where **" Do Your Own Research"** will come to the rescue.
* _**Full disclosure: This is not financial advice. (We aren 't going to be telling you to buy anything.)**_

Our aim is simply to break down a new subject every week clearly and in plain english, and in a few minutes reading on a Sunday (over a coffee or a beer?) leave you, our loyal readers, smarter and more knowledgable than you were before.
In the coming weeks we will cover stock trading, investing, options, shorting, bonds, and many other subjects and **if there is something you want us to cover, let us know in the comments.**
So pour a coffee or grab a beer and let's dive in to our first subject, which is something something we've all heard about:
## **401Ks**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9a4c3541-4879-40c7-8f11-f88a7396b422?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In the summer of 2023, "Maria," a 32-year-old teacher in Ohio, sat down with a financial advisor for the first time. She had just received a modest raise, but her savings account, dutifully fed each month, wasn't growing fast enough to ease her anxiety about retirement. "I keep hearing about 401(k)s," she said, "but it feels like a black box."
"Maria's" uncertainty is not unique. For millions of Americans, the 401(k) is both a cornerstone of financial planning and a source of confusion--a system that promises security but demands navigation through a labyrinth of choices, risks, and fine print. As wealth inequality widens and Social Security's future grows uncertain, the 401(k) has become a critical, if imperfect, tool for securing a stable retirement. But what exactly is it, and why does it matter?
* * *
* * *
**[In Partnership With Freespoke](https://substack.com/redirect/aaadb5d4-6e19-43df-9a21-cb2fb66523fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aaadb5d4-6e19-43df-9a21-cb2fb66523fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
# [Is Your News Lying to You? ](https://substack.com/redirect/aaadb5d4-6e19-43df-9a21-cb2fb66523fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### [Discover the Truth with Freespoke](https://substack.com/redirect/aaadb5d4-6e19-43df-9a21-cb2fb66523fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
In today's media world, misinformation spreads faster than markets can react. One minute you're reading about 401(k) changes, the next you're wondering if China's rare earth metals exports are really the key to America's future, or just another hype cycle.
**[That's where Freespoke comes in.](https://substack.com/redirect/aaadb5d4-6e19-43df-9a21-cb2fb66523fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Freespoke helps you separate truth from misinformation. With one tap, you'll see the full picture with what experts agree on, where they differ, and what's being overlooked. It even surfaces answers from publishers you trust, like The Capitalist, so you can know what's reliable.
It's anonymous, clean, and uncensored. **No tracking.** **No data harvesting.** Just truthful information.
Whether you're fact-checking a viral investing claim, researching energy trends, or trying to understand what's really happening with your retirement, Freespoke helps you ask smarter questions and get full truth answers.
**[As an exclusive for The Capitalist readers: Get 35% off Freespoke Premium with code cap35.](https://substack.com/redirect/aaadb5d4-6e19-43df-9a21-cb2fb66523fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Premium gives you ad-free browsing (no more creepy Big Tech trackers), unlimited AI summaries that break down complex financial question in seconds, and searchable podcast transcripts that pull truth straight from the experts.
If you want the truth, download the free app today and see what's really going on.
[Download the Free App](https://substack.com/redirect/aaadb5d4-6e19-43df-9a21-cb2fb66523fe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
A 401(k) is a tax-advantaged retirement savings plan offered by employers, named after a section of the U.S. Internal Revenue Code. Employees can contribute a portion of their **pre-tax income** to the plan, which is then invested in assets like stocks, bonds, or mutual funds. The money grows **tax-deferred** until withdrawal, typically after age 591⁄2, when it's **taxed as income**. According to the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, **[67% of private-sector workers had access to a 401(k) or similar plan in 2023](https://substack.com/redirect/af2545b3-af40-4f01-9154-734b6bc2c1cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ,** _but only 50% participated_ , often due to confusion or financial constraints. The system's complexity--coupled with its centrality to retirement planning--makes understanding its mechanics essential.
**Types of 401(k)s: Choices Within Choices**
Not all 401(k)s are created equal. The two primary types are **Traditional** and **Roth** 401(k)s, each with distinct tax implications.
* In a traditional 401(k), contributions reduce your taxable income now, but withdrawals in retirement are taxed.
* A Roth 401(k), by contrast, is funded with **after-tax dollars** , but its **withdrawals are tax-free** if certain conditions are met.

According to a 2024 Vanguard report, **[14% of 401(k) plans offered a Roth option in 2023](https://substack.com/redirect/1b13c721-2e8f-44cd-9de6-181f342ca71a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ,** up from just 5% a decade ago, reflecting growing interest in tax-free retirement income. Some employers offer both, allowing employees to split contributions based on their financial goals.
Other variations exist, like the SIMPLE 401(k) for small businesses and the Safe Harbor 401(k), which mandates employer contributions but simplifies compliance. Each type requires employees to weigh trade-offs--tax benefits now versus later, flexibility versus structure--making informed decisions critical.
**401(k) vs. Savings Accounts: A Study in Trade-offs**
Unlike a 401(k), a traditional savings account offers **no tax advantages** and typically yields minimal interest--often less than 1% annually, **[per the FDIC's 2025 data](https://substack.com/redirect/69d655b3-7669-4cf8-aa81-79933665b42f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. High-yield savings accounts fare better, with **rates around 4 -5%** in 2025, but they still lag behind the long-term average return of 401(k) investments, which hover **around 7% annually** before fees, **[according to historical S&P 500 data](https://substack.com/redirect/7c09c1b1-c137-4fbd-93a8-b56cf712b740?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
* Savings accounts offer liquidity--you can withdraw funds anytime without penalty--but lack the growth potential of 401(k)s.
* Conversely, 401(k) funds are locked until retirement (with exceptions like hardship withdrawals), and early withdrawals before 591⁄2 incur a 10% penalty plus taxes.

The choice isn't binary. A savings account provides a safety net for emergencies, while a 401(k) is a long-term wealth-building tool. "Maria," for instance, could keep three months' expenses in a high-yield savings account but directs her raise to her 401(k) for future growth.
**The Employer Match: Free Money with Strings**
One of the 401(k)'s most attractive features is the **employer match** , where companies contribute to an employee's plan, often **matching contributions** up to a percentage of salary. For example, a common match is 50 cents for every dollar contributed, up to 6% of an employee's salary. This "free money" is a powerful incentive, but it often comes with vesting schedules--rules requiring employees to stay with the company for a set period before fully owning the matched funds.
**Where to Get a 401(k)**
A 401(k) is typically offered through an employer, with providers like Fidelity or Vanguard managing the investments. Self-employed individuals can open **[a Solo 401(k)](https://substack.com/redirect/44d9a463-13d1-41ab-ad63-2d66643642a1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** through financial institutions. Not all employers offer 401(k)s, particularly small businesses, leaving workers without access. For those without employer plans, alternatives like IRAs exist, but they lack the employer match and have lower contribution limits.
**The Upsides: Why Invest?**
The 401(k)'s appeal lies in its **tax advantages** and growth potential. Contributions **reduce taxable income** , potentially saving thousands annually. A 30-year-old contributing $5,000 a year at a 7% return could amass over $500,000 by 65, **[per compound interest calculators](https://substack.com/redirect/7a0f7579-30ab-4f7e-b408-2b83eb4df735?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. The employer match amplifies this, and diversified investments mitigate risk over time. For many, like "Maria," it's a hedge against an **[uncertain future](https://substack.com/redirect/d0bec720-f55c-4c51-8851-0626cc9a607e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** where Social Security may cover only 40% of pre-retirement income.
**The Risks: Proceed with Caution**
Yet, the 401(k) isn't a panacea. High fees--sometimes exceeding 1% annually--can erode returns, with a 1% fee reducing a nest egg by 28% over 35 years, **[per the SEC](https://substack.com/redirect/eafb3861-c263-45db-a807-788eff06adc1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Market volatility poses risks, as seen in 2008 when 401(k) balances dropped 20-40%. Over-investing in a single stock, like one's employer out of loyalty or dedication, can be catastrophic if the company falters (Enron, Bear Sterns etc). Early withdrawals, penalties, and loan provisions (available in some plans) tempt short-term thinking, undermining long-term goals. And not all plans are equal--some offer limited investment options or high-cost funds.
**A Fragile Lifeline**
"Maria's" journey into the 401(k) maze reflects a broader truth: the system empowers those who navigate it wisely but punishes the uninformed. As wealth concentrates and retirement costs rise, the 401(k) remains a critical, if flawed, tool. Its tax benefits and employer matches offer a path to security, but fees, market risks, and access gaps demand vigilance.

This has been **" Do Your Own Research,"** we hope this was useful and we'll see you next week. Don't forget, if you have an idea for a topic you want us to cover, let us know in the comments.
* * *

clean_body: A Lifeline for the American Dream? | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? A Lifeline for the American Dream? | | | Oct 19 | | | | | | | | | | | | Hello Capitalists, In a new section for The Capitalist, " Do Your Own Research" breaks down financial subjects to equip our readers with the knowledge to make better financial decisions in their lives. A lot of this stuff can seem complicated and secretly we all wish we were way more financially literate than we are, and know more than we do, so thats where " Do Your Own Research" will come to the rescue. Full disclosure: This is not financial advice. (We aren 't going to be telling you to buy anything.) Our aim is simply to break down a new subject every week clearly and in plain english, and in a few minutes reading on a Sunday (over a coffee or a beer?) leave you, our loyal readers, smarter and more knowledgable than you were before. In the coming weeks we will cover stock trading, investing, options, shorting, bonds, and many other subjects and if there is something you want us to cover, let us know in the comments. So pour a coffee or grab a beer and let's dive in to our first subject, which is something something we've all heard about: 401Ks | | ---|---|--- In the summer of 2023, "Maria," a 32-year-old teacher in Ohio, sat down with a financial advisor for the first time. She had just received a modest raise, but her savings account, dutifully fed each month, wasn't growing fast enough to ease her anxiety about retirement. "I keep hearing about 401(k)s," she said, "but it feels like a black box." "Maria's" uncertainty is not unique. For millions of Americans, the 401(k) is both a cornerstone of financial planning and a source of confusion--a system that promises security but demands navigation through a labyrinth of choices, risks, and fine print. As wealth inequality widens and Social Security's future grows uncertain, the 401(k) has become a critical, if imperfect, tool for securing a stable retirement. But what exactly is it, and why does it matter? | | ---|---|--- In today's media world, misinformation spreads faster than markets can react. One minute you're reading about 401(k) changes, the next you're wondering if China's rare earth metals exports are really the key to America's future, or just another hype cycle. Freespoke helps you separate truth from misinformation. With one tap, you'll see the full picture with what experts agree on, where they differ, and what's being overlooked. It even surfaces answers from publishers you trust, like The Capitalist, so you can know what's reliable. It's anonymous, clean, and uncensored. No tracking. No data harvesting. Just truthful information. Whether you're fact-checking a viral investing claim, researching energy trends, or trying to understand what's really happening with your retirement, Freespoke helps you ask smarter questions and get full truth answers. Premium gives you ad-free browsing (no more creepy Big Tech trackers), unlimited AI summaries that break down complex financial question in seconds, and searchable podcast transcripts that pull truth straight from the experts. If you want the truth, download the free app today and see what's really going on. A 401(k) is a tax-advantaged retirement savings plan offered by employers, named after a section of the U.S. Internal Revenue Code. Employees can contribute a portion of their pre-tax income to the plan, which is then invested in assets like stocks, bonds, or mutual funds. The money grows tax-deferred until withdrawal, typically after age 591⁄2, when it's taxed as income. According to the U.S. Bureau of Labor Statistics, , but only 50% participated , often due to confusion or financial constraints. The system's complexity--coupled with its centrality to retirement planning--makes understanding its mechanics essential. Types of 401(k)s: Choices Within Choices Not all 401(k)s are created equal. The two primary types are Traditional and Roth 401(k)s, each with distinct tax implications. In a traditional 401(k), contributions reduce your taxable income now, but withdrawals in retirement are taxed. A Roth 401(k), by contrast, is funded with after-tax dollars , but its withdrawals are tax-free if certain conditions are met. According to a 2024 Vanguard report, , up from just 5% a decade ago, reflecting growing interest in tax-free retirement income. Some employers offer both, allowing employees to split contributions based on their financial goals. Other variations exist, like the SIMPLE 401(k) for small businesses and the Safe Harbor 401(k), which mandates employer contributions but simplifies compliance. Each type requires employees to weigh trade-offs--tax benefits now versus later, flexibility versus structure--making informed decisions critical. 401(k) vs. Savings Accounts: A Study in Trade-offs Unlike a 401(k), a traditional savings account offers no tax advantages and typically yields minimal interest--often less than 1% annually, . High-yield savings accounts fare better, with rates around 4 -5% in 2025, but they still lag behind the long-term average return of 401(k) investments, which hover around 7% annually before fees, . Savings accounts offer liquidity--you can withdraw funds anytime without penalty--but lack the growth potential of 401(k)s. Conversely, 401(k) funds are locked until retirement (with exceptions like hardship withdrawals), and early withdrawals before 591⁄2 incur a 10% penalty plus taxes. The choice isn't binary. A savings account provides a safety net for emergencies, while a 401(k) is a long-term wealth-building tool. "Maria," for instance, could keep three months' expenses in a high-yield savings account but directs her raise to her 401(k) for future growth. The Employer Match: Free Money with Strings One of the 401(k)'s most attractive features is the employer match , where companies contribute to an employee's plan, often matching contributions up to a percentage of salary. For example, a common match is 50 cents for every dollar contributed, up to 6% of an employee's salary. This "free money" is a powerful incentive, but it often comes with vesting schedules--rules requiring employees to stay with the company for a set period before fully owning the matched funds. Where to Get a 401(k) A 401(k) is typically offered through an employer, with providers like Fidelity or Vanguard managing the investments. Self-employed individuals can open through financial institutions. Not all employers offer 401(k)s, particularly small businesses, leaving workers without access. For those without employer plans, alternatives like IRAs exist, but they lack the employer match and have lower contribution limits. The Upsides: Why Invest? The 401(k)'s appeal lies in its tax advantages and growth potential. Contributions reduce taxable income , potentially saving thousands annually. A 30-year-old contributing $5,000 a year at a 7% return could amass over $500,000 by 65, . The employer match amplifies this, and diversified investments mitigate risk over time. For many, like "Maria," it's a hedge against an where Social Security may cover only 40% of pre-retirement income. The Risks: Proceed with Caution Yet, the 401(k) isn't a panacea. High fees--sometimes exceeding 1% annually--can erode returns, with a 1% fee reducing a nest egg by 28% over 35 years, . Market volatility poses risks, as seen in 2008 when 401(k) balances dropped 20-40%. Over-investing in a single stock, like one's employer out of loyalty or dedication, can be catastrophic if the company falters (Enron, Bear Sterns etc). Early withdrawals, penalties, and loan provisions (available in some plans) tempt short-term thinking, undermining long-term goals. And not all plans are equal--some offer limited investment options or high-cost funds. A Fragile Lifeline "Maria's" journey into the 401(k) maze reflects a broader truth: the system empowers those who navigate it wisely but punishes the uninformed. As wealth concentrates and retirement costs rise, the 401(k) remains a critical, if flawed, tool. Its tax benefits and employer matches offer a path to security, but fees, market risks, and access gaps demand vigilance. This has been " Do Your Own Research," we hope this was useful and we'll see you next week. Don't forget, if you have an idea for a topic you want us to cover, let us know in the comments. * The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication You're currently a free subscriber to . Patriot,

When I first met Charlie Kirk, it was instantly clear to me that he was destined to do great things.

We became fast friends.

---

Turning Point USA was still in its infancy, but there was no doubt in my mind that, with Charlie's indomitable spirit and vision, Turning Point would transform the conservative movement and the country as a whole.

Fast forward 11 years, and the political landscape has, indeed, changed, thanks to Charlie's bold leadership.

In 2024, Charlie won the youth vote for President Trump... an unprecedented accomplishment.

**It 's been one month since Charlie Kirk's assassination.**

And, while no one can truly replace him, I know -- without a shadow of a doubt -- that he would want us to continue the fight for the heart and soul of America in his stead.

And that's exactly what I plan to do... win for Charlie.

At Turning Point PAC, we have not lost sight of **Charlie 's big picture vision to Build the RED WALL**, starting with state and local races in Arizona, New Hampshire, and Nevada, the three battleground states where _conservatives outnumber Democrats_.

By focusing on these states, we can build an impenetrable Red Wall that will destroy the Democrats' plans and pave the way to victory for America First candidates in 2026, 2028, and beyond.

Every seat won -- up and down the ballot -- is a victory that will reap long-term dividends.

**So, today I ask:** _Will you help me carry the torch for Charlie?_

[ Please donate whatever you can generously afford today to WIN in key battleground states. We will stand FEARLESS, like Charlie did, in defense of what we know is RIGHT! >> ](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=7d796eec91604109a48b87b5e2ade9cf&_e=z8UgZD5PgPhdq2La86RcBVG5ahDmsffeYTmmutbogAjrp-yMZjDQUXpyzqHfY0-o86EcbiJfnjTkmLX100cVKDZOUzufMd00CVe0Ygp795CdySeuibSY8ZpGPV15BO3JeKXXFGoKxDiFg8sSEcH0RYDJ-0GhdXvcK2C5xJiAGIrrEu7p11im8bZiwFTDYWa2cpHGaQ5iUO6y0p0pLcEsD3eWu73KUgj5iOcuE2PZVdPeLlcVIG0vPHHT3BxmPVDiRMfJI2J2CQvrND6OXyWGfdIgPverH53WcE_bmA_OOvvzC1hz5uF9q3phoB02_W_eCX0iJPEfneTh0VkmypLpFxm_qcGCJRAoSfzdKe-oEuMgFJHB6LRjZg0uHznxYdtGiLKYWHjgQfHUtYn3efJIDt2zii_E0qtX6BL7GnwaU-QeclSAPfqgb6ayMN1ToVE4ks5Qe8BPDshHMm3N4vzaYQH_nAMRdO69NcvYVO2xcGnz27P5htXFjYLqoWZf112DbkRFbhjQ0XSSZgjFyk87_kjdMqarVLClf8UQa9WT40KjQs_4s3S88hlzUw6qmu57Z45B4IreWgc_1g2coVc_DdRmMNoEqm-3l3sh3VRNSIA%3D)

Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.'s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

# [US-Colombia Relations Deteriorate](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=176557844&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NTU3ODQ0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjA4ODY5MzksImV4cCI6MTc2MzQ3ODkzOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.T8fSZJ4AnklC43YymxHzU2IiPcffzvB_jGp-IUTd0T8)
### Tensions escalate as dogmatic socialist Gustavo Petro picks a fight with Trump.
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---
| Oct 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@mansharamani)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=176557844&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NTU3ODQ0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MDg4NjkzOSwiZXhwIjoxNzYzNDc4OTM5LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTY2MTk5OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.4znoV4PCH1s6ZwEE8j1o2cdIU3bRldxOdxPWuTij9t8&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=176557844&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NTU3ODQ0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjA4ODY5MzksImV4cCI6MTc2MzQ3ODkzOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.T8fSZJ4AnklC43YymxHzU2IiPcffzvB_jGp-IUTd0T8&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1661999&post_id=176557844&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2NTU3ODQ0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjA4ODY5MzksImV4cCI6MTc2MzQ3ODkzOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE2NjE5OTkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.T8fSZJ4AnklC43YymxHzU2IiPcffzvB_jGp-IUTd0T8)
---
| | [](https://substack..-fKY7ORQWPGSz5ywXMFPl5BHSo4NSGV_mIIxXcgLX2s?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mansharamani/p/us-colombia-relations-deteriorate?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/829220ae-a6a0-47ac-ac98-75897ae032cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I recently returned from a trip to Colombia where I had the chance to speak with the country's business and political leaders and share my thoughts on global trends, the ongoing trade war, and America's re-emerging interest in their part of the world. In preparation for my speech at the [#CaribeBizForum 2025](https://substack.com/redirect/417232cd-6c67-4c97-9ebf-fdc56156a474?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), I read and reviewed news, podcasts, videos, and reports to bring myself up to speed on developments in Colombia since my last trip to the country.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..KtDbfPuSr0S1zR5hSLQmNbBU9NgJNv_JtIwPJybGtrA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=176557844)
Anyone following Colombia will be aware of the growing tension between Washington and Bogota which was on full display during the most recent meetings of the UN General Assembly. Colombian President Gustavo Petro's address to the global gathering was an unabashedly left-wing socialist rant, focusing on climate change urgency, Western hypocrisy, the evils of capitalism, the urgent need for redistribution, and the tyrannical behavior of the United States.
It's a truly remarkable speech that I'd encourage everyone to listen to, especially my friends in Asia, Africa, Australia, and Europe. (After listening, I suspect you won't be surprised to learn--if you didn't already know--that Petro had been a member of the M-19 guerrilla group and served time in prison).
[](https://substack.com/redirect/e4a1b8ed-0b10-47f0-ad9f-56555ae0827c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The part of his address that I found most interesting was his lashing out at the United States. The speech took issue with the recent [U.S. strikes against drug smugglers](https://substack.com/redirect/18e0863f-fd7a-4391-ae10-c1c76a52cd62?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in the Caribbean, linking them to the situation in Gaza. Petro claimed that that 17 unarmed young people were killed by missiles in open seas under the pretext of stopping drug trafficking, called for criminal cases to be brought against U.S. officials, including U.S. President Donald Trump, and said that these attacks were not about fighting drugs but were instead about using violence to dominate the people of South America.
Petro also used his time in New York to grab a megaphone and, true to his populist instincts (or perhaps guided by his media consultant?), took to the streets. He called on all American military professionals to "disobey Trump's orders" and not point their guns at humans. The US State Department revoked his visa--noting his comments were "reckless and incendiary"--and threatened to deport him if he did not leave the country.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/4d051eea-7872-462c-b37a-fd0d61b7cbaf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Longtime readers know that I have often written about [the changing U.S. global role under the Trump Administration](https://substack.com/redirect/9743ab34-a509-4a59-931b-9b8ac66d5dfe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). While some see isolationism, I see refocusing. While some see hypocrisy in pulling back from the War on Terror while using the same tactics and legal justifications to wage a War on Drugs, I see consistency. And while some see confusion in eschewing military interventionism in other parts of the world while blowing drug boats out of the water off the coast of South America, I see a coherent policy. The U.S. isn't pulling back from the world altogether but rather prioritizing the local neighborhood. I have called this dynamic the [Trump Doctrine](https://substack.com/redirect/5ce07c93-5357-4a5f-b6db-9cdf1acbefa5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and refer to it as the 21st century reincarnation of the Monroe Doctrine.
* * *
## [Is Colombia the Next Front in the US-China War?](https://substack.com/redirect/ac6785df-d064-44a3-b97e-c875c95b6067?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| August 8, 2023
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ac6785df-d064-44a3-b97e-c875c95b6067?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[As I've said multiple times, I believe the world is bifurcating into two global ecosystems. Politics has displaced economics as the main driver of activity in the world, and the US-China war is forci...](https://substack.com/redirect/ac6785df-d064-44a3-b97e-c875c95b6067?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/ac6785df-d064-44a3-b97e-c875c95b6067?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Let's also remember that Colombia has a free trade agreement with the United States, has historically received hundreds of millions of dollars in support from Washington, and has been a strong partner with the US in the fight against drugs. For decades, US presidents have praised Bogota for its improving security, domestic peace process, cooperation in the war on drugs, and economic partnership with America. President Biden even referred to Colombia as [the "keystone" to a prosperous Western Hemisphere](https://substack.com/redirect/18722f5e-ffba-46ee-b4a7-f06552d3441b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..KtDbfPuSr0S1zR5hSLQmNbBU9NgJNv_JtIwPJybGtrA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=176557844)
Add to this context the blunt reality, as I repeatedly said for years, that the United States is increasingly focusing on North-South relations while retrenching from East-West relations. The Caribbean is a focal point of these efforts, in large part because of Venezuela and its strong ties to China, Russia, and Iran. In 2023, I noted the rapidly rising risk of war coming to South America because of Venezuelan saber-rattling and I continue to believe the possibility of armed conflict remains elevated.
* * *
## [Is War Coming to South America?](https://substack.com/redirect/21e87984-9cbc-4160-81db-e6b440459d7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| December 4, 2023
[](https://substack.com/redirect/21e87984-9cbc-4160-81db-e6b440459d7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Failed socialist policies in the Bolivarian Republic of Venezuela destroyed South America's most prosperous country and created economic hardship for most of the country. Hyperinflation decimated the...](https://substack.com/redirect/21e87984-9cbc-4160-81db-e6b440459d7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/21e87984-9cbc-4160-81db-e6b440459d7a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
The U.S. [build-up in the region](https://substack.com/redirect/85057b4b-ac9d-4cc4-abeb-778a16c04899?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) is already the largest since the Cold War, and it includes naval assets such as a cruise missile destroyers and a nuclear sub, aviation assets such as fighter jets, spy planes, and B-52 nuclear bombers, and 6,500 troops. The 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment - the "Night Stalkers" of _[Black Hawk Down](https://substack.com/redirect/ba0dc225-fda6-440d-9abe-fa95e4d62d17?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ fame - was also recently deployed, and the unit provides support for special operations forces.
It's in this context that I find Petro's UN speech and subsequent media stunt so stunning. **It struck me as undignified for a head of state to visit another country and to brazenly call on that country 's armed forces to disobey that country's commander in chief**. How might Bogota react if President Trump visited Colombia and delivered a similar message? The relationship, I suspect, is likely to deteriorate further. In fact, just this morning, [President Trump posted the following to Truth Social](https://substack.com/redirect/af3e0f8e-1a02-4842-9824-f861ba16b624?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c83d3104-6a20-4a47-b582-10bb8ee1cd89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
I realize that as an American I'm biased, but I suspect that a productive working relationship with the United States is in Colombia's best interests. Colombia should realize that America is serious about protecting its own interests, and that includes stopping the flow of drugs into our country. But as I've repeatedly said, **America First doesn't mean America Alone**. Colombia and the US can (and should) have a productive working relationship.
I've been closely watching Colombia for more than a decade and have spent time in Bogota, Cali, Barranquilla, Cartagena, and Medellin. I know the Colombian people are practical, hard-working, and above all peace-loving. They want a better life for their families and their communities.
Unfortunately, Colombia's leader--a dogmatic socialist--has proactively decided to take on Trump, a practical capitalist. While the world is filled with uncertainty, it seems fairly certain that Petro's escalation of tensions with the United States is unlikely to improve the lives of ordinary Colombians.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..KtDbfPuSr0S1zR5hSLQmNbBU9NgJNv_JtIwPJybGtrA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=176557844)

---|---|---
**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/dc7239b5-f611-4677-a131-82c59376a056?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/12207e92-b10d-4c13-9fe0-5b5990079d4b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/11112eaf-7cea-4c9a-8de5-a102c4364848?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/22d7aca6-dd9c-4557-8052-4d288c4a77a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
