Tensions escalate as dogmatic socialist Gustavo Petro picks a fight with Trump. | | | Oct 19 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- I recently returned from a trip to Colombia where I had the chance to speak with the country's business and political leaders and share my thoughts on global trends, the ongoing trade war, and America's re-emerging interest in their part of the world. In preparation for my speech at the , I read and reviewed news, podcasts, videos, and reports to bring myself up to speed on developments in Colombia since my last trip to the country. Anyone following Colombia will be aware of the growing tension between Washington and Bogota which was on full display during the most recent meetings of the UN General Assembly. Colombian President Gustavo Petro's address to the global gathering was an unabashedly left-wing socialist rant, focusing on climate change urgency, Western hypocrisy, the evils of capitalism, the urgent need for redistribution, and the tyrannical behavior of the United States. It's a truly remarkable speech that I'd encourage everyone to listen to, especially my friends in Asia, Africa, Australia, and Europe. (After listening, I suspect you won't be surprised to learn--if you didn't already know--that Petro had been a member of the M-19 guerrilla group and served time in prison). The part of his address that I found most interesting was his lashing out at the United States. The speech took issue with the recent in the Caribbean, linking them to the situation in Gaza. Petro claimed that that 17 unarmed young people were killed by missiles in open seas under the pretext of stopping drug trafficking, called for criminal cases to be brought against U.S. officials, including U.S. President Donald Trump, and said that these attacks were not about fighting drugs but were instead about using violence to dominate the people of South America. Petro also used his time in New York to grab a megaphone and, true to his populist instincts (or perhaps guided by his media consultant?), took to the streets. He called on all American military professionals to "disobey Trump's orders" and not point their guns at humans. The US State Department revoked his visa--noting his comments were "reckless and incendiary"--and threatened to deport him if he did not leave the country. Longtime readers know that I have often written about . While some see isolationism, I see refocusing. While some see hypocrisy in pulling back from the War on Terror while using the same tactics and legal justifications to wage a War on Drugs, I see consistency. And while some see confusion in eschewing military interventionism in other parts of the world while blowing drug boats out of the water off the coast of South America, I see a coherent policy. The U.S. isn't pulling back from the world altogether but rather prioritizing the local neighborhood. I have called this dynamic the and refer to it as the 21st century reincarnation of the Monroe Doctrine. | | | | ---|---|--- | August 8, 2023 | Let's also remember that Colombia has a free trade agreement with the United States, has historically received hundreds of millions of dollars in support from Washington, and has been a strong partner with the US in the fight against drugs. For decades, US presidents have praised Bogota for its improving security, domestic peace process, cooperation in the war on drugs, and economic partnership with America. President Biden even referred to Colombia as . Add to this context the blunt reality, as I repeatedly said for years, that the United States is increasingly focusing on North-South relations while retrenching from East-West relations. The Caribbean is a focal point of these efforts, in large part because of Venezuela and its strong ties to China, Russia, and Iran. In 2023, I noted the rapidly rising risk of war coming to South America because of Venezuelan saber-rattling and I continue to believe the possibility of armed conflict remains elevated. | | | | ---|---|--- | December 4, 2023 | The U.S. is already the largest since the Cold War, and it includes naval assets such as a cruise missile destroyers and a nuclear sub, aviation assets such as fighter jets, spy planes, and B-52 nuclear bombers, and 6,500 troops. The 160th Special Operations Aviation Regiment - the "Night Stalkers" of fame - was also recently deployed, and the unit provides support for special operations forces. It's in this context that I find Petro's UN speech and subsequent media stunt so stunning. It struck me as undignified for a head of state to visit another country and to brazenly call on that country 's armed forces to disobey that country's commander in chief. How might Bogota react if President Trump visited Colombia and delivered a similar message? The relationship, I suspect, is likely to deteriorate further. In fact, just this morning, : | | ---|---|--- I realize that as an American I'm biased, but I suspect that a productive working relationship with the United States is in Colombia's best interests. Colombia should realize that America is serious about protecting its own interests, and that includes stopping the flow of drugs into our country. But as I've repeatedly said, America First doesn't mean America Alone. Colombia and the US can (and should) have a productive working relationship. I've been closely watching Colombia for more than a decade and have spent time in Bogota, Cali, Barranquilla, Cartagena, and Medellin. I know the Colombian people are practical, hard-working, and above all peace-loving. They want a better life for their families and their communities. Unfortunately, Colombia's leader--a dogmatic socialist--has proactively decided to take on Trump, a practical capitalist. While the world is filled with uncertainty, it seems fairly certain that Petro's escalation of tensions with the United States is unlikely to improve the lives of ordinary Colombians. | | ---|---|--- VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, , and . Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Kelan Publishing, LLC PO BOX 932, Lincoln, NH 03251 ? ?

That means we could lose three critical months to talk with voters and
raise the grassroots resources we need to win.

we ramp up our organizing and advertising plans, we need your help to
prepare for this potential new timeline.

So before we say anything else, we want to stop and say **_thank you._** You’re part of a growing grassroots movement that refuses to let fossil fuel billionaires write our future. Even if you haven’t chipped in yet, just opening and reading this email matters. Every bit of awareness can lead to a volunteer sign-up, a shared post, or a conversation with your neighbors about the climate champions on their ballots. **You power this work.** You make it possible for us to go head-to-head with an industry that spent $445 million to put Trump back in the White House. And we couldn’t be more grateful to have you — _yes you_ — on our side. Every fundraising goal we set is based on real needs, not arbitrary numbers. name: Trisha Calvarese
subject: The emperor has no clothes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
One of the challenging aspects of taking on Lauren Boebert is combatting the idea that her starpower with the R+9 district lean somehow makes her invincible.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lpZ4lGrzsrOWr_sfdwI6cEqR6Bbu0ZgZifzhd8zGQEPbzOaQFxlPFEv-FCury4bnzqqaXzoC0Ig4LJptbPbkqX-T4DKMIX8wNId5bPT-__fJHU9TGRMSHslvnAYAVjH8NqK2Qg8ocdZAF11GCTlfu_nx9dhF829cdflbw70P2BGiA0K5MaRONjbPNDvX474_x3hw2TdoUKVAgRVa93-iE-22z0V2DBTy&c=e4qeCGkytDOrUQw3y-A5mTKTV_SknrlkcegdQbwgXrIEhzNw-6CTJA==&ch=lROgxKssZ_Iq0V0Bu3GXxhsK5SE4e3umXusl2Oa1xenUBi8VJVv7FA==)
---
|

Peter,
One of the most challenging aspects of taking on Congresswoman Lauren Boebert is combatting the notion that her starpower combined with her district's R+9 lean somehow makes her invincible.
Even when Adam Frisch got to within 546 votes of beating her in 2022, up until election day all of the very serious election analysts said Boebert's red district made her safe and that beating her would be impossible.
The truth is she is beyond vulnerable. This week she just reported her lowest ever fundraising haul since taking office, raising a measly $110,000 dollars from July to September.
The emperor has no clothes.
There is an intangible Boebert factor in this race--her toxic brand, status as a carpet bagger in this new district, combined with her abysmal fundraising, means she is beyond beatable even in an R+9 district.
And with Trump taking dozens of flippable red seats out of contention through gerrymandering, if we hope to take back the House in 2028 we are going to need to win in some R+9s.
I am the Democrat taking on Congresswoman Lauren Boebert and I just outraised her 5-1.
In 2024 I had the best performance a Democrat has had in this district since we lost it in 2010 whereas Boebert underperformed Trump in every county.
Now I need your help to send a powerful message to the institutions in DC to ensure they bet on the right Democrat winning this race.
We send this message through continuing to put up strong fundraising numbers. [Please can you make a monthly donation of $25, $10, or whatever you can afford, so we can continue to grow our campaign and show DC that we have what it takes to beat Boebert, flip this district blue, and take back the House?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001lpZ4lGrzsrOWr_sfdwI6cEqR6Bbu0ZgZifzhd8zGQEPbzOaQFxlPFEv-FCury4bnQJ08Zug_VkIZ9Uos4WG1rHXz7gu5XX6lXgQnxM-iHLsV8fr2-fyusmkYlZUEL7PLqBFoBYJ7A5ybVSms91aaxHDY7GV0AJcNsY0bewX5rbFhr7laCVyiV05E4LgNBF49td4tR9SEcC8JfPniEc5ly2xzlYtheWz-NB1YNddNu3Y=&c=e4qeCGkytDOrUQw3y-A5mTKTV_SknrlkcegdQbwgXrIEhzNw-6CTJA==&ch=lROgxKssZ_Iq0V0Bu3GXxhsK5SE4e3umXusl2Oa1xenUBi8VJVv7FA==)

name: Chris Pappas
subject: My family’s story
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=2975%2E582294%2E91CYE8 ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=2975%2E582294%2E91CYE8 ]Chris Pappas for Senate

Good morning,

You might know that my family immigrated from Greece and opened a
restaurant in New Hampshire 108 years ago.

It’s where my grandfather invented the chicken tender (no, really), and it
remains at the heart of the Manchester community today.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251019_1_backroom.up0WAt&refcode=em20251019-1&t=1003&akid=2975%2E582294%2E91CYE8 ][IMG]

Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving
others.

But unfortunately, the opportunity that my ancestors and others sought has
never been further away — and Donald Trump and his administration are too
busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn.

I’m running for Senate to change that, and New Hampshire is poised to be
one of the country’s closest races in 2026.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251019_1_backroom.up0WAt&refcode=em20251019-1&t=1004&akid=2975%2E582294%2E91CYE8 ]Can I count on you to chip in now and help me stop Republicans from
expanding their majority in the Senate?

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251019_1_backroom.up0WAt&amount=5&refcode=em20251019-1&t=1023&akid=2975%2E582294%2E91CYE8 ]Donate $5 »

Let’s do this,

Chris Pappas

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2975%2E582294%2E91CYE8

body:
Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=jysaOtuqIhdTcEqVmfKTmbWRHbgZTAwyDAC4h816aHz5dbK9t8LAr4WWTdJR%2BE9BgrEg3%2F%2FV0VD%2FLZb3EX%2FhGoYUQgqFr4C3nAGaJK1YQ9p1QqDPjEtzDCaQpzIiycfcG0d8KJdMLygeJwPjYkvqhn1E2BxtWoSMSQhL3iLMWN7AM%2FHil9To6dU%2FdFiL9aWJXYUiCt76dIrdwJuaYimyYjYWnp%2FWlEv%2BIMW7YIxkP7pOXZ1i2%2BX4wRINIlN1C0Dt2HI6CkxpMrsz%2BwBA0PMAp%2FiEvuOsJqU5CIm5%2BkIIIwqRhsOSp%2B4bn2SGIhv57cA1MX3K7P1HRRyKIx%2BIJ6m0ALOM9exkJEM8h2qPtJUiC4IKbxlwgfYYIigK2G%2Fthj6%2FqcSZvlt9FxDds%2BBKsDdvFyASaYzfAg1x1uJnS9XaH4s%3D)

We came up short of our mid-month fundraising goal — and we’re falling behind at a time when we really can’t afford to. National Republicans are already flooding NM-02 with outside money, and we fully expect them to ramp things up once their candidates officially jump in. And once they do, we’re expecting them to come after Gabe hard. Gabe’s running in one of the most closely watched, competitive districts in the country. Republicans see this seat as a top pickup opportunity, and they’ll throw everything they have at it. If we want to protect this seat and keep Gabe fighting for southern New Mexico, we need to be prepared for the battles ahead — not scrambling to catch up. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
The entire country is watching this race
#

Hey friend, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Mikie Sherrill is running for Governor in New Jersey and needs our help. I hope you’ll read the message below from her, and [**consider splitting a donation between Mikie's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrill.Ja8SSv&refcode=em251019-1-90&t=1&akid=6220%2E6688874%2E6PLxc8)
---
Friend, there are a couple of reasons why the entire country is watching this race:
**This is one of the first major elections after the presidential election last fall.** In that election, Donald Trump was just 6 points away from winning right here in New Jersey — making it even more clear that New Jersey is no longer the safe blue state it once was.
**I’m showing our nation a new way forward.** My opponent has shown he’ll do anything Donald Trump tells him to — no matter how much it hurts New Jersey families. I will ALWAYS put the people of this state first. Leadership isn’t just following along with what some Washington politician wants. It’s doing what’s right for the people you serve, even when you get attacked for it.
**As New Jersey goes, so goes the nation.** What we do here in New Jersey will set the trend for 2026, 2028, and beyond. It’s up to us here to take a stand against Donald Trump’s incompetence and authoritarianism — and show the nation that there’s a better path forward.
[**All eyes are on New Jersey and this race is a toss-up. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Mark Kelly today to help me win and chart a better path forward for my state and our country?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrill.Ja8SSv&refcode=em251019-1-90&t=2&akid=6220%2E6688874%2E6PLxc8)

* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

clean_body: We’ve told you this before. | = = What if we reminded you that this TOSS-UP race is the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and that it’s key to taking back the Senate majority? What if we told you that extreme right-wing groups are already dumping millions into propping up our MAGA opponent and that we HAVE to keep pace with their spending? Or that our opponent is gaining ground in the polls? Peter, we’ve told you all this before, but what if we reminded you that 90% of our donations come from folks giving $100 or less — and that we truly rely on your grassroots support to run a campaign that can win? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thanks, Team Cooper Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here. National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us. Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party. Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy. = = = mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. Peter,

The radical left thinks they can dismiss us, calling us**“backward,” “extreme,”** and worse. They’re attacking the Minnesota values I’ve spent a lifetime defending — faith, family, and freedom. But here’s the truth they don’t want you to know: we’re closer than ever to taking back this Senate seat.

With the election fast approaching, _**attention is turning to Minnesota’s Senate race.**_ My opponents, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, and Rep. Angie Craig, thought they had this seat locked up. But a recent poll they commissioned delivered a shock: **Flanagan leads a generic Republican by just two points, and Craig by only four points.**

For the first time since 2008, Republicans have a genuine shot at flipping this seat for Minnesota conservatives and every American on the right.

**[Would you consider contributing $2 or even $8 right now to help me build the campaign we'll need to flip this seat Republican?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5f8948362a3c4f21b40945bc872f7baf&_e=eynLiiRPM347w3rAld4FxD1FqYVdjducFeANUXAi-bC47G3YN4fuBdmRaKP2Yd35YD7lv3X9yh1_HVFoEUI0X6V3_Yk9lX3wv6Oh2xYZrwEVc_9NoselDM5KMRnPcCGaI5HUJDokmHbiM42ScnJoQoWan7P8DK-nt1Li5iUFNyorLRZAl466Cv6RzP6AyuUUTTlKUFU62InNbMjXtUXpx4XHULn3Z1asmMH51xqpiRiDBmEwphJonZgEHt7Wtt-n8qDwwIveEezvrVijXpTttalWGuNdUg_wTknYaNT4LXrzDZb4f8yyfBlhrWS3sw9OWGFkw3Gl17p5GZiVt8sCwj_je6t9ccJiCSns7stJTOrgde4D3vdMhdsjjXUk7HfLjENfvBphR7nxCwOSQYFVWi_1n7B5sgOo9SdEQYsGBhKij2UV6MNOwYCtFRV86FxipU8IJkGlhSfA3GbNfl8sMZdP6Ua27vkjPGhUSbGnvg-TI9W7bX5lvpA4rkpnvCPaHsrxIXsoOLheRz4IfKz3ejRfNTwzOIFrD0vr4aFHtdqKuTfR85ExltoM473xO4lQmwIA9MWcNXRp9E8U3igXVRMhztIF_FW7MHdNj-v1ILwhWlN-rgDTCgvQC0BSEHLDNmcUux5977ywDE-8vKsetPsEa1vcrBqiSXZdK6SeFKqAHqNy3Jh3NeRJ6DypOJ6o0hT538DrFwCsmO6_3rF3ouZwdPD7TiXH5i-H5iDoSf5OxPYjQiIABgTKrtGWPLV8ekoWQfw4pvePk1qz0YrVNgOhq5VwxlNmK7oBtzymX8I%3D)**

I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. _**I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks, enlisted after 9/11, and served in over 70 countries, leading high-stakes missions with discipline and resolve.**_ Service is my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. I’m running for U.S. Senate to fight for the America we love, the one you’ve worked hard to build for your children and grandchildren.

The left’s agenda — pushed by Flanagan and Craig — mocks our heritage, looks back on the chaos of 2020 with rose-colored glasses, and leaves our communities to pay the price. They expect us to stay silent. I know better — and so do you.

**Your legacy is on the line.** This isn’t just an election; it’s a battle for the soul of our nation. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. With your support, we can send a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate to defend our values in Washington.

I’m not asking for a free pass — I’m asking for your partnership. **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100, or more right now to help me build momentum, win the Republican primary, and defeat the radical left?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=5f8948362a3c4f21b40945bc872f7baf&_e=eynLiiRPM347w3rAld4FxD1FqYVdjducFeANUXAi-bC47G3YN4fuBdmRaKP2Yd35YD7lv3X9yh1_HVFoEUI0X6V3_Yk9lX3wv6Oh2xYZrwEVc_9NoselDM5KMRnPcCGaI5HUJDokmHbiM42ScnJoQoWan7P8DK-nt1Li5iUFNyorLRZAl466Cv6RzP6AyuUUTTlKUFU62InNbMjXtUXpx4XHULn3Z1asmMH51xqpiRiDBmEwphJonZgEHt7Wtt-n8qDwwIveEezvrVijXpTttalWGuNdUg_wTknYaNT4LXp26iPlD4H3qvZFvQK2CtKRq3nt4jeYUfsv8cz8nTlyjxcZ5KF3XvM1tPSqjSF71hTfAQvdi2CU84v_uk4JCum1Jvuc9OIL3pazH-9OcLYug_XV57xihDHpI6eT6kl0VNfP-sGRuCuqkNTJmgKIv0ac-JocsK0U0boMGosMQfZICjrf7EEARRkPSEuyEHH4UBkH_75WmsRug7qgGPtPgLYGS15-YZoRcE2XhkfBL9BTecZq9sxpl0krqMOsWuaJPACygKEA2Aog-UUAMFAta_bAKwVbkXM9NNbTKKnhI8vYOEHzEZd-L4pBWP9eSppP8IVXyNrTrd3hnAwKGA49Xh8P07xlR8gi0Nd9fv0pqyKxC1p6kHl2nX2-2n0A1YWfj7UnqEindFkwFALhFRDOBMXrgs0clU2GWi7zDFelKVt6LAC4dbZtChGhOcE4-LM5-R4YaNKoxe4PXQnRpvPIbVlmD233HpNpTSQZRZWx-ViK6HcuT1LDPuTgXZRTkmi68o4%3D)** Every dollar fuels our fight to share my message with voters across Minnesota.

Throughout my career, I have faced myriad challenges, but it’s clear to me that my greatest challenge will be earning your trust as I work to win a Senate seat in Minnesota. The left’s attacks won’t stop, and we need resources to fight back with the strength you expect from a Navy SEAL.

**Together, we can prove them wrong and show Minnesota — and America — that our values still matter.**

With deep gratitude
Adam Schwarze
Proud Marine Veteran
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota _**

clean_body: For everyone who thinks winning in Minnesota is just a pipe dream, this latest news offers room for hope. | Peter, The radical left thinks they can dismiss us, calling us“backward,” “extreme,” and worse. They’re attacking the Minnesota values I’ve spent a lifetime defending — faith, family, and freedom. But here’s the truth they don’t want you to know: we’re closer than ever to taking back this Senate seat. With the election fast approaching, attention is turning to Minnesota’s Senate race. My opponents, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, and Rep. Angie Craig, thought they had this seat locked up. But a recent poll they commissioned delivered a shock: Flanagan leads a generic Republican by just two points, and Craig by only four points. For the first time since 2008, Republicans have a genuine shot at flipping this seat for Minnesota conservatives and every American on the right. I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks, enlisted after 9/11, and served in over 70 countries, leading high-stakes missions with discipline and resolve. Service is my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. I’m running for U.S. Senate to fight for the America we love, the one you’ve worked hard to build for your children and grandchildren. The left’s agenda — pushed by Flanagan and Craig — mocks our heritage, looks back on the chaos of 2020 with rose-colored glasses, and leaves our communities to pay the price. They expect us to stay silent. I know better — and so do you. Your legacy is on the line. This isn’t just an election; it’s a battle for the soul of our nation. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. With your support, we can send a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate to defend our values in Washington. I’m not asking for a free pass — I’m asking for your partnership. Every dollar fuels our fight to share my message with voters across Minnesota. Throughout my career, I have faced myriad challenges, but it’s clear to me that my greatest challenge will be earning your trust as I work to win a Senate seat in Minnesota. The left’s attacks won’t stop, and we need resources to fight back with the strength you expect from a Navy SEAL. Together, we can prove them wrong and show Minnesota — and America — that our values still matter. With deep gratitude Adam Schwarze Proud Marine Veteran Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Marc Elias
subject: What I plan to say directly to the Supreme Court.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi there, Marc Elias here. After the 2020 election, **I beat Donald Trump 64 times in court -- and now, I'm headed to the Supreme Court to fight for free and fair elections.**

[**Before I explain, I have to ask -- will you chip in $5 to the DSCC to stand up against GOP leaders' blatant disregard for the law and fight for our democracy by flipping the Senate blue? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251019-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251019-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=21510%2E9716520%2E591jlf)

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251019-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251019-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=21510%2E9716520%2E591jlf)
---

As we speak, Donald Trump's cronies are trying to _rewrite_ this country's campaign finance laws to suit their own needs. They're ignoring _decades_ of precedent, attacking our country's values, and shredding bedrock legal principles _**to rig the rules for their own benefit.**_

**Here's how we fight back:**

First, we're headed to the Supreme Court -- where I will _**personally**_ deliver arguments to the justices on behalf of the DSCC and Democrats across the nation, urging the Court to reject the GOP's cynical schemes.

I'm planning to expose the Republican case for what it is: A corrupt effort to drown out the voices of everyday Americans by opening the floodgates to _even more_ money in our politics.

But no matter the outcome, our second step is clear: We MUST flip the Senate blue. The DSCC is the _only_ committee dedicated to electing a Democratic Senate, and by supporting their work, we can put a much-needed check on Trump's dangerous agenda.

**So I'm asking for your help as we work to stop Trump's allies, flip the Senate blue, and defend democracy itself:[Please, will you chip in $5 or more today to support the DSCC's efforts to take back the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22074?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20251019-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20251019-MarcElias-MarcEliasArguingBeforeSCOTUS-Pros-sl1&akid=21510%2E9716520%2E591jlf)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Ted Cruz Says Politics Is Fueling Federal Government Shutdown:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-y-41zZNluAsqMfiYK9A)** "Texas Senator Ted Cruz says the federal government shutdown is being prolonged because his Democratic colleague Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer is being pulled by the progressive wing of his party. The Republican compared this government funding negotiation to one earlier this year. Cruz also says Democratic-led states could pass socialized healthcare immediately, but haven't because of the exorbitant costs. Democrats have held firm in their stance of wanting to see healthcare subsidies preserved as a sticking point..." **[Ted Cruz Calls To Hold Nigerian Government Accountable For Christian Persecution:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-HLlk-jQ)** "As violence against Nigerian Christians continues to surge, one American senator is pressing Nigerian officials to protect their people from persecution. "Officials in Nigeria are ignoring and even facilitating the mass murder of Christians by Islamist jihadists," Sen. Ted Cruz, R-Texas, charged in a social media post Oct. 3, highlighting news of 5,000 Nigerians fleeing their home country for neighboring Cameroon in the face of attacks by jihadist militia Boko Haram. "It's time to hold those responsible accountable," Cruz said, touting new legislation..." **[Scoop: Ted Cruz Wants To Make Columbus Fountain Flow Again:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-jXFADywXWJQA)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) is calling on the Interior Department to clean up Washington D.C.'s Columbus Circle and transfer control of the area south of Union Station to the Department of Transportation. Why it matters: To mark the federal holiday that President Trump insists should be called "Columbus Day," Cruz is preparing to introduce the ''Make Christopher Columbus Circle Great Again Act." "Under Democrat administrations the area had become overrun by drug addicts, the severely mentally ill, and virulently angry..." **[US Senators Announce Deal On Aviation Safety Legislation:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-MuSTm65NUM0g)** "Two U.S. senators announced a deal on Thursday on aviation safety legislation after a fatal January collision involving an American Airlines (AAL.O), opens new tab regional jet and an Army helicopter that killed 67 people spurred calls for reform. Friend, Trump can put troops in our streets. He can put ICE agents in our communities. He can weaponize the Justice Department against his opponents. He can throw people in dark site detention camps without due process. **But we will not be intimidated. We will not be silenced.** Yesterday, in cities and towns in every state in the country, millions of people rose up to declare there are No Kings in America. [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs1kLBHY7tNfJLVa6U4_4VeFNAhVG1vcidfx4wOWYZzUdhJMNwINv7ZbekDr4vUqyr6iOBmD9VV281HvZtdtt3TA643FGUvFOK7aOT_7n35fS6uX1WGXTStHlN7Um0heFsFXD66mLMvlrTOdisyv6s7yj0ncNlo6kU9j8HG7aleh5emA7fcow7qPs-ljBW9Z9MEv565vXN_4d7eD8F3HdKvnSa0opql4COqMxbBI1qrFCspkrlHILvpbyziR5DGOrfsdF1sGAd9FWemX1LG3oXN7kA3E-VzhJ4MVP5yLrddKQ/4kv/dKS-5d_ZTaSEA3ZYwGqahw/h1/h001.381pFljJKCd-BM3mXZ6rb_jdVsfVMx1bsuJdlbsHG0w) We know that congressional Republicans will not speak up. We have seen that the Supreme Court is willing to accept Trump’s authoritarian acts. **It’s up to us, the people, to speak out and hold this lawless administration accountable**. name: Ro Khanna
subject: It’s a bad day for Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
I have some BIG news for Democrats and BAD news for Republicans.
My friend Josh Turek, a two-time Paralympian gold medalist in Wheelchair Basketball and a groundbreaking state legislator, is running for the U.S. Senate in Iowa.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/josh-turek-split?refcode=20251019 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/josh-turek-split?refcode=20251019]
Josh is an inspiring new voice in the Democratic Party — a consistent and forceful progressive who knows how to win on challenging political terrain.
Will you help him get off to a great start by splitting a contribution between our campaigns today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/josh-turek-split?refcode=20251019]
I've known Josh for three years. I’m proud to call him a friend. He is a fighter. Born with spina bifida, he endured 21 surgeries by the age of 12. Josh fought through medical and economic challenges. He understands the need for affordable health care firsthand. He grew up in a working family that fought to make ends meet. He went on to win two gold medals with the United States Paralympic Wheelchair Basketball team. Now, he represents his community in the Iowa House of Representatives.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/josh-turek-split?refcode=20251019 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/josh-turek-split?refcode=20251019]
Josh is the first permanently and visibly disabled legislator in Iowa history. Carrying on the legacy of U.S. Sen. Tom Harkin, he gives voice to people with disabilities, 15 percent of the nation's population, and the single-largest underrepresented demographic in the United States. I rely on his advice to ensure that legislation and policies are fully inclusive. We need more Josh Tureks in the rooms where democracy happens.
In the Iowa House, Josh Turek has been a voice for working people and an advocate for the economic revival that's at the center of my work. He's an important ally.

clean_body: [] Peter, I have some BIG news for Democrats and BAD news for Republicans. My friend Josh Turek, a two-time Paralympian gold medalist in Wheelchair Basketball and a groundbreaking state legislator, is running for the U.S. Senate in Iowa. [] Josh is an inspiring new voice in the Democratic Party — a consistent and forceful progressive who knows how to win on challenging political terrain. Will you help him get off to a great start by splitting a contribution between our campaigns today? [] I've known Josh for three years. I’m proud to call him a friend. He is a fighter. Born with spina bifida, he endured 21 surgeries by the age of 12. Josh fought through medical and economic challenges. He understands the need for affordable health care firsthand. He grew up in a working family that fought to make ends meet. He went on to win two gold medals with the United States Paralympic Wheelchair Basketball team. Now, he represents his community in the Iowa House of Representatives. [] Josh is the first permanently and visibly disabled legislator in Iowa history. Carrying on the legacy of U.S. Sen. Tom Harkin, he gives voice to people with disabilities, 15 percent of the nation's population, and the single-largest underrepresented demographic in the United States. I rely on his advice to ensure that legislation and policies are fully inclusive. We need more Josh Tureks in the rooms where democracy happens. In the Iowa House, Josh Turek has been a voice for working people and an advocate for the economic revival that's at the center of my work. He's an important ally. [] The road to Democratic control of the U.S. Senate runs through Iowa. Josh Turek is a proven campaigner who has delivered in red and competitive political regions with a connectivity and deep understanding that make him a full ballot-boosting Democrat — a defining candidate in a defining election. name: Fred Wellman
subject: My announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
I can’t stand by and do nothing while our country is in danger
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5928?t=1&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
---
Hi there,

My name is Fred Wellman. I served in the Army for 22 years and am now the host of the _On Democracy_ podcast on the MeidasTouch Network. I’m excited to share some big news: **I’m the Democrat running for Congress in one of the most competitive swing districts in the nation.**

This isn’t the email I thought I’d be sending you today. But with the government shutdown and Ann Wagner doing nothing to fix it, we need leaders who will stand up and do whatever it takes to fix it. I’m done waiting.

[_**If you’re ready to join my campaign, can you split a donation of $25 today between The Long Run PAC and me to become one of our first 5,000 Founding Donors? If you want to learn more, please keep reading this.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5928?t=2&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
| [DONATE NOW ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5928?t=3&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
---
A Missouri native, I graduated from Kirkwood High School and then attended West Point. In the Army, I served as an aviator and later as a public affairs officer. For much of my career I led soldiers in combat, flew helicopters in Desert Storm and Iraq, and served as a spokesman for generals leading America’s toughest and most important fights.

After retiring from the Army, I kept looking for ways to serve, founding a public affairs firm to advocate for veterans and military families, volunteering at a field hospital in New York at the height of COVID, and working with the Lincoln Project in 2020 to help beat Trump. My oath to serve our country and uphold our Constitution is sacred and endures for life.

I returned home to Missouri four years ago and once again rolled up my sleeves to help organize the thousands of donations for refugees coming to St. Louis from Afghanistan as Kabul fell.

Now, I host the _On Democracy with FPWellman_ podcast on the MeidasTouch Network, having key conversations about how to address rising authoritarianism, inequality, and Trump’s assault on our democracy.
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5928?t=5&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
**Meanwhile, my MAGA Congresswoman—Ann Wagner—is content to let Trump rule as a dictator. She has spent her entire career selling us out, ignoring her constituents, and getting richer. She hasn’t even bothered holding an open town hall in thirteen years.
In one of the most critical swing districts in the country, here in my home state of Missouri, this cannot continue.**

That’s why I’m running.

**Because working Americans are getting priced out of the American Dream.
Because our kids deserve the same rights, freedoms, and opportunities we had.
Because the time for sitting on the sidelines is over.**

After two decades in uniform, I know what it looks like to fight for this country. I watched brave men and women give everything to defend our freedoms, including two of my own soldiers in Desert Storm. Their sacrifice reminds me every day that democracy is worth fighting for.

Now Trump wants to crown himself America’s first king and Ann Wagner is helping him get there. They have taken healthcare away from millions, destroyed the economy, gutted the VA, politicized our national defense, and are ripping apart our democratic institutions piece by piece.

**I won’t stand by while they sell out working families. I’m a fighter – and I’m ready to take this fight to Washington. I know you are ready to fight too.**

[_**That’s why I’ll ask one more time, can you split a donation between The Long Run PAC and me to become one of the first 5,000 Founding Donors of our campaign?**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5928?t=6&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
| | | [CONTRIBUTE $5 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5929?t=7&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $10 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5930?t=9&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $25 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5931?t=11&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $50 ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5932?t=13&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5933?t=15&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
---
I’ve got one tattoo. It says “I’m not done yet.” It was the theme of my Army retirement speech. Whenever I hit hard times and thought I was all but finished I remembered that line. I dusted myself off and got back in the fight.

I’m not done yet.
You’re not done yet.
Missouri is not done yet.
America is not done yet.

Join me.

—Fred Wellman
Democratic Candidate for MO-2
* * *
| | [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5934?t=17&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
---
Paid for by The Long Run PAC
P.O. Box 597, Milwaukee, WI 53201
| [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4144?t=18&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv) | [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4145?t=19&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv) | | [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4146?t=20&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
---|---|---|---
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5934?t=21&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
---
[CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/5935?t=22&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)
---
Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=23&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv). You can also sign up to [receive fewer emails](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=24&akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv).
This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.mandelabarnes.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=5642%2E196590%2E-VMvpv)

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Not asking for your money – just your endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
This campaign is about building a brighter future for Colorado. It’s going to take all of us to get there.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117583210/576964014/-2054079050?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk956-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2NjYjI1OC0wNWFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AauwLBlzYEoFqThTrGBFgB5mMUad-QSN9wuVd9n_Di0=)
Can I be honest, friend?
My least favorite part about campaigning is asking folks like you for your hard-earned money. And I'm sure you dislike getting those requests just as much as I dislike making them of you.
Well today, we're both in luck, because I'm not reaching out for donations.
**I just want to share how honored I am to have earned the endorsements of over 180 Colorado leaders in the governor's race – ****[because now, I just need one from _you_.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117583211/576964015/172444050?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk956-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2NjYjI1OC0wNWFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AauwLBlzYEoFqThTrGBFgB5mMUad-QSN9wuVd9n_Di0=&emci=0ff2fa7c-bcaa-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2cccb258-05ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)****↙️**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117583212/576964016/172444050?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk956-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2NjYjI1OC0wNWFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AauwLBlzYEoFqThTrGBFgB5mMUad-QSN9wuVd9n_Di0=&emci=0ff2fa7c-bcaa-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2cccb258-05ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)
From my years working to deliver change for our state in the Senate, I know the solutions to our state's biggest problems are within our reach. But given Trump's thirst for power, and the cowardly partisanship that's infected his party, these will not come from the broken politics in D.C.
**They have to start here in Colorado – and _that's_ why I'm running.**
I'm running for governor to rebuild our middle class and to build an economy that works for everyone, not just the people at the top.
I'm running to ensure we set the nationwide example of how to really protect working families from Trump's costly tariffs and cruel agenda.
I'm running because I know that together, we can create lasting solutions to our shared challenges, and make Colorado the best place to live and raise a family –**and since this campaign is about building a brighter future for all Coloradans, it's going to take _all_ of us to get there. **
[**So, friend, will you be one of the 20,000 grassroots supporters I need to officially join this people-powered team? If so, please add your name by 11:59 p.m. tonight.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117583213/576964017/172444050?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk956-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2NjYjI1OC0wNWFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AauwLBlzYEoFqThTrGBFgB5mMUad-QSN9wuVd9n_Di0=&emci=0ff2fa7c-bcaa-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2cccb258-05ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)
| | [Endorse Michael's Campaign →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117583214/576964018/172444050?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk956-ot-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2NjYjI1OC0wNWFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AauwLBlzYEoFqThTrGBFgB5mMUad-QSN9wuVd9n_Di0=&emci=0ff2fa7c-bcaa-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=2cccb258-05ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=1295540)

body:

And this year we've already seen freak flash floods, massive wildfires and dangerous blackouts. body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=X5LeboukNyL6pg2gT%2BnJfcEcV5HWsrQb9gt3x8K7Tn%2FQp6%2B0YkZ88vT%2FX9iwAqggyCKLxK%2FV9sZ%2BZlKHDlhmT0ohTaKc%2FBIrwVG6uqjJzcUTWDK32ZAqshLibsa6tbkUtCCIrdQIk4vSNu7L%2B8l2EINWQmklqnZXTanF2cI22pzUk6VvamW54AC%2FhNkJIQkn2kMUbSLzi6z6L73k%2FjazRdTvgfjnzgkS31bp3ezuY3CEolYxCznMM%2FFpJf0lr1mGTlaVoYirNqRu2ACpOKv%2FatjvqwgsE7LzZk6xBise3TeCBxVI1VQ3Z8qU8qdOYoMmsh1q1ABwXK20y%2FKSG2C9O4JmzSNh1BquVhrTwIMsCJIWZcqEECUZTX0zv66VHGkP4PHdXfT%2BO%2BXAdc2X2sJK7kGSVy48Zo3LTQ%2Bv3CQN8J7xDqcXAnCsx0DV2mPOohyp)

Peter,

**The numbers don’t lie:** health insurance costs are going to **_more than double_** next year if Congress fails to act.

That means Rhode Islanders will see their premiums skyrocket, making it even harder for families to afford care.

But instead of fixing the mess they created, Republicans in Congress went on vacation and let the government shut down. They control Congress, and they are letting this happen.

I refuse to stand by while working people are forced to pay the price for Washington’s dysfunction. I’m fighting to extend critical health care tax credits and keep insurance affordable, but I can’t do it alone.

This fight is about protecting working people, not giving billionaires another tax break. And with your support, I will keep fighting to make sure families can afford the care they need.

Thank you,

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Why I’m proud to support Deb Haaland
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
I’m reaching out today with an important message.
It's Jane Fonda! You may know me as an actor or as a bit of a troublemaker in Washington for, well, decades. And I'm proud to still be at it.
There’s a lot of noise in politics these days, but when you find someone like Deb Haaland, you pay attention.
**Deb and I have been in the climate fight together for some time now, and I can say with my whole heart she’s exactly the kind of leader I had in mind when I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: someone who listens to their community, stands up to powerful polluters, and never hesitates to put people over profits.**
And in New Mexico, the stakes couldn’t be higher: extreme heat, scarce and contaminated water, the Rio Grande — the lifeblood of the state — drying up before our eyes. Deb’s on the frontlines of this fight. That’s why I’m throwing my hat in to support her, and I need you with me.
**[You can bet the pundits and corporate polluters will be watching to see if Deb has the grassroots strength to become the next governor of New Mexico. I know she does. But she needs each and every one of us. Will you make a donation today to directly support Deb’s campaign for Governor?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251019_1_fonda.VRvHI1&amount=5&refcode=em20251019-5113&t=1&akid=5113%2E400544%2EH8JPW9)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251019_1_fonda.VRvHI1&amount=5&refcode=em20251019-5113&t=20&akid=5113%2E400544%2EH8JPW9)**
I’ve always admired Deb. She’s a 35th-generation New Mexican who has traveled to every corner of her state — not out of obligation, but out of love for the people who call New Mexico home.
As Secretary of the Interior, she fought to protect our public lands and water. She created the Climate Task Force and launched the American Climate Corps to prepare young people for good-paying clean energy jobs and climate careers.
_Some of you may even remember that I personally urged President Biden to nominate her as Interior Secretary because she’s just that good._
As a member of Congress, she fought alongside local governments and Tribal partners to defend public lands, protect access to water, and preserve our wildlife.
And as Governor, she’s determined to expand renewable energy and put New Mexico on the path to zero emissions by 2050.
Deb is a leader of integrity, vision, and true public service. She’s who we need protecting New Mexico’s lands, waters, and air from Donald Trump, polluters, and profiteers.
**But no one — not me, not even someone as fearless as Deb — can do this work alone. It will take all of us chipping in what we can, when we can to elect a true champion for climate and working people as the next Governor of New Mexico.**
**[I’m asking again because this race truly matters for the future of our country: Will you join me in supporting Deb by making your first donation to her campaign today?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251019_1_fonda.VRvHI1&amount=5&refcode=em20251019-5113&t=21&akid=5113%2E400544%2EH8JPW9)**
Your donation, along with contributions like it from people all over the country, is how we will defend this critical seat and chip away at Trump’s dangerous agenda once and for all.
Thank you for being a part of this movement.
With gratitude,
Jane Fonda
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/807?c0=em_ms_dh_20251019_1_fonda.VRvHI1&amount=5&%3Brefcode=em20251019-5113&t=22&akid=5113%2E400544%2EH8JPW9)

clean_body: I’m reaching out today with an important message. It's Jane Fonda! You may know me as an actor or as a bit of a troublemaker in Washington for, well, decades. And I'm proud to still be at it. There’s a lot of noise in politics these days, but when you find someone like Deb Haaland, you pay attention. Deb and I have been in the climate fight together for some time now, and I can say with my whole heart she’s exactly the kind of leader I had in mind when I launched the Jane Fonda Climate PAC: someone who listens to their community, stands up to powerful polluters, and never hesitates to put people over profits. And in New Mexico, the stakes couldn’t be higher: extreme heat, scarce and contaminated water, the Rio Grande — the lifeblood of the state — drying up before our eyes. Deb’s on the frontlines of this fight. That’s why I’m throwing my hat in to support her, and I need you with me. I’ve always admired Deb. She’s a 35th-generation New Mexican who has traveled to every corner of her state — not out of obligation, but out of love for the people who call New Mexico home. Some of you may even remember that I personally urged President Biden to nominate her as Interior Secretary because she’s just that good. As a member of Congress, she fought alongside local governments and Tribal partners to defend public lands, protect access to water, and preserve our wildlife. And as Governor, she’s determined to expand renewable energy and put New Mexico on the path to zero emissions by 2050. Deb is a leader of integrity, vision, and true public service. She’s who we need protecting New Mexico’s lands, waters, and air from Donald Trump, polluters, and profiteers. But no one — not me, not even someone as fearless as Deb — can do this work alone. clean_body: I have grassroots ballot chasers ready to go, I just need you | | | | | Patriot, before I get into the latest from New Jersey, I want to who have stepped up to fund a voter registration staffer or ballot chaser this year. Because of them, we are tied in the polls and ahead of our projections in New Jersey, and this race is 100% winnable. Right now, my grassroots team is on the ground chasing mail-in ballots and preparing to launch our massive get out the vote program to FLIP New Jersey from Blue to RED this November, and we’re having great success. Republicans are returning their mail in ballots at a higher rate than Democrats. This is phenomenal news, but it’s not all good... So far, Democrat voters have requested almost 3 TIMES as many mail-in ballots as Republicans, and they still have more votes “in the bank” than we do. Just like in Pennsylvania in 2024 for President Trump, this year in New Jersey we need to hit our magic number of mail-in and early in person Republican votes cast before election day so we can turn out the rest of our voters and win a decisive victory on Election Day. We truly don’t have a moment to waste... mail-in voting is well underway, in-person Early Voting begins on October 25th, and Election Day is November 4th. Patriot, the momentum is on our side, and the early returns are looking very good, but we have a lot of work to do in the next few weeks if we’re going to flip the Garden State red. We need your help to make the difference. By sponsoring an Early Vote Action staffer, you’re fueling the grassroots work to flip New Jersey RED in 2025. . In Liberty, Scott Presler | | | | | 2465 Centreville Rd., Ste J17-714 Herndon, VA 20171

Happy Sunday,
Peter!

It’s no secret that every movement needs fuel — and ours runs on people
power.

For about the cost of a cup of coffee — just $5 — you can help keep the
Squad Victory Fund going strong as we organize, mobilize, and fight for a

speak truth to power.

Squad Victory HQ

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1580%2E342411%2EqWglRy

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Peter,

The radical left thinks they can dismiss us, calling us**“backward,” “extreme,”** and worse. They’re attacking the Minnesota values I’ve spent a lifetime defending — faith, family, and freedom. But here’s the truth they don’t want you to know: we’re closer than ever to taking back this Senate seat.

With the election fast approaching, _**attention is turning to Minnesota’s Senate race.**_ My opponents, Tim Walz’s lieutenant governor, Peggy Flanagan, and Rep. Angie Craig, thought they had this seat locked up. But a recent poll they commissioned delivered a shock: **Flanagan leads a generic Republican by just two points, and Craig by only four points.**

For the first time since 2008, Republicans have a genuine shot at flipping this seat for Minnesota conservatives and every American on the right.

**[Would you consider contributing $2 or even $8 right now to help me build the campaign we'll need to flip this seat Republican?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3c114fc0e05b4832b95e6afe10139d82&_e=gdonKmWwenTF0wmJ4DYYUf6G3nESstQyMRpTcRDEznSOfMN16g21VPxtRHJO4dJni0h7PmWrsdLEhnheSIK1Q6AYvdL6WTY3TPkps86W3mvfddc8htZc_1_p09hVmjiSvnU20ujg14xE750zKRN0vI3yOQPCEYZPR-mQ-QEP5bJZTQ888UjAK95bo6bMY2nzDluFNx1lvUCpnrVAV-nHvRdQVkKNq35LAzCQ47zWzfyEw49OKhda_fygQmn2D225etm0l8-QxYpaO83rfp4ammv_6jRw98FekVsHj-fIQ-X3l_17p-Wl8fdmMfYwGfAUjt095vigYv0IcyXFyqOtK5yPJY09qFBHXyYozwdmZS2-H1r_J3YJKVLDTY3I4QEVzDEZ8kyhSp5By6oxqqp-G3J7YRuMwA4f-lkCjZuJL742mvFyyKfjzNOAoCjNSebAUFzRY4CnyJheC_0_81ECejVzFL4P02lecYMuXTOjc_fG7OMvAjYe7aS681DCab9tD03USUGvpP5_IUJ_dial7CD14STyNFRVQy_VsO7RPtuX7ncRBMjBJpF7bijsjYjxkmKUrb-kosGT-ojWNDh0-za0IqDcDOQrG_8Gh_qzZI2N0WMDq7uInmZjwZE_ODu2pCGmhkvzDF8HlC_5vCxp12RJJeeojq7mLZwaF-fFjM2TMF_sjJkmUVyd3IPLJK_wL7QN-CWsjSoTvOjYMAg9hmCgghHlJsd9F16XUBPJKmADFHjpUHgsE1x_4EwZPYTCtE1De9w_OwaOltIUnD2ofw%3D%3D)**

I’m Adam Schwarze, a former Navy SEAL Officer and Marine Corps veteran. _**I grew up on Minnesota’s hockey rinks, enlisted after 9/11, and served in over 70 countries, leading high-stakes missions with discipline and resolve.**_ Service is my calling — to my country, my family, and now to you. I’m running for U.S. Senate to fight for the America we love, the one you’ve worked hard to build for your children and grandchildren.

The left’s agenda — pushed by Flanagan and Craig — mocks our heritage, looks back on the chaos of 2020 with rose-colored glasses, and leaves our communities to pay the price. They expect us to stay silent. I know better — and so do you.

**Your legacy is on the line.** This isn’t just an election; it’s a battle for the soul of our nation. I’m the underdog — a regular Minnesotan called to an extraordinary challenge. With your support, we can send a second Navy SEAL to the U.S. Senate to defend our values in Washington.

I’m not asking for a free pass — I’m asking for your partnership. **[Will you chip in $25, $50, $100, or more right now to help me build momentum, win the Republican primary, and defeat the radical left?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=3c114fc0e05b4832b95e6afe10139d82&_e=gdonKmWwenTF0wmJ4DYYUf6G3nESstQyMRpTcRDEznSOfMN16g21VPxtRHJO4dJni0h7PmWrsdLEhnheSIK1Q6AYvdL6WTY3TPkps86W3mvfddc8htZc_1_p09hVmjiSvnU20ujg14xE750zKRN0vI3yOQPCEYZPR-mQ-QEP5bJZTQ888UjAK95bo6bMY2nzDluFNx1lvUCpnrVAV-nHvRdQVkKNq35LAzCQ47zWzfyEw49OKhda_fygQmn2D225etm0l8-QxYpaO83rfp4amoSZIgHrfRw7Qd5FpbOHu0tUFShZny1wHDo2ftHnRnE1dynYMVKl78RFmcx6P0VakKPD5Sk-FgliP-yBDM4e7ukDuviLaDD2uPvQYfPmsZk1qSasEFof_Bf-ph9sKkpMl4ARPTQRub9FGA1eHCmroJ3eLTESGAJEYiRVjLMs1CC6lWCjeZ9v0uQa5KXPNgQQXu4GCC7YnXBOADph6gLCCx2ixU3uTehNXs-AsT0WF-v1wqcK6B8d7ed3ApPjIIxom88tvZpUJh381f5dT7vvNFBQBndd6V2bOWJaEY0MO4JtAPsxYbULhvNc1YO2zbNBY1v4RcIVnIidJtIQ2bqPW6yMkjnIkdjsqRcZUA9JdhqqL3hNwLYOuG3hsJNGN1LPw5nI17pZ1lfVcDKoFhn7ZZrb1juXbs9Dj-jj33uPTiV8gf_79gXjYnYFjqR85QlrudJN7rmJIvbDfr5mlinYa_ZG74MOll6mjFqQtdv85QQp42o94i4gpkB4rQM9tzoPSA%3D%3D)** Every dollar fuels our fight to share my message with voters across Minnesota.

Throughout my career, I have faced myriad challenges, but it’s clear to me that my greatest challenge will be earning your trust as I work to win a Senate seat in Minnesota. The left’s attacks won’t stop, and we need resources to fight back with the strength you expect from a Navy SEAL.

**Together, we can prove them wrong and show Minnesota — and America — that our values still matter.**

With deep gratitude
Adam Schwarze
Proud Marine Veteran
Retired Navy SEAL
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota _**

name: Movement for Freedom
subject: No Kings today or tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POLITIVIST ACTION PAC
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251019_afterNKD_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251019_afterNKD_act]
Hi Peter,
Never forget, this country was founded on the principle that our government was created with the consent of the governed. That’s why we celebrated No Kings Day.
Yesterday, we marched alongside our fellow Americans to oppose Donald Trump’s tyranny. Movement for Freedom was on the ground in Colorado Springs, St. Louis, and Washington, D.C., and we loved seeing neighbors across the country join the fight.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251019_afterNKD_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251019_afterNKD_act]
Together, we demanded that Trump and his allies keep their hands off our rights, elections, and the programs that sustain our communities. He’s trying to control the courts, reshape our laws, and strip our rights to make us less free than we were just a year ago.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251019_afterNKD_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251019_afterNKD_act]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251019_afterNKD_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251019_afterNKD_act]
Resistance comes in many forms. If you couldn’t make it out yesterday, no problem! We have our webinar on October 30th, at 8 PM EST via the Zoom link . We will discuss how to build community and mobilize, no matter where you are.
JOIN OUR WEBINAR [https://us06web.zoom.us/j/83403905130]
And if you can’t make that or are simply not ready to take that step yet, please consider donating to our cause so we can equip our friends, neighbors, and loved ones nationwide with the tools to take back our country and stop Donald Trump’s tyranny. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251019_afterNKD_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251019_afterNKD_act]
In solidarity,
Movement for Freedom
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251019_afterNKD_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_m4f_email-25q4?refcode=x_251019_afterNKD_act] Movement for Freedom is a campaign, founded by former Congresswoman Cori Bush, that calls for radically transforming how we build justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. clean_body: [] Hi Peter, Never forget, this country was founded on the principle that our government was created with the consent of the governed. That’s why we celebrated No Kings Day. Yesterday, we marched alongside our fellow Americans to oppose Donald Trump’s tyranny. Movement for Freedom was on the ground in Colorado Springs, St. Louis, and Washington, D.C., and we loved seeing neighbors across the country join the fight. [] Together, we demanded that Trump and his allies keep their hands off our rights, elections, and the programs that sustain our communities. He’s trying to control the courts, reshape our laws, and strip our rights to make us less free than we were just a year ago. [] [] Resistance comes in many forms. If you couldn’t make it out yesterday, no problem! We have our webinar on October 30th, at 8 PM EST via the Zoom link . We will discuss how to build community and mobilize, no matter where you are. JOIN OUR WEBINAR [] And if you can’t make that or are simply not ready to take that step yet, please consider donating to our cause so we can equip our friends, neighbors, and loved ones nationwide with the tools to take back our country and stop Donald Trump’s tyranny. [] DONATE TODAY [] In solidarity, Movement for Freedom [] Movement for Freedom is a campaign, founded by former Congresswoman Cori Bush, that calls for radically transforming how we build justice, safety, and liberation through love and solidarity. Every single dollar helps us build, train, and fight for the justice we all deserve. Want to learn more? Visit our website at Movement4Freedom.com [] . name: Tyler Bowyer, Turning Point Action
subject: Charlie had the vision and the plan.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION
body:
Faith. Family. Freedom.
A tribute to Charlie & Turning Point Action—see how to help and double your impact today.
|
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e69797707004eb49e36bf763a097281&_e=9G23A-9NNI6_AtL_CyWGqsndguED3ZmBBJZoBtZG6SxdDSnawSdGwIDccLZqfI5ojgjQCx62MNcgAAg-wg943qRIc2fUHgmFoCOEUorP2xv4AZRB-AEcRiQXasAS1ONXbUK3k0stvrHmy_7u_GAH7aTg-GyecIZUMtq0WR8anOliH3KY6qneHYRtmFpamJcCLw9pgS9W1URhGsIEsMqBnjKDcMR9msnAw3y1B7ntCHkRG1GIdHje7zvOZsnM8N0i501ipDRs1F-83Qh9M_ghNd2dzpJqjPLH0cpP9fJeTkhvJzdp9OpP78salPldlRGwlLbcO5-NJ-QobLzJLY859Emgi8STofMDDMCj6jW0MP8bi_tNPdoeUxHEXqi-PrR578jpqaZUW5LcholmaqTpfwzx-5f0dk14gIACIKawZ2weets16PjOwcXFiLCEcVUdjeI9vmDFoqn_rIE43OLau4cRL6XeJZre8-yU6U30x0y9BwZTXhveHLdOa8nnobVKo_H8IZzzTqyJ1OvxTBVUVFTpplZmEblNpcyxk1RDrLmDnOp2AvcdftXwEVpKhzup916KLq5p3BD1swr7kVYSTVRnxh1ACY62egt37B_GcE8I-97B9uHyf_dGAc-y-KObS-a0-X6JQxHbtgSKt7qdGQ-tNX-Jv2Y90ElHUOnyvsksZe468Ji8LUNC98fjG25To1PFwx7YuOk8aG1GjTDpxH0v03OhH9iUp1jWhKM1yvA%3D)
Patriot,When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn’t famous. He wasn’t filling arenas. He wasn’t a household name. A few people told me, _“You’ve gotta meet this guy — he’s doing something big out in Illinois.”_ So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs — surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e69797707004eb49e36bf763a097281&_e=9G23A-9NNI6_AtL_CyWGqsndguED3ZmBBJZoBtZG6SxdDSnawSdGwIDccLZqfI5ojgjQCx62MNcgAAg-wg943qRIc2fUHgmFoCOEUorP2xv4AZRB-AEcRiQXasAS1ONXbUK3k0stvrHmy_7u_GAH7aTg-GyecIZUMtq0WR8anOliH3KY6qneHYRtmFpamJcCLw9pgS9W1URhGsIEsMqBnjKDcMR9msnAw3y1B7ntCHkRG1GIdHje7zvOZsnM8N0iGi1y7kApgmzsCNrd9woyzZoAFtzMO0j_KmJTRLdGiAkh97mu32til_xdisJsoz4wepRCeUHSqkkJsMkGQnIM_E3mK_hto2FxOcgnquNuKoMqWx6NBl5ux0QJPtUUr3v7BxWtpZyZctFDdnc6rhhz7BVtBGsVf-gRqyo8DVu7NQindfeAko0_uOlWfPZgNUFCLZ_AUzwvMvaTYt-vufwS-rbdJtFZdN6MziyHFAEPGCshvezUjuX6sbh4r9yZleZrQ8-KjVszpiFeGpkyWnwJpRULMOH7NzJVUNntCz4DCxvSP5AT7DcSvjAsMYbdDIRaggn8gDKI60gXp8iCq-RLU5tjJreX0MvBfiYe1rnPdkT3eJlFmjCmTjDOIeFVPMdWOeEYz7QN2U5B4Uec7p3jIcnmUx6VZ_Qs2XD--uaMBhWiSspQPIntqKg5vQ2GPFwl4fGCFveIFDXDejzS4s1-Ki4qd-Ic0fD9TXbPEA5Kh3w%3D)
_**Above:** The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began — just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. _
Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... _I knew._ Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn’t have much. But what we had was conviction — and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. **Faith, family, freedom** — and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? _He did it._ He didn’t just build a brand... _He built a machine._ First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation — a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it _from the start._ Charlie and I weren’t just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together.
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e69797707004eb49e36bf763a097281&_e=9G23A-9NNI6_AtL_CyWGqsndguED3ZmBBJZoBtZG6SxdDSnawSdGwIDccLZqfI5ojgjQCx62MNcgAAg-wg943qRIc2fUHgmFoCOEUorP2xv4AZRB-AEcRiQXasAS1ONXbUK3k0stvrHmy_7u_GAH7aTg-GyecIZUMtq0WR8anOliH3KY6qneHYRtmFpamJcCLw9pgS9W1URhGsIEsMqBnjKDcMR9msnAw3y1B7ntCHkRG1GIdHje7zvOZsnM8N0iSdcwsLvZTNf34j2G1_PcKx7ynDGPmRnEvI7-nYmepZ3sEUx-qs0BXIabELwaJiR1yOGvrLTcOEB1y0ppyjjFCa_IwL8D8Y8M9kaupnkwoWQJnbqEA0pkV8V8HkgYkPFqQ-1BrgWxhdYXw5uYyfBX18_8LGJTvCOBZzXrmqK0nAVVL77JmG_L9oEGqo5gx6ekb-ohwJsuDiLtncTXlBVLLfHuVjbZRO-EanZIjAcqWXrVjabT4EF5T2Xy122DrNo-sAhLdN-f4lU6JzcbB973zG64rE7BNPZqX-p_I3_LDiRFJ02-2iQdDkoXAXCu8O0Xl3RLWP0igXqwqHEtpLYed540b0Q-s2kDFteZCktAWfbVwa4A_U9wQKYpmA3Fitme3plS7xHuk_P7Kd_ddL88z8mEegK8UBFBIWlaaUcwZP8QAGOVFeOuPqEkC9ZyMwC92U_a0dp9ZEqyGbkZZeq2VU8ZC0zdTO-H4nj3EAlVWYs%3D)
We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us...We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense — in the very states the GOP had given up on. **And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. ** We didn’t just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right — _and it delivered real results._ 10 for 10. **In every single state we operated in... Trump won.** In Arizona _alone,_ we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes — well beyond the margin of victory. _In Wisconsin?_ 60,000+. _In Nevada?_ 6,000+ — and we won back a district we hadn’t carried in 20 years. _In Michigan?_ 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn’t just make noise... _We made history. _
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e69797707004eb49e36bf763a097281&_e=9G23A-9NNI6_AtL_CyWGqsndguED3ZmBBJZoBtZG6SxdDSnawSdGwIDccLZqfI5ojgjQCx62MNcgAAg-wg943qRIc2fUHgmFoCOEUorP2xv4AZRB-AEcRiQXasAS1ONXbUK3k0stvrHmy_7u_GAH7aTg-GyecIZUMtq0WR8anOliH3KY6qneHYRtmFpamJcCLw9pgS9W1URhGsIEsMqBnjKDcMR9msnAw3y1B7ntCHkRG1GIdHje7zvOZsnM8N0icF4sk9OS1mlf4huqjQMzRS20pXYZXtHyCETU1P2LPrOK0tyF1l9-CglDQSY44Aoo4kVudzQld3whYqf99AkDhTtIRZNVthCsWpWUmmybMG2wRSXtNsqIJIalUxAYTlq8U7uDG1rIlOOVHklpfub5eIH7U0eUYVj8cBUWrav1DYhCn26z6J4lf3EL_NDXQE9WidYYT2jT6BOdEFTS4W11spW36DIkJEwEaIX5WlDeLO69QcDotwFv0LX5CoGbpG1ZneurP9t02HJj19Ae4VYifiTPjNGESoSUNElajmiqiZbVwAwsBulFaXxml5rZlsDUxKH5QpwfN3cqm2JU851MsZcCoFOXNrDeglowcDXOjjWZK0XEL8us6cPsP48NHoQhlTKqEWfEyMVgnBLAl6vgnNYM_N3mYupz6HFbg_adqdP9IRY55cFSn6aBZJgDncA7_fOrhHei8hxleVu4PZaRxotLmn4eUxNkqS7VOi_yFmg%3D)
_**Above:** Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That’s me on the left — still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. _
Patriot, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. _Because Charlie never stopped. _ He didn’t build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they’re losing their kid to the Left... For every student who’s afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? **We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running —**** _and make it stronger than ever._** Everything we’ve felt since the day we lost Charlie — _we must turn it into action._ He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: _“What are we building next?”_ **Well, Patriot, here’s the answer: We’re building the next generation of grassroots power — one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time.**
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e69797707004eb49e36bf763a097281&_e=9G23A-9NNI6_AtL_CyWGqsndguED3ZmBBJZoBtZG6SxdDSnawSdGwIDccLZqfI5ojgjQCx62MNcgAAg-wg943qRIc2fUHgmFoCOEUorP2xv4AZRB-AEcRiQXasAS1ONXbUK3k0stvrHmy_7u_GAH7aTg-GyecIZUMtq0WR8anOliH3KY6qneHYRtmFpamJcCLw9pgS9W1URhGsIEsMqBnjKDcMR9msnAw3y1B7ntCHkRG1GIdHje7zvOZsnM8N0i00uUOw1xGCCfPfp9gRZ48F-nq786SsgWB2r_t-AvS0EzJCt0wsIycj9bWjvMJxcNVZr7DccN4EdV9nY8bX19ykX-ujAQrHvuYLgEcHFES5f2uLLYrMBwKRvvz1n9BD6cCwh_Q7pASSON-LqdW8tgh_Mir-AAfr9lPeWm0_N7-C9QplokSCPcq4SyeP50-tBB7-uVKDhyAS3k9FGh9iZpbxEljcKs_kQPi4FWWilMEmVYnXaOq5XSuHovaVxB4pOGqoX2oKsKz_Vhfq9J099K2peJi8B63wDaDNI8RYxRlfE-_ovhBFw2JDtmsnqoti3zL6_vKVUDhsYI0YrtwQjFOveC2uUNKTe895a11hQcxMstqFJOXOw4jfWjZoJ0VdhvCb25rRSBqC78RjicMYi0x6ede-7u4DgS__C9ZTmb3enC4hmeN_Hg4kDjpPy8ZBhWMCL7ygIC6cNXgaarIWvf_nIdK_HhsDWvbwCfcF9Pves%3D)
**But it doesn’t happen without you.** _So, here’s my ask..._ Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie.Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie.Chase votes for Charlie.Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That’s what Charlie would’ve wanted.I’m not stopping until we save our country. I’m all in — and if you’re reading this, I’m betting that you are, too. If so, I’m honored to fight alongside you. And if you’ve already been with us for a while — thank you. Now, let’s get to work.
**For Charlie.** **God Bless,** **Tyler Bowyer**
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point Action
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e69797707004eb49e36bf763a097281&_e=9G23A-9NNI6_AtL_CyWGqsndguED3ZmBBJZoBtZG6SxdDSnawSdGwIDccLZqfI5ojgjQCx62MNcgAAg-wg943qRIc2fUHgmFoCOEUorP2xv4AZRB-AEcRiQXasAS1ONXbUK3k0stvrHmy_7u_GAH7aTg-GyecIZUMtq0WR8anOliH3KY6qneHYRtmFpamJcCLw9pgS9W1URhGsIEsMqBnjKDcMR9msnAw3y1B7ntCHkRG1GIdHje7zvOZsnM8N0iHR-jvU78Vqx_wsNiOKhuHAzHQUCZBYDNoq02DSmYXEkL_S3UG_-B-hd_7rqRTnUk55JxTstK-iOBwK-OxGv9R3sB4EgxkhXHQXpdx3tdfmtksrLqDttT9_T1RJwLOaYDmfrLPqFCf2Zmgp-BJrRiKPkWpHiWtCzVYZPzu2T9L2xmurVDcFGfoo67l-LSY08qUXrERj2DYbUK7ndiq-9lVWuKBxU0jwDFVENTHTkhcEc0eSMunMvILZEWkEJYzLPOKtIvt8yU14icp8KNFVMuYIM3baHXJLymr06pcnwkSLTCO-VcGwKEy7xV_yLOEuKyEvV4gzhEa5zL-T7SoAU7NRU4COgRhnCJKz7Ej6aOsdrD7aSdZNnWL5vt0jF4-qBW3xcPzR-dfBCvBJP1ROB9L7-m9XDxnznj8Cym2mBg-lAm-8yAUtSTkq4VrGBlFV1P1L1ZhvfY_I4T2vx09q66q1w2myheMWmhu3QhihIeJis%3D)
[**Support Turning Point Action**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8e69797707004eb49e36bf763a097281&_e=9G23A-9NNI6_AtL_CyWGqsndguED3ZmBBJZoBtZG6SxdDSnawSdGwIDccLZqfI5ojgjQCx62MNcgAAg-wg943qRIc2fUHgmFoCOEUorP2xv4AZRB-AEcRiQXasAS1ONXbUK3k0stvrHmy_7u_GAH7aTg-GyecIZUMtq0WR8anOliH3KY6qneHYRtmFpamJcCLw9pgS9W1URhGsIEsMqBnjKDcMR9msnAw3y1B7ntCHkRG1GIdHje7zvOZsnM8N0iti2lZja8wOlo4qwk1AQTCIfqkwOnx65jpZRPHyHAYCF4KJvikHR7CezqMjpJtftCNo4OMwTZaf5OHJE01icTPsgB0bcXLHR0nWVTNdzRpMRmNbuVA7utIW5BRTos88kYPGmv2zoA3qlyiCtnqb68CdWnyvUPMd5j2txU-ssG1-uTIEQdnsipy7b34Fd-cEkyPjcPoCi3rDkbhfN78QNrpCl28GCpCbBhD7jedZ1ZI_5jAUvpE7e-BX1kJdvII9hD-6b_UFt-75AMZz2mqAnDMvzkd4QasEZJRCl0K3kOrV0SO1aNmCs3BVPRwwlGMGhkPnO11U-adFt92btae0ZFqLYbKu3cjrfGSkCqtA_BaiedcaY3Vr5XsPRQSxhO7xtjfHzBXIuEAMfPJmG8Lc1C1xWTGiKOH_aI4zi-kl6TvlwAIFgt6-ociKfYnuIzQYuA2zl-euTCjhqZdN-mWujkQWPHYYZOZiQEMpugS2IPNBA%3D) **P.S.** I would give anything to have Charlie back. But he left us with something powerful — a machine that works... a machine that’s proven and battle-tested. Now it’s time to run it — _and run it like never before._ Bigger. Bolder. More battlegrounds. More victories. **Because right now, thanks to a generous supporter of Turning Point Action, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar — up to $500,000, through October 31.** That means, with your gift today: ✅ 2X the activists trained
✅ 2X the voters registered
✅ 2X the pressure on weak-kneed politicians
✅ 2X the ballot-chasing operations
✅ 2X the grassroots strength the Left can’t stop We don’t need to reinvent anything. Charlie already drew the blueprint and turned the key. So, if you’ve been wondering how to help... If you’ve been asking _“what now?”_ **Then, Patriot, this is your moment to step in, fuel the fight, and take Charlie’s vision to the next level.** Let’s turn this energy — this momentum — into action. **[Let’s deliver America First victories in every corner of this country. And many more for years to come.
