clean_body: Faith. Family. Freedom. A tribute to Charlie & Turning Point Action—see how to help and double your impact today. | Patriot,When I heard of Charlie Kirk, he wasn’t famous. He wasn’t filling arenas. He wasn’t a household name. A few people told me, “You’ve gotta meet this guy — he’s doing something big out in Illinois.” So I went. Charlie was running Turning Point from a modest office in the Chicago suburbs — surviving on coffee and pure belief that America was still worth saving. Above: The original Turning Point HQ in Lemont, Illinois. This is where it all began — just Charlie, a vision, and a mission that changed everything. Back then, we were both organizing young conservatives, both dreaming about how to win back the culture. But when I first sat down with Charlie... I knew. Charlie was the visionary. He had the plan. And I HAD to be part of it. I jumped in and never looked back. From that moment on, I was there for all of it. The early conferences and campuses. The road trips. The rallies. The fights. In those days, our team didn’t have much. But what we had was conviction — and that was more than enough. Because we believed in something BIG. Something real. Something urgent. Faith, family, freedom — and the absolute grit to go build something that could save this country. And Charlie? He did it. He didn’t just build a brand... He built a machine. First, Charlie built a movement that changed the hearts and minds of an entire generation — a seismic shift that flipped the narrative that young people belonged to the Left. Then, he built Turning Point Action to become the grassroots force the Left never saw coming... and beat them at their own game. And, I hitched my wagon to it from the start. Charlie and I weren’t just friends... We were brothers in the fight. We did everything together. We strategized over midnight texts... battled together through COVID, the 2020 Election, and every crisis they threw at us...We created AmericaFest from scratch... launched Turning Point Action to go on offense — in the very states the GOP had given up on. And we rallied a grassroots army that put President Donald J. Trump back in the White House in 2024. We didn’t just talk about chasing ballots... Turning Point Action built the first full-scale, professional ballot-chasing operation on the Right — and it delivered real results. 10 for 10. In every single state we operated in... Trump won. In Arizona alone, we chased over 205,000 low-propensity conservative votes — well beyond the margin of victory. In Wisconsin? 60,000+. In Nevada? 6,000+ — and we won back a district we hadn’t carried in 20 years. In Michigan? 14,000+ votes helped us flip a U.S. House seat and take the state house majority. We didn’t just make noise... We made history. Above: Election Night 2024. Our biggest win yet. That’s me on the left — still fighting beside Charlie, just like we always did. Patriot, I watched Charlie pour everything into this mission. He lived on the road 300+ days a year. We never stopped. Because Charlie never stopped. He didn’t build all of this for clout or clicks... Instead, he did it for this country. For all of us. For every parent who feels like they’re losing their kid to the Left... For every student who’s afraid to speak up... For every American who still believes in this country... Charlie built this movement and this machine for them. For you. And now? After he gave everything for that mission? We have to carry the torch. We have to keep the machine running — and make it stronger than ever. Everything we’ve felt since the day we lost Charlie — we must turn it into action. He used to ask me (and everyone else at Turning Point) all the time: “What are we building next?” Well, Patriot, here’s the answer: We’re building the next generation of grassroots power — one voter, one precinct, one act of courage at a time. But it doesn’t happen without you. So, here’s my ask... Go to church for Charlie. Start a family for Charlie.Join a chapter or coalition for Charlie. Register to vote for Charlie.Chase votes for Charlie.Run for office for Charlie. Commit to WIN. Commit to FIGHT. Commit to FINISH what he started. That’s what Charlie would’ve wanted.I’m not stopping until we save our country. I’m all in — and if you’re reading this, I’m betting that you are, too. If so, I’m honored to fight alongside you. And if you’ve already been with us for a while — thank you. Now, let’s get to work. For Charlie. God Bless, Tyler Bowyer Chief Operating Officer Turning Point Action P.S. I would give anything to have Charlie back. But he left us with something powerful — a machine that works... a machine that’s proven and battle-tested. Now it’s time to run it — and run it like never before. Bigger. Bolder. More battlegrounds. More victories. Because right now, thanks to a generous supporter of Turning Point Action, your gift will be matched dollar-for-dollar — up to $500,000, through October 31. That means, with your gift today: ✅ 2X the activists trained ✅ 2X the voters registered ✅ 2X the pressure on weak-kneed politicians ✅ 2X the ballot-chasing operations ✅ 2X the grassroots strength the Left can’t stop We don’t need to reinvent anything. Charlie already drew the blueprint and turned the key. So, if you’ve been wondering how to help... If you’ve been asking “what now?” Then, Patriot, this is your moment to step in, fuel the fight, and take Charlie’s vision to the next level. Let’s turn this energy — this momentum — into action. PAID FOR BY TURNING POINT ACTION (TPACTION.COM) AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE 4930 East Beverly RoadPhoenix, Arizona 85044

body:
I’m out of options...
| **__A Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik__**
---
Friend,
---
Kathy Hochul is raising millions of dollars to BUY New York.
---
**Meanwhile, we’re struggling to raise the final $18,020 we need to reach our critical fundraising benchmark with only hours to go until the mid-month cutoff at 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT! **
---
At this late hour, I’m out of options. We don’t have any campaign checks left to cash, or any emergency funds we can draw from...
---
...My only hope of reaching our goal is this one final note to all of my _TOP_ grassroots supporters.

_As always: If you’ve given all that you can, or can’t afford to contribute right now, please simply disregard what I’m about to ask._

clean_body: I’m out of options... | A Note from Rep. Elise Stefanik Friend, Kathy Hochul is raising millions of dollars to BUY New York. Meanwhile, we’re struggling to raise the final $18,020 we need to reach our critical fundraising benchmark with only hours to go until the mid-month cutoff at 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT! At this late hour, I’m out of options. We don’t have any campaign checks left to cash, or any emergency funds we can draw from... ...My only hope of reaching our goal is this one final note to all of my TOP grassroots supporters. As always: If you’ve given all that you can, or can’t afford to contribute right now, please simply disregard what I’m about to ask. But if you can spare even just $5 to help us reach this goal, I could urgently use the support. Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

The "experts" said Elon was finished and Tesla was headed for bankruptcy.

Now they're saying the same thing, but Jeff has uncovered Tesla's next breakthrough.

[Click here to see why Tesla's about to prove everyone wrong... again.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=bdfc5afc262a4c8c914414a492885056&_e=iy14oCGN5KHKcenrk4qLdR0HBlWUas94dqvvpnfTAX9roOJxELg2IGUKDg_MXb4UA897TPrJjqDx5smIwn8gxapAjTDHR5H2DdPRzcLdQw5WsrnasfV1b_qBKvfe1wGoMwRiu7lTFKXVSzOaaT2qk17KK32WImJzStw6eA02a6Fg5mXfELZzxn2MMa8pu2ytj5TetiovRxW0IYdWXSaVhLiIjfR4u57ZBA090IwWlFLYoCB_GQ_AK4d9BPeGUVh2I5jfnNoBl5BdGXMQVaTpymg1Kb15yLPB9thcAgSev6voCxPy4GZ_U2Z_Lrn65fZvuH-OkYl7pWJseCg_jHRA5xglG91hBwYjWSgFoYYgnc_tPthwrd1N5cJ_DjCbYRUDKmpaZnxivJBxS2quBQLBirnAjpEMiKdk01RHCslm0bGwvz9ZyEGeaHrTEAbwHrD7_JfQH--rFGuXNj6WejFDkjXuu9EPMoBiFW7sDCAhKKwa7OaJs6AXzhJVSPlDkBw5JcsLEiuoWL10lIkmVMX00-Q15g97jxLYlekGQWn0GQgkJmjW0ioehLJN4TBLA0yQ)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

Again | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. Back in 2018, when Jeff Brown told everyone to buy Tesla... The "experts" said Elon was finished and Tesla was headed for bankruptcy. Now they're saying the same thing, but Jeff has uncovered Tesla's next breakthrough. Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from YourCapitalMinds.com, an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. subject: James, Denise, Deb, Leslie, and Kyle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress
body:
This is not just about numbers. These are our neighbors’ lives.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117587102/576978451/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.10.19_Aberdeen_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWUyNzAzZS0xMGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4MUx-gX0GQ0vzz6gbL-FiErU1Y_cqFvwbFjKxVPzvl8=&emci=d7cdc3b1-8aab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9ae2703e-10ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23483442) | Peter, Republicans have shut down the government for three weeks, and folks in my district are being hit hard. I sat down with a group of my neighbors in Aberdeen whose lives depend on the Affordable Care Act and Medicaid — and who are terrified about what comes next. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117587103/576978452/881106841?hl=en&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.10.19_Aberdeen_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWUyNzAzZS0xMGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4MUx-gX0GQ0vzz6gbL-FiErU1Y_cqFvwbFjKxVPzvl8=&emci=d7cdc3b1-8aab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9ae2703e-10ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23483442) I heard from James, a caregiver for his partner with Parkinson’s. From Denise, who pays $2,000 per month for health care while managing lupus. From Kevin, a father of an Autistic son and the husband of a breast cancer survivor. From Deb, who is retired and on a fixed income. From Leslie, a mental health provider who is struggling to afford her insurance. And from Kyle at the Arc of Grays Harbor, advocating for people with developmental disabilities who rely on Medicaid. **Their stories matter. Their fears are real**. In our state alone, monthly premiums for ACA coverage could rise by $1,510 on average — pricing out 80,000 Washingtonians. This is not just about numbers. These are our neighbors’ lives. Thank you to everyone who shared their story. [_**If you haven’t yet, please add your name to demand that Republicans reopen the government, and share your story about how the shutdown is affecting you →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117587104/576978453/1241993385?contactdata=ZA0EU8Es80KvrS/+2aTLlMu8sOgYYxt3MrGAJQtUFnLGjENQei/xMcePujdDnk4yyTHI77bMXc9blXF9KZe5LiENbh7lmn1rd43is+IQlVNEN3K0bSy9nYwCfa658QjSLjiRm/kkYEXP7MZBvEtDVF4oCf3llbj+x74ZdjlPTxQ=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.10.19_Aberdeen_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWUyNzAzZS0xMGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4MUx-gX0GQ0vzz6gbL-FiErU1Y_cqFvwbFjKxVPzvl8=&emci=d7cdc3b1-8aab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9ae2703e-10ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23483442) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117587105/576978454/1241993385?contactdata=ZA0EU8Es80KvrS/+2aTLlMu8sOgYYxt3MrGAJQtUFnLGjENQei/xMcePujdDnk4yyTHI77bMXc9blXF9KZe5LiENbh7lmn1rd43is+IQlVNEN3K0bSy9nYwCfa658QjSLjiRm/kkYEXP7MZBvEtDVF4oCf3llbj+x74ZdjlPTxQ=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.10.19_Aberdeen_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YWUyNzAzZS0xMGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4MUx-gX0GQ0vzz6gbL-FiErU1Y_cqFvwbFjKxVPzvl8=&emci=d7cdc3b1-8aab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=9ae2703e-10ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=23483442) I’m fighting every day in Congress to protect the health care you depend on. – Emily

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: Partisanship should not get in the way of healing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Hi friend,

October is Breast Cancer Awareness Month, a time to honor the brave fighters and survivors battling this disease across the country. Their courage is inspiring, and their fight deserves our full support.

But while we raise awareness, President Trump and his cabinet have slashed cancer research funding, putting countless lives at risk and undermining hope for breakthroughs and cures. Cutting billions from the National Cancer Institute and related programs is nothing short of a slap in the face to every person fighting cancer and their families.

Our nation should be investing in life-saving research, not focusing on bogus science to fit an agenda.

I’m committed to fighting back against these dangerous cuts and advocating for the funding necessary to accelerate cancer research and save lives.

I need your help to stay in the fight and keep Democrats in Congress to continue battling for funding for critical research. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Oct2025-FR-October?&refcode=E15710-20251017-BreastCancerAwarenessMonth-SL-GOP&amount=25]

Fight Back [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Oct2025-FR-October?&refcode=E15710-20251017-BreastCancerAwarenessMonth-SB-GOP&amount=25]

Together, we can make sure no politician’s budget decisions get in the way of hope and healing.

- Eric

subject: I want to try and get to Heaven.

body:
I believe He saved me for a reason, and this is why I think He did it!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
Friend,
**I want to try and get to Heaven.**
Last year I came millimeters from death when that bullet pierced through my skin. My triumphant return to the White House was never supposed to happen!
But I believe that God saved me for one reason: **TO MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!**
I wasn’t supposed to beat Crooked Hillary in 2016 — but I did.
I wasn’t supposed to secure the border & build the greatest economy in history — but I did.
I certainly wasn’t supposed to survive an assassin’s bullet — but by the grace of the almighty God, I did.
SO NOW, I have no other choice but to answer the Call to Duty, but I can’t do it alone.
Friend, you’ve been with me through everything.
You were there when they launched: the Russia Hoax, the first Impeachment, the second Impeachment, the rigged 2020 election, the Raid on Mar-a-Lago, the Arrest and Mugshot at the Fulton County Jail, the Removal from the CO ballot, the sham cases in DC / FL / NY / DC, the first Assassination attempt, the second Assassination attempt, and so much more!
Just because I won in a HISTORIC landslide and have unleashed the Golden Age of America, **THAT DOESN’T MEAN WE CAN TAKE OUR FOOT OFF THE GAS!**
The forces that hate our country don’t want a secure border or safe cities or high paying jobs. The Radical Left Lunatics want to STOP MAGA, but we’re not going to let them NO MATTER WHAT.
**Let me make this SOLEMN PLEDGE to you: I WILL NEVER SURRENDER!**
I put my life on the line willingly because this is what I was made to do, but our movement, the beautiful MAGA movement, is powered by YOU.
Every time they count us out – count YOU out – we come back bigger, better, and stronger than ever before.
This is our moment to show the world that we will NEVER back down, NEVER give an inch, and NEVER SURRENDER in our fight to save this country.
_That’s why I’ve launched a 24 HOUR TRUMP FUNDRAISING BLITZ, and I’m asking everyone to chip in $15 to make it one for the record books!_
**_[So if you’re with me all the way to the end, join with MILLIONS of your fellow PATRIOTS by chipping in $15 to keep the wins rolling in!>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
[GIVE $15](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Sincerely,
Donald John Trump

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[STAND WITH TRUMP](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

name: Letitia James
subject: The Trump administration is indicting me.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?refcode=101325_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?refcode=101325_2]
Peter, by now, you've likely heard the news: Donald Trump and his administration have indicted me on baseless charges – all because I’ve done my job as Attorney General.
For months now, we've seen Trump manipulate the justice system in a coordinated effort to go after his political opponents for defending the rule of law.
I knew that holding the most powerful and corrupt accountable – especially the president – could make me a target. But I'm not about to back down now, and I know you aren't either, Jessica.
Trump is escalating his political retribution campaign – and I need your immediate help to fight back.
We must show, right now, that the American people reject his dangerous political revenge campaign. I'm calling for 20,000 rapid-response donations today to send an unmistakable message: We won’t back down. Will you rush a donation split between me and The Real Texas right now to help me stand firm and keep fighting? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?refcode=101325_2]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Letitia James and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-james?express_lane=true&refcode=101325_2&amount=5]

Thank you for being in this with me.
– Letitia James

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: What my 2025 Governor's race means for the 2026 midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Our race has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our nation's history.
#
Peter, I don't just want to win. I want to win big.
**Because as Democrats, the bigger we win here in Virginia, the louder a message we'll send ahead of the 2026 midterms.** Our race has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our country's history.
And can I be honest for a minute? _That's a lot of weight on my shoulders._
_But I'm ready to seize the moment._ And with you by my side — giving $15 or whatever you can to emails like this one — we'll have the resources to keep airing ads, contacting voters, and setting an example for the entire nation to follow for years to come.
**[Peter, I can't do it without you! Will you split a donation between State Democrats Committee and my campaign for Governor today to make sure we have what it takes to win big this November?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96783?refcode=em20251019-9597&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9597%2E614464%2EUqbCY1)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

subject: Win a Trip to Vegas for Our Influencer Range Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Brandon Herrera Victory Committee
body:
Friend,
I'm excited to announce our next giveaway: an all-expenses-paid trip for two to Las Vegas to attend our Influencer Range Day in early November.
The winner and a guest will join me and my friends, including popular YouTube creators, celebrities, and athletes, as we fire the coolest machine guns out in the Nevada desert.
And it's all for a great cause: helping my campaign to defeat the most anti-Second Amendment, anti-Constitution "Republican" in Congress, Tony Gonzales.
Every $5 you donate earns you one entry into our drawing. $10 gets you two entries, $100 gets you 20 entries, and so on.
This may be our biggest Range Day yet, and I can't wait to call the lucky winner and tell them to pack their bags for Sin City.
Make your donation today at [https://BrandonHerreraforCongress.com/Donate](https://contact.brandonherreraforcongress.com/l/6fI53a1vdu7637OWRF387YCA/hrCV9cslkVrNvJaWStTRvA/AqttRMUy7oCmwaG950TCjQ).
.

Brandon Herrera

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: Supporters like you make Molly Cook’s leadership possible
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We need to keep the youngest and most progressive Texas State Senator fighting for us and changing the future.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20251019-1&t=1&akid=2755%2E587540%2EntBppc)
Hi Peter,
Molly Cook isn’t just another politician. She’s the type of leader Texas, the Democratic Party, and our country desperately need right now.
Leaders We Deserve was founded to empower bold, progressive young voices who fight for their community. That’s Molly. We went all in to help her win last cycle — and it came down to just 74 votes. Now we need your help to keep her in the fight.
**[Please split a contribution of $5 between Molly Cook and Leaders We Deserve today to keep one of the best young, progressive leaders in the game.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251019_1_cook.vgPvad&refcode=em20251019-2755&amount=5&t=3&akid=2755%2E587540%2EntBppc)**
**[ Donate $5 » ](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251019_1_cook.vgPvad&amount=5&refcode=em20251019-2755&t=4&akid=2755%2E587540%2EntBppc) **
Molly’s story is what real public service looks like. She’s an ER nurse, community organizer, and at 34, the youngest (and most progressive) member of the Texas Senate.
She saw what was broken in her community — so she ran to fix it. She’s had an abortion in Texas and knows what’s at stake for reproductive rights. She’s treated patients harmed by polluting corporations and unsafe infrastructure, so she fights for environmental reform and safer roads.
She consistently shows up where it matters — for people, not corporations. She strikes with workers, attends community events, and makes herself accessible to her constituents. Just last month, **she hosted 9 town halls** — while some members of Congress go years without hosting _a single one._
And she doesn’t just talk — she delivers. In her first year, she’s already passed several major laws and brought home $100M in investments to her community.
She’s also a lesson in bold, unapologetic leadership in action — and Democrats everywhere should take notes. When Texas Republicans redrew districts to suppress voters, Molly walked out of the statehouse to break quorum — then went straight back to her district to knock doors, organize, and educate her community on what was at stake. When GOP leaders prioritized gerrymandering over urgently needed flood relief, she called them out over and over again — just one of the many times she’s gone viral for holding MAGA accountable.
**Molly represents everything the Democratic Party should be: authentic, courageous, and unafraid to fight for what’s right or to take on Trump and MAGA.**
But Molly won her last primary — beating a Democrat who wanted to arm teachers — by just _74 votes._ And with everything at stake right now, we can’t afford to lose a leader like her.
**[Can you donate $5 or anything you can right now to help us defend Molly Cook and continue empowering leaders like her?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251019_1_cook.vgPvad&refcode=em20251019-2755&amount=5&t=5&akid=2755%2E587540%2EntBppc)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20251019_1_cook.vgPvad&amount=5&refcode=em20251019-2755&t=24&akid=2755%2E587540%2EntBppc)**
Every dollar and every ounce of support matters. It’s the difference between empowering the next generation of bold, progressive leaders — or letting the Democratic Party anchor itself to the establishment’s sinking ship.
Thank you for your support,
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20251019-1&t=25&refcode2=2755_587540_ntBppc&akid=2755%2E587540%2EntBppc)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=2755%2E587540%2EntBppc)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2755%2E587540%2EntBppc)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

name: Tina for Oregon
subject: Tina will not back down.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
Trump’s attacks on our rights cannot go unanswered. |

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Did you catch me on CNN? ➡️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I went on CNN to tell the truth about this shutdown.
#
Did you catch my interview with Jake Tapper on CNN last week?
[](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251018-1.Ri7q6Z&refcode=em20251019-2418&amount=5&t=1&akid=2418%2E21716%2EXbQcwV)
I joined _The Lead_ to discuss the government shutdown — and make it clear who’s responsible.
Because, despite what Republicans and some in the media want you to believe, **this shutdown was created by the GOP, period.**
Republicans had _all year long_ to extend ACA tax credits — and refused. Now, thousands of Delawareans are furloughed, and thousands more are receiving letters notifying them of skyrocketing premium costs.
So when Jake asked me why Democrats won’t just make a handshake deal to pass the MAGA funding bill, and _hope_ Republicans keep their word and fix ACA subsidies before they expire — I didn’t mince words.
**We cannot trust Republicans to end a crisis they started. This is a shutdown they manufactured to raid Americans’ health care so they can fund tax breaks for their billionaire donors.**
Many seem to forget that Republicans have _total_ control of D.C. right now — if they actually cared about keeping the government open and protecting access to care for millions of Americans, _they would have done it by now._
But as long as Republicans control the House, they’ll keep manufacturing chaos and gutting lifelines for working families to help the rich get even richer.
**I’m not backing down — but to keep fighting back, go all in on flipping the House in 2026, and hold Republicans accountable, I need your support.**
Grassroots donations allow me to stay laser-focused on re-opening the government, holding the line for healthcare, and making sure Republicans don’t get away with this.
[**If you’re able to — I’m asking that you chip in $5 or anything else you can give to back up our fight.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251018-1.Ri7q6Z&refcode=em20251019-2418&amount=5&t=2&akid=2418%2E21716%2EXbQcwV)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20251018-1.Ri7q6Z&refcode=em20251019-2418&amount=5&t=21&akid=2418%2E21716%2EXbQcwV)**
Thank you so much for your support.
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20251018-1&t=22&refcode2=2418_21716_XbQcwV&akid=2418%2E21716%2EXbQcwV)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=23&akid=2418%2E21716%2EXbQcwV)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=24&akid=2418%2E21716%2EXbQcwV)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=2418%2E21716%2EXbQcwV)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

Now we have to channel this energy into real political power at the ballot box. The **2025 special elections** will be our first test. clean_body: Let's turn these protests into progress. | | The movement is surging and the message is clear: Americans will not bow to Trump or his MAGA extremists. Yesterday, millions of people flooded the streets for the " No Kings" protests, declaring that no one man is above the law. Especially not Donald Trump. | From New York to Texas to California, Americans of every background are standing shoulder to shoulder to reject authoritarianism and defend our democracy. This is the moment we've been waiting for --the spark that can ignite a new blue wave. But protest alone isn't enough. Now we have to channel this energy into real political power at the ballot box. The 2025 special elections will be our first test. The 2026 midterms are how we finish the job -- by electing candidates who fight for working people, defend democracy, and end Trump's reign of fear for good. The blue wave is coming -- but only if we meet this moment together. -- No Dem Left Behind | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind 1030 15th St NW #404 Washington, DC 20005 | Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC Not Authorized by Any Federal Candidate or Candidate's Committee. | | Sent via . name: All On The Line Missouri
subject: Bad news and good news in Missouri
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We need your support to push back against this attack on fair representation
|
---

**Missouri Gov. Signs Extreme Gerrymander,
Ballot Initiative Crackdown Into Law — _Democracy Docket_**
Peter,
**First, the bad news:** Last month, Missouri Governor Mike Kehoe signed a Trump-instigated gerrymandered map into law and proposed a constitutional amendment to authorize extreme changes to the state’s ballot initiative process.
The gerrymandered map eliminates one of two districts represented by Black members of Congress in the state — a direct attack on fair representation.
The proposed constitutional amendment would drastically alter the petition process — which, for over a century, required only a statewide majority to pass — to require a majority in _all eight congressional districts_. It’s a reform that makes it nearly impossible for amendments to pass through the initiative process, and this attempted crackdown is no accident.
**This is just the latest in a long line of anti-democracy attacks across the country.**
**Here’s the good news:** Missourians could still overturn the state’s gerrymandered map through the state’s referendum process. As you read this, pro-voter groups are mobilizing to stop this map from taking effect.
All On The Line is committed to pushing back against these attacks on fair representation. We’re mobilizing voters to fight back and speak out against dangerous legislation like this in Missouri and across the country.
[**Will you make a donation to help power this work to fight for fair maps and a truly representative democracy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117588210/576982527/2109033857?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_MOBallotInitiative_email_20251019-AOTL-Tier1-MOBallotInitiative_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251019-AOTL-Tier1-MOBallotInitiative_&utm_campaign=MOBallotInitiative&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjdmOTczMjZiLTE1YWQtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=oCFuVYzl1N87iiJwGZiUy3Xm4imTH9yvnjUKJz9ZWEo=)

clean_body: We need your support to push back against this attack on fair representation | Missouri Gov. Signs Extreme Gerrymander, Ballot Initiative Crackdown Into Law — Democracy Docket Peter, First, the bad news: Last month, Missouri Governor Mike Kehoe signed a Trump-instigated gerrymandered map into law and proposed a constitutional amendment to authorize extreme changes to the state’s ballot initiative process. The gerrymandered map eliminates one of two districts represented by Black members of Congress in the state — a direct attack on fair representation. The proposed constitutional amendment would drastically alter the petition process — which, for over a century, required only a statewide majority to pass — to require a majority in all eight congressional districts. It’s a reform that makes it nearly impossible for amendments to pass through the initiative process, and this attempted crackdown is no accident. This is just the latest in a long line of anti-democracy attacks across the country. Here’s the good news: Missourians could still overturn the state’s gerrymandered map through the state’s referendum process. As you read this, pro-voter groups are mobilizing to stop this map from taking effect. All On The Line is committed to pushing back against these attacks on fair representation. We’re mobilizing voters to fight back and speak out against dangerous legislation like this in Missouri and across the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, The All On The Line Team is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from AOTL by automated text message. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. name: Voter Action Project
subject: Let Congress know we won't let working people be political pawns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Folks,
We can't believe it either, but President Trump announced furloughed federal workers may never get the paychecks they lost during his shutdown. He thinks some “don’t deserve” it. That’s right — the people who inspect our food, care for veterans, and protect our national parks are being told they might never be paid for weeks of missed work. It’s cruel, it’s unprecedented, and it’s wrong.
Congress has the power to fix this right now by passing emergency legislation guaranteeing every furloughed worker full back pay — no exceptions, no excuses. Every previous Congress has made workers whole once the government reopened. But now Trump is breaking that promise — using everyday workers as political pawns.
Experts told ABC News this move is “ punitive and unprecedented .” And they’re right. Families have missed rent, drained savings, and lined up at food banks — all because of political games from a billionaire president who’s never had to worry about a paycheck. We can’t let Trump get away with this attack on working people.
Send a letter today and demand Congress act immediately to pay furloughed workers the paychecks they’ve earned and deserve >> [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/pay-furloughed-workers-the-money-they-deserve?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
SIGN HERE NOW ⇨ [https://actionnetwork.org/letters/pay-furloughed-workers-the-money-they-deserve?source=direct_link&referrer=group-integrity-first-voter-action-project&redirect=https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-actions]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=101925_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=101925_1&amount=20]

body:
Trump is FUMING, we’re THRILLED!

**We’re THRILLED — and Trump is _FURIOUS._ He’s lashing out at Democrats, attacking politicians, and throwing temper tantrums!**

But Friend, our main objective at the Voter Protection Project is to protect voting — _and voters._

That’s why we _need to know_ if _YOU_ were among the millions of brave Democrats who showed up in protest, Friend:

name: Nellie Pou
subject: This is what delivering looks like
body:
Fighting for healthcare, for our rights, and for New Jersey

| |
---
Hi friend, When I talk about delivering for the district, I mean making government work for people. Right now, the fight in Washington is about protecting our healthcare. House Republicans are playing games during this shutdown while families worry about rising costs. If they get their way, healthcare premiums could double next year. I will not let that happen. I have always believed that leadership is about standing firm when it matters most. That means protecting affordable healthcare, defending our rights, and fighting for a better New Jersey. This isn't about headlines or who's winning the shutdown battle. What I know is that working families are losing, and if MAGA Republicans get their way, it will only get worse. **I refuse to let that happen.** Our families deserve leaders who care more about solutions than slogans. That is what I am fighting for every single day. **[If you believe in that kind of leadership, I hope you will stand with me today. clean_body: Fighting for healthcare, for our rights, and for New Jersey | | Hi friend, When I talk about delivering for the district, I mean making government work for people. Right now, the fight in Washington is about protecting our healthcare. House Republicans are playing games during this shutdown while families worry about rising costs. If they get their way, healthcare premiums could double next year. I will not let that happen. I have always believed that leadership is about standing firm when it matters most. That means protecting affordable healthcare, defending our rights, and fighting for a better New Jersey. This isn't about headlines or who's winning the shutdown battle. What I know is that working families are losing, and if MAGA Republicans get their way, it will only get worse. I refuse to let that happen. Our families deserve leaders who care more about solutions than slogans. That is what I am fighting for every single day. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. name: Nico, United We Dream
subject: 95 members of Congress demand answers on DACA abductions
body:
You can take action against the unlawful targeting of DACA recipients and immigrant youth. | | | Peter — 95 members of Congress are calling out the aggressive and unlawful ways in which DACA recipients are being targeted in mass abductions. In a letter sent to the Department of Homeland Security (DHS), these 95 members of Congress demanded to know how many people protected under DACA have been abducted by immigration agents or deported. **This is exactly the kind of leadership we need right now.** As the letter states: _"Given the scale of immigration enforcement operations and the lack of transparency... it is reasonable to believe that additional DACA recipients have been detained or deported."_ This is what we've been documenting through our Immigrant Youth Abductions Tracker. Nearly _20 DACA recipients_ and _dozens more immigrant youth_ have been abducted and detained this year. Despite active protections, our classmates, neighbors, and friends are being abducted and cruelly separated from their families. **These are not isolated incidents. They are glaring warning signs that the government**** _is_****escalating its mass abduction agenda and going after DACA recipients to meet its quotas.** **** [**If they can come for someone with DACA, they can come for anyone. It's time to come together as a community to demand change. Will you contribute today to power our work advocating for the rights and dignity of all immigrants in the U.S.?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAe8Sk-mszjkMhsJ-F4ZsGR5BVlj9mZDeZJF-qxCLmcdaqhVA4TfvgrHlqUye5S5ofjS0AwNr4JNBlAIcnV4xDHjbqJ94vOvZu_zI6i0fmy16NHvDqts6NXdzgUuWK-rwlmyjzTSMJxgqA1nsYAMfjJKUQvcFjV3tLixzuN7qpz-ojq-BqtW7M3vI8BvScPkQrd9fOa1nXVrYCOn42mMCjP4MwB2QvF08Wj0Porwad5TKiwp2li4BIbcVTW_qcwsZusZ7Hxe09kTqaW026FFbkoMUXWq6L9G3lDCX18G8R4vSfqiumSo7-mtzW10DXwMCb4J_YPg-kQ_nSvSxNys43YpN5ieh1GxLPC6vGmR4011xiCA8yCGfzZUS_-H4pX3EyqYQ4uTrT4PFiGsSF_zSY2dsebudLYiqt_LyEK3GrpZ-HwHd4WXKvN1eXbybkneDYs/4kv/JmkI9P8YQHaswg5Dj1aVmA/h0/h001._Mm0pVeDOjo1ooYYJ6MWjIfuXu7I75zG-gvU_dVFq8A) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAe8Sk-mszjkMhsJ-F4ZsGR5BVlj9mZDeZJF-qxCLmcdaqhVA4TfvgrHlqUye5S5ofjS0AwNr4JNBlAIcnV4xDHjXUUmWSvvw4PSkB4L1amLptCBFyyqDt8rig7pPJf1iaxbpSkQYAx9f3faQe6dWzujDbvFx9Fr1BM-SwukNSK4yyuEX5SnDPE4QM3mKtNkxKI4_Cc8QfsFquMmBtv04MU9OvbBzhUdVLY7Qlak0aaKUrXI9CkSSLoRO3UJWb6RcGpczvWFx4Lr-GVOhqonk_FV_fv1ZxDgZo3zuPKn8crTP3Ui9uF9qzYVg9ZUZr2JdNwnCdGL6yp1fXLuHFUmrHBjNVmfMp6ZkzqQ17yBotfF32Ll7bXN6aoIn3xewDziDVz1YXSPXLkIqSriwzkuhYboajaqVnNVo4gje4Y7lqFH2SZLcLJmUtXj9fXzzC6PPTuAHQ6VyL_9bXUj6S6BYKSgQ/4kv/JmkI9P8YQHaswg5Dj1aVmA/h1/h001.aUIqY1BkGmnn2xnlS-O5NvJApsy782vPOtVJnXskjkM)

clean_body: You can take action against the unlawful targeting of DACA recipients and immigrant youth. | | | Peter — 95 members of Congress are calling out the aggressive and unlawful ways in which DACA recipients are being targeted in mass abductions. In a letter sent to the Department of Homeland Security (DHS), these 95 members of Congress demanded to know how many people protected under DACA have been abducted by immigration agents or deported. This is exactly the kind of leadership we need right now. As the letter states: "Given the scale of immigration enforcement operations and the lack of transparency... it is reasonable to believe that additional DACA recipients have been detained or deported." This is what we've been documenting through our Immigrant Youth Abductions Tracker. Nearly 20 DACA recipients and dozens more immigrant youth have been abducted and detained this year. Despite active protections, our classmates, neighbors, and friends are being abducted and cruelly separated from their families. These are not isolated incidents. They are glaring warning signs that the government isescalating its mass abduction agenda and going after DACA recipients to meet its quotas. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. ** Thank you for taking action against the unlawful targeting of DACA recipients and immigrant youth. We cannot and will not stay silent. — Nico, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. Since Donald Trump took office, RFK Jr. has caused SO MUCH damage and destruction.

Just take a look at what he’s done so far:

**-** 📢 Fired [**THOUSANDS**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69539?t=13&akid=23524%2E4449941%2EPt1tL8) of federal health workers
Enough is enough, team.

[**RFK Jr. is DANGEROUS and we want him out of Washington NOW.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69539?t=14&akid=23524%2E4449941%2EPt1tL8)

But we need to know if local Democrats agree. You’re 1 of [32] Democrats selected. We need everyone to respond in order for our data to be valid.
[**Please tell us: Do you trust RFK Jr. as Health and Human Services Secretary?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/69539?t=15&akid=23524%2E4449941%2EPt1tL8)

Fight for Reform Research Team

name: Team Shontel Brown
subject: This is their shutdown.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
How far is the GOP willing to go?

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117589181/576986004/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251016Far_TSB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjM0MmVjZS0xZGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AL3DOTQyUcI8OvmRluChFlIps0k-eoIUMWiRIQsRJEE=) Peter,

Recently, Shontel Brown was interviewed by _Fox 8 News_ , and we wanted to make sure you saw it.

Thanks to the Republicans’ government shutdown, federal workers are working without pay or are forced to stay home. Now, **Trump is illegally firing federal workers** – all to avoid lowering healthcare costs. _Let that sink in._

We have to ask: **How far are Republicans willing to go to avoid making healthcare more affordable?**

As Shontel stated, as she joined a federal workers rally in Cleveland to call for an end to the shutdown, _“I’m calling attention to the recklessness of this current administration.**This is their shutdown.”**_

In OH-11 alone, around 38,000 people will face higher health care costs. That is wrong on every level. **It’s time to cancel the cuts, lower costs, and save healthcare.**

**[With your support, we can work to unseat Republicans in the House who are turning their backs on the American people. Join us as we call for Republicans to stop their senseless attacks on federal workers’ livelihoods and end the healthcare crisis by pitching in $5 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117589186/576986019/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_251016Far_TSB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjM0MmVjZS0xZGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AL3DOTQyUcI8OvmRluChFlIps0k-eoIUMWiRIQsRJEE=)**

Together,

Team Shontel Brown | Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. She has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. As she enters her second full term in Congress, she will use that experience to continue the fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and to preserve and protect our democracy for generations to come. Will you join her and be the change we need?

body:

Peter, one thing that has been true throughout my life is that progress is possible, but not guaranteed.
That progress depends on us and what we do in critical moments such as this one. We have to raise our voices and support the leaders we believe in. It's the only way we will beat back the dangers that Trump poses and create a better future.
[_**That's why I'm asking you to donate to Abigail Spanberger today →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117589427/576986898/-1898250673?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-10-19_3&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTczNDJlY2UtMWRhZC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8MVOyn-gV7NZ2rtas7WQownYgM9O2GkUKfnD5GtlSbY=)

That progress depends on us and what we do in critical moments such as this one. We have to raise our voices and support the leaders we believe in. It's the only way we will beat back the dangers that Trump poses and create a better future. = In a couple of weeks, Abigail can become Virginia's first woman Governor and set an example for the entire country, but each of us must do our part to help make history at the ballot box. name: John Fetterman
subject: fighting for our federal workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10372%2E434096%2EiDFCvV)
| | |
---
Hi Derek,
The Union Way of Life is *sacred.* You don’t mess with it. You fight for it. Always. ✊
**I had to reach out because, right now, the National Federation of Federal Employees union president is calling out Trump’s illegal firings of federal employees during the government shutdown, and I'm 💯 with them.
**
**[If you already know the stakes, you can add your name now to my petition to stand with federal workers. Otherwise, please let me explain what's happening:
](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51811?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=10372%2E434096%2EiDFCvV)**
**First, before the shutdown:** Trump issued two executive orders that stripped collective bargaining from federal workers.

We're talking food inspectors. Veterans' health care workers. Scientists at NASA and The Weather Service. The folks we don't always think about, but who keep this country running.

That's union-busting. Straight up. I wasn't going to let that stand.

So I immediately introduced the Protect America's Workforce Act to repeal Trump's executive orders and restore collective bargaining rights.

**But now, during the shutdown:** While there are 1.4 million federal workers furloughed or working without pay, Trump is gleefully adding to the chaos by recklessly firing hundreds of additional federal workers.

In a late-night firing spree, Trump gutted teams at the CDC that investigate infectious disease outbreaks and protect public health.

And folks in the Department of Education say the latest round of layoffs have *decimated* the office that handles special education programs serving millions of kids and adults with disabilities.
**Trump and his administration are trying to divide and conquer. They're trying to strip the government for parts to sell off to their rich buddies and consolidate power for themselves.
**
But they don't know who they're messing with.

And if we all band together, we can give federal workers the support they need to stand up and fight back.

PA's got more than 60,000 federal workers alone. I'm in their corner. But I need you in this fight, Derek.

**I'm gathering 30,000 signatures by midnight to show federal workers that we've got their backs. **
[**_If you agree our federal workers deserve full rights and protections, especially in the face of Trump's union-busting orders and shutdown firings, will you add your name now?_**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51811?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=10372%2E434096%2EiDFCvV)

| | [Stand With Federal Workers >>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51811?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=10372%2E434096%2EiDFCvV)
---
We have to get loud and send a message: Hands OFF the Union Way of Life. 📣
In solidarity,
John ❤️
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk274-su-fl-footer&t=5&refcode2=10372_434096_iDFCvV&akid=10372%2E434096%2EiDFCvV)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=6&akid=10372%2E434096%2EiDFCvV)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=10372%2E434096%2EiDFCvV)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Chip Roy
subject: Goodbye to the Swamp

body:
I want you to hear about my decision | Fellow American - I am leaving Washington.

I am not running for reelection.

I could serve the 21st Congressional District of Texas forever and be fulfilled professionally. **But representatives should not be permanent.**

It's time for a change.

I am ready to come home to Texas. I want to take my experience in Congress as a federal prosecutor and First Assistant Attorney General to fight for Texas.

**[Let me tell you personally what it means to serve, what it means to be a Texan, and what you can expect from me as Texas's next Attorney General.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=0000102c3d004be1a2af2d4bd706b1e1&_e=84535wBuqJupDWLqS7raoAA4o-eSxXIlzD73qj5RqFcMvtfH-8oM89GJwB9_uU0ZQqxUPHD7wVsb5q5WnAFPiazh5bZ3v_3e3G7Z7CLab6TMWPcH0HFHn8R--3y-McLM31AO08-DwcexxupXOyCcJppWRwb_c-szDHCcODmqA9CBE9NXUo-4QAECoWWGAPxXrFDh7RpDRLvVRgbgdehhRG7fYBBgVv8iya3-01CwEGCbCKjCsY-btZMJbdmyjEmhAQ8a_2llegUYAzaCOyTsnkBC9vVB7RhH8FiAf_EXAleGUX6axCQpDfJgM3gy7w-PxNKTQTgEdfWoauZLMPc0Ow4v1Uok6SvqXOiU2l46f8AQirl_Hh0kthGTBE28jVyFU8vh8X1pSYxnnVmrQHUlSlTD7ww1rptetT5IjxQN7mDNbBIFsrdyN_akbDLHVj0zzqtECME2qNn1-MWsFXR1STxsNl4eeCUNq62OFklgoVZXy3VEldG7ogroPWbER8xmTyAbYLNBnL1i8jqZ8Io4P2Vhs6cn4qQyBeOeZD2kPC1Hr6CFjq82vxYYB7nv3sJZ2mA59reIiOdPf4AxOJaNeoOdMxUca6MZfa0dyPJztebaV_p3iWGYXvimF76bZ1U0DmtZ6QIqn_yIk1uHxGmexBIt7haYZwGTZkF7L3EDg9Y%3D)**

clean_body: I want you to hear about my decision | Fellow American - I am leaving Washington. I am not running for reelection. I could serve the 21st Congressional District of Texas forever and be fulfilled professionally. But representatives should not be permanent. It's time for a change. I am ready to come home to Texas. I want to take my experience in Congress as a federal prosecutor and First Assistant Attorney General to fight for Texas. We have a legacy to protect. I want to serve Texas from Texas. Thanks, Chip Roy | | PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: The Turning Point USA Team
subject: Show the world that YOU are Charlie Kirk’s movement
body:
Please read the message below from Turning Point USA.

* * *
Tell the world you're standing for faith, family, and freedom. | | | | [](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4e8nu&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, _We are Charlie Kirk._ That's the rally cry of millions of Americans — and the message they carry with their "We are Charlie Kirk" wristbands.
---
[](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4e8nu&__onlt=h)
---
We want you to have one. To join the movement carrying Charlie's legacy forward. **When you give any amount today, we'll send you your wristband — a bold symbol of the mission we carry on.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4e8nu&__onlt=h)
---
This isn't just a wristband, Friend. It's a symbol. Of conviction.
Of courage.
Of the movement Charlie built. **When you wear it, you're telling the world you stand for America. For faith. For family. For freedom. And for the vision Charlie ignited.** Your donation fuels the next generation of leaders who will defend these values and never surrender. **Give today and we'll put this powerful symbol in your hands as our thank-you.**
---
[ **Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4e8nu&__onlt=h)
---
Friend, Charlie stood fearlessly for truth, freedom, and the next generation. _Now it's our turn._ Tell the world: You're unafraid to stand with Charlie Kirk and Turning Point USA to save America. Make your first gift today and claim your wristband as a symbol of the mission you've joined.
---
**For Charlie,** The Turning Point USA Team
---
[ **Carry Charlie's Legacy Forward
Claim Your Wristband Today**](https://trk.rightwingreport.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t4e8nu&__onlt=h)

Phoenix, Arizona 85044

name: Adelita Grijalva via Working Families Party
subject: Why Speaker Johnson is blocking me from serving
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Hi Peter, it's Adelita Grijalva. I want to thank the Working Families Party for giving me the chance to reach out to you directly. Last month, voters overwhelmingly rejected the MAGA agenda and chose me to represent them in Congress in Arizona’s 7th District special election. With so much at stake, I came to Washington ready to get to work. **But instead of swearing me in, Speaker Mike Johnson cancelled session and sent members home — not only delaying my ability to take office, but also allowing the government to shut down without even letting the House work toward a solution.** That’s how far Republicans are willing to go to block me from serving. Republicans know that once I’m sworn in, it won’t just chip away at their razor-thin majority — I will become the decisive 218th signature to force a vote on releasing the Epstein files. **This is nothing more than a desperate power play to protect Trump while denying the people of my district a voice in Congress when it’s needed the most.** As Speaker Johnson drags this out, we’re going to prove that our grassroots power can’t be silenced. Each day he continues to delay, we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 to keep our momentum going as we work to take back the House in 2026. **[Peter, will you split a donation of $10 or whatever you can afford today between my campaign and the Working Families Party to help us fight back and make sure their obstruction backfires?](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9vxmXAHdEkqas7UWtKNcldS-hMsUiFdqeBm9hQA5I7X-j_Q3QD0FO2fdohM5qosMZk7Ggj3GlOwD58A8XUu67d0nHZQERGjx3dTgO5KCNuFy5GeYxl24sjdczPJx0Qd3Bs1RbP1FT-EbPxbIG35uNzmwSIKTFbsdgNvEN-eiGW843rXSyASHDw6-rKB8tqaLl1NeKcqnECcjy75YGetA-7fiC2V_daFe-DdGMv360RPVtgCyxZmoZKwLZvHmybYGIyXK-9aJE9LlRD_rOZMMfMDmrqcNB9kf3uk5KEhXQ39pqDSvbzTeHDfdUdfiU1rnJWRyJg7QTHGwEvAAAdN4xELucRoTH58SxN0ahvK8lO1DgANfCi2pf1P7UD4oL8zxw/4kv/O1rqfVOqSmagupYKW9xMNw/h0/h001.-FdYyBc3oychUUgqwhnHYTKhxDJ_mN19W9bEuPIg5jU)** **[Donate »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9vxmXAHdEkqas7UWtKNcldS-hMsUiFdqeBm9hQA5I7X9WA58bB2HmcNjzkn4kHue-PgU9PBELVNC_AkKSW1nI7H3kwP5xrAElDKyGFulV-_1ha4ZCS5cC6Rjj8pdl89JwZXgAuY1bqoaw_o5PALHSVqmFl3XXMl882X1RPwdDLYpyWhE3Cp-gEYgSm-H1ISSw48swpThQGlubMBaDqmhsnb_Uw_S7h53-kUpEd0Gbx4xENeBiDK6mE8B3WgPfUmfxjNfNXoyyMerUptN-JiqxyG_yK-Vqj-8AQ6wbe6aE70-6x0wBn5zNbo3j9MaYh6Ejj8bcokIRvk3hfvqV1eJ8Bm68C8cr1XpdfFMN-gIOryOFqKIZzCDZ8D_ipAsHCNk8/4kv/O1rqfVOqSmagupYKW9xMNw/h1/h001.RkA9YkphMuqk5wLU9i7xOyt7QnHqrM3GlszxuMs5Pxs)** Juntos, Adelita S. clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, it's Adelita Grijalva. I want to thank the Working Families Party for giving me the chance to reach out to you directly. Last month, voters overwhelmingly rejected the MAGA agenda and chose me to represent them in Congress in Arizona’s 7th District special election. With so much at stake, I came to Washington ready to get to work. But instead of swearing me in, Speaker Mike Johnson cancelled session and sent members home — not only delaying my ability to take office, but also allowing the government to shut down without even letting the House work toward a solution. That’s how far Republicans are willing to go to block me from serving. Republicans know that once I’m sworn in, it won’t just chip away at their razor-thin majority — I will become the decisive 218th signature to force a vote on releasing the Epstein files. This is nothing more than a desperate power play to protect Trump while denying the people of my district a voice in Congress when it’s needed the most. As Speaker Johnson drags this out, we’re going to prove that our grassroots power can’t be silenced. Each day he continues to delay, we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 to keep our momentum going as we work to take back the House in 2026. Juntos, Adelita S. Grijalva Congresswoman-Elect Arizona's 7th District Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Peter, we’re calling folks across Pennsylvania to get them to vote “Yes” on November 4th for our PA Supreme Court.

We’re dialing phones every day until Election Day — join us from **6:00-8:00pm Monday through Friday** or **1:00-3:00pm on Saturday and Sunday**!

No experience is necessary — we provide all the training. **_[Volunteer for a phonebank today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117590542/576990745/3761665?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251019_EN_Phonebanks_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJmZGJmOS0yMmFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A_VQQTj1HAXMWzpiKZCFAUjdd72hK-pral58Cyr_NIE=&emci=a6f53ead-a1ab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=58bfdbf9-22ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)_** | | **[SIGN UP FOR A PHONEBANK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117590544/576990747/3761665?source=EM_NBI_PADM_20251019_EN_Phonebanks_0_1MO_PaDems_NA_NA_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGJmZGJmOS0yMmFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A_VQQTj1HAXMWzpiKZCFAUjdd72hK-pral58Cyr_NIE=&emci=a6f53ead-a1ab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=58bfdbf9-22ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=25616296)**
