When you volunteer for a phonebank, you talk to Pennsylvanians near and far to make sure they have a voting plan in place and know how they’ll vote. Because when people have a plan, they are more likely to vote.

And we want to break a record this cycle with voter turnout!

Let’s get Pennsylvanians ready to get out and vote!

— PA Dems

clean_body: | | Peter, we’re calling folks across Pennsylvania to get them to vote “Yes” on November 4th for our PA Supreme Court. We’re dialing phones every day until Election Day — join us from 6:00-8:00pm Monday through Friday or 1:00-3:00pm on Saturday and Sunday! No experience is necessary — we provide all the training. | | When you volunteer for a phonebank, you talk to Pennsylvanians near and far to make sure they have a voting plan in place and know how they’ll vote. Because when people have a plan, they are more likely to vote. And we want to break a record this cycle with voter turnout! Let’s get Pennsylvanians ready to get out and vote! — PA Dems = | Follow us on , , , and **! Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. www.padems.com PA Democratic Party 510 N. name: American Media Watchdog
subject: George Strait just got hit with this surprise demand for the Super Bowl halftime show

# _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aef97543-6b8a-48fd-bc84-f8d0d6d5a1c5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Washington D.C. "No Kings" protest
This Saturday marked the much-hyped "No Kings" rallies to protest President Donald Trump across the United States, resulting in almost 3,000 protests being planned and executed. This shows how the Left, while marred with infighting and vigorous commitment to unpopular policies, is still able to get their base onto the streets.
Don't get me wrong, a vast majority of the protests were not as large and long lasting as the ones that took place in cities like Chicago, Illinois or Portland, Oregon. Many videos that were taken reveal once again many participants were older and white, no matter the location.
Atlanta, Georgia's "No Kings" gathering looked closer to representing the **[demographics of Newport, Rhode Island](https://substack.com/redirect/67d28ba4-6360-4637-b113-6028cedbfb99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** than that of Atlanta.
NBC Boston had to admit the crowd in their city had "A lot of white hair. Q-Tips, as we used to call them in the business...Not a lot of young people."

**[[Activate Your Free 90-Day Membership]](https://substack.com/redirect/f874ea45-992e-4c25-b2a3-503a2efe521e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Join today and stand with millions of like-minded Americans fighting to protect faith, family, and freedom.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/f874ea45-992e-4c25-b2a3-503a2efe521e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**P.S.** You'll also start receiving **AMAC Magazine** , the trusted publication conservatives rely on for news and insight you won't find anywhere else.
* * *
_**(Piece continues below)**_
Another humorous revelation of lacking self-awareness of these protests was at the Washington, D.C. event, people were freaking out thinking "that they're about to get shot" because police had positioned counter-snipers on the roofs of buildings by the National Mall. I'm not sure what they were concerned about since they were not Republicans looking to debate on a college campus or federal immigration agents carrying out lawful operations.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ee30e794-fc59-4fd2-a9e7-355180818817?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As if the self-parody could not get any worse, the "No Kings" planning went international to countries **[that have literal kings on the throne,](https://substack.com/redirect/516a2808-2814-495a-ba0a-ecf20b6ebdea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** like in the United Kingdom.
Foreign royal countries aside, it is hilarious to even suggest Trump has been governing like a king given the legal setbacks from activist judges that his administration has adhered to while going through the complete process. The federal government is still in shutdown mode after Senate Democrats wanted to pay illegal immigrants' healthcare. Instead of ramming through funding, the Trump administration is letting the situation play out.
Yes, the larger crowds were helped with this October being warmer than normal and not much will be accomplished outside of social media posting with large engagement rates, but this was a show of force from the Left. That is one of the main points of protests after all.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/40d5e5f1-85a8-4cd9-af44-16cb3ba90b46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Washington D.C. "No Kings" protest
As I have written for Politibrawl since the start of the current wave of unrest, this will be a slog for at least the next three years. More if Vice President JD Vance becomes 48. With leftist political violence not only on the rise, but being encouraged within their party, that side of the aisle has no incentive to stop. Even with the Department of Justice cracking down on street radicals, it is only hardening their resolve because it "proves" to them they are doing something right.
This is exemplified with Chicago locals going beyond filming ICE agents out in the field by using their personal vehicles to attack agents in an attempt to stop the arrests of illegal aliens. When tear gas had to be deployed by Border Patrol in response to the mob attacking them, Governor JB Pritzker accused the agents of targeting "peaceful American communities" by "recklessly throwing tear gas."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7069edf0-7543-4f3c-9b18-074f2ee0c56e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There is no excuse Leftists won't use in order to justify their violence, even if it is contradicted on video. While the coming colder weather will soon put a pause on outdoor gatherings, the Left will use that time to organize and refine their disruptive tactics in time for spring next year.
* * *

name: Guzman for Virginia
subject: We can’t let national Republicans buy this seat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
clean_body: | | | Guess what, Friend? National Republicans just poured big money into Ian Lovejoy’s campaign — including one huge $300,000 check from the Republican State Leadership Committee — because they know he’s vulnerable. You read that right: when outside donors see trouble, they open their wallets to try to bail each other out. Here’s what that means: they don’t care about our schools, our nurses, or our families. They care about protecting a vulnerable incumbent and buying ads to drown out our message. Meanwhile, we are knocking doors, meeting voters, and working every day to deliver for this community. If we let national money set the terms of this race, voters won’t hear our vision — the one that fights for working families, defends public education (AND special education), and protects reproductive freedom. We have to get louder, faster, and further into voters’ lives — and that costs money. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Your contribution pays for: paid canvassers to reach voters at their doors, targeted ads that counter outside spending, and rapid response to false attacks from national groups. Every dollar you donate makes it harder for big money to buy this seat. They dumped money because they’re worried. Let’s make sure they have a reason to be. Thanks for your support. — Guzman for Virginia | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . We can’t overstate how important this election is.

**Social Security, Medicare, lower costs, and our democracy itself are all on the line.**

$1 fuels Democrats in critical red-to-blue districts like Christina Bohannan, Rebecca Cooke, and Janelle Stelson that will be key to flipping the House

name: Absurd
subject: Boebert helps free conman George Santos from prison
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado
body:
If only she spent as much time fighting for her constituents as she does convicted felons.
| | | | | [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atf8JOGtYu9d_vc_zoImFa6t_Ckj47me68qMs4fmOzd4bPN1fx7ZYMNZd2DmykKLeT-zeUzD6msSe519eSd8u7RCWFuxOutHu33L7VKquMhLlqHRgAENzIX0rUSZY5lvpfTBy9O8TD6cA93yhWlPumjzn-21jQj7338EBRfzPCiFMZIK1EygtfbQhf2Wwtccgt8UFtw4mSX9tAaJRSig-Y0xzYz1R57Q&c=QYywbtn5nyS5I3cFgJMjkwSrbti_hYbpEw3fnjDMCa0Rtvm-p5KYag==&ch=7deEesxyMMpHJqsvEadvBOh9vxtIEvlKv-TvDsitytgb2YWTWWEyCg==)
---
|

Peter,
Earlier this week, we highlighted how Lauren Boebert made an official call for the release of former Republican Congressman and disgraced convicted conman felon, George Santos, to be released from prison.
Well, this regime is absurd, she succeeded and now Santos is free:
---
| [](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atf8JOGtYu9d_vc_zoImFa6t_Ckj47me68qMs4fmOzd4bPN1fx7ZYMNZd2DmykKLeT-zeUzD6msSe519eSd8u7RCWFuxOutHu33L7VKquMhLlqHRgAENzIX0rUSZY5lvpfTBy9O8TD6cA93yhWlPumjzn-21jQj7338EBRfzPCiFMZIK1EygtfbQhf2Wwtccgt8UFtw4mSX9tAaJRSig-TYV2jHvCpeS&c=QYywbtn5nyS5I3cFgJMjkwSrbti_hYbpEw3fnjDMCa0Rtvm-p5KYag==&ch=7deEesxyMMpHJqsvEadvBOh9vxtIEvlKv-TvDsitytgb2YWTWWEyCg==)
---
This is who Boebert fights for--a serial conman who defrauded his donors to line his own pockets--while her constituents in CO-4 are struggling.
And you would think helping free this man is something you wouldn't want to announce publicly, but Boebert doesn't care as long as she gets the media attention.
These are the cruel circus antics the constituents in her former district came to know, and why they ran her out of town when she narrowly won reelection by only 546 votes in a solid red district. Now in CO-4, her prospects are already tanking. In 2024, a red wave election, she underperformed Trump in every single precinct while Trisha Calvarese was one of the best performing Democrats in a red district across the country.
And just days ago, she revealed she only raised $110,000 last quarter--a number that would be barely competitive in a big city's county coroner race and 5x less than our campaign.
Boebert is as vulnerable as she has ever been, and in the upcoming '26 midterms that is projected to be a massive blue wave election, Democrat Trisha Calvarese will be the one to finally end her political career for good.
Let's press the advantage and bury Boebert: [Will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help Democrat Trisha Calvarese end Boebert's career?](https://t7pkg9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001atf8JOGtYu9d_vc_zoImFa6t_Ckj47me68qMs4fmOzd4bPN1fx7ZYMNZd2DmykKLeT-zeUzD6msSe519eSd8u7RCWFuxOutHu33L7VKquMhLlqHRgAENzIX0rUSZY5lvpfTBy9O8TD6cA93yhWlPumjzn-21jQj7338EBRfzPCiFMZIK1EygtfbQhf2Wwtccgt8UFtw4mSX9tAaJRSig-fCbkLd2-O9w&c=QYywbtn5nyS5I3cFgJMjkwSrbti_hYbpEw3fnjDMCa0Rtvm-p5KYag==&ch=7deEesxyMMpHJqsvEadvBOh9vxtIEvlKv-TvDsitytgb2YWTWWEyCg==)
---

clean_body: If only she spent as much time fighting for her constituents as she does convicted felons. | | | | | == | Peter, Earlier this week, we highlighted how Lauren Boebert made an official call for the release of former Republican Congressman and disgraced convicted conman felon, George Santos, to be released from prison. Well, this regime is absurd, she succeeded and now Santos is free: | == This is who Boebert fights for--a serial conman who defrauded his donors to line his own pockets--while her constituents in CO-4 are struggling. And you would think helping free this man is something you wouldn't want to announce publicly, but Boebert doesn't care as long as she gets the media attention. These are the cruel circus antics the constituents in her former district came to know, and why they ran her out of town when she narrowly won reelection by only 546 votes in a solid red district. Now in CO-4, her prospects are already tanking. In 2024, a red wave election, she underperformed Trump in every single precinct while Trisha Calvarese was one of the best performing Democrats in a red district across the country. And just days ago, she revealed she only raised $110,000 last quarter--a number that would be barely competitive in a big city's county coroner race and 5x less than our campaign. Boebert is as vulnerable as she has ever been, and in the upcoming '26 midterms that is projected to be a massive blue wave election, Democrat Trisha Calvarese will be the one to finally end her political career for good. Let's press the advantage and bury Boebert: == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Thank you for your support, Team Trisha | | | | == | Mail checks to: Trisha 4 CO 9609 S University Blvd., PO Box 631322 Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 | Paid for by Trisha 4 Colorado Trisha Calvarese for Congress | 9609 S University Blvd. PO Box 631322 | Highlands Ranch, CO 80163 US | | | | | | |

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: It’s President Trump, and you’ve got me worried.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
It’s been a while since I heard from you.
| | | | [](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
---
# **_From Trump: Friend, you’ve got me worried_**
**__**

I’ve been trying to reach you for DAYS, and I’m starting to think that you’re ignoring me.
I really hope it’s because my messages haven’t been getting through to you.
Because the Fake News has been saying that MAGA support is at an ALL-TIME LOW...
_But I know you haven’t abandoned me._
I’m reaching out because **_YOUR NAME_** is at the top of my list of special MAGA Patriots, and I can’t afford to lose you.
**_[So could you take a quick second to reaffirm your support and give me your response to some important questions I have for you?](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)_**

[RESPOND TO TRUMP!](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
**I know that you have never abandoned me and the MAGA Movement, but it’s been a while since I’ve heard from you...**
Please, I know that you’re a very busy person, but I could really use your response to some important questions that I have for you.
I have always taken into account YOUR thoughts, and I need them now more than ever.
[RESPOND TO TRUMP!](https://link.email.donaldjtrump.)
THANK YOU.
\- President Donald J. Trump

name: Wes Moore
subject: Hello from Jersey!
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=775%2E1086043%2ELF0iks)
Peter,
I went to New Jersey today to campaign for my friend Mikie Sherrill, and folks here are fired up to vote!
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251019-1.TNCjAq&refcode=em-20251019-1&t=4&akid=775%2E1086043%2ELF0iks)
Mikie is a dedicated public servant and a leader, and it’s been inspiring to see her campaign for the future of her state.
I need Democratic governors like Mikie in this fight with me, Peter. Together, we can stand up for progress and fight back against the Trump administration’s attacks.
But let’s be clear: This race is no guarantee. Mikie will need our support to win.
So I’m asking this team: **[Can you help me rally supporters and help Mikie Sherrill win by splitting a contribution today? Your donation will be key to accomplishing our mission in New Jersey, Maryland, and beyond.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251019-1.TNCjAq&refcode=em-20251019-1&t=5&akid=775%2E1086043%2ELF0iks)**

It’s time to get out the vote — let’s win this thing.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20251019-1.TNCjAq&refcode=em-20251019-1&t=25&akid=775%2E1086043%2ELF0iks)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Adelita Grijalva
subject: No more delays — swear me in now
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
I came ready to take the oath, but Speaker Johnson is blocking me from serving

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117591504/576994201/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmJmOWI0NC0yOGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jLm9wofgsRu6i60dr-cp7EBzpr6x7d4NtuiRGbAqojs=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117591505/576994202/2018198064?amount=15&refcode=email_101925_grijalva&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmJmOWI0NC0yOGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jLm9wofgsRu6i60dr-cp7EBzpr6x7d4NtuiRGbAqojs=) Hi friends, it's Adelita Grijalva. I want to thank Andrea Salinas for giving me the chance to reach out to you directly. Last month, voters overwhelmingly rejected the MAGA agenda and chose me to represent them in Congress in Arizona’s 7th District special election. With so much at stake, I came to Washington ready to get to work. But instead of swearing me in, Speaker Mike Johnson cancelled session and sent members home — not only delaying my ability to take office, but also allowing the government to shut down without even letting the House work toward a solution. That’s how far Republicans are willing to go to block me from serving. Republicans know that once I’m sworn in, it won’t just chip away at their razor-thin majority — I will become the decisive 218th signature to force a vote on releasing the Epstein files. This is nothing more than a desperate power play to protect Trump while denying the people of my district a voice in Congress when it’s needed the most. As Speaker Johnson drags this out, we’re going to prove that our grassroots power can’t be silenced. Each day he continues to delay, we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 to keep our momentum going as we work to take back the House in 2026. **[Friends, will you split a donation of $15 or whatever you can today between my campaign and Andrea Salinas to help us fight back and make sure their obstruction backfires?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117591506/576994203/2018198064?amount=15&refcode=email_101925_grijalva&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmJmOWI0NC0yOGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jLm9wofgsRu6i60dr-cp7EBzpr6x7d4NtuiRGbAqojs=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split contribution will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117591507/576994204/2018198064?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_101925_grijalva&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmJmOWI0NC0yOGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jLm9wofgsRu6i60dr-cp7EBzpr6x7d4NtuiRGbAqojs=)

clean_body: I came ready to take the oath, but Speaker Johnson is blocking me from serving = = Hi friends, it's Adelita Grijalva. I want to thank Andrea Salinas for giving me the chance to reach out to you directly. Last month, voters overwhelmingly rejected the MAGA agenda and chose me to represent them in Congress in Arizona’s 7th District special election. With so much at stake, I came to Washington ready to get to work. But instead of swearing me in, Speaker Mike Johnson cancelled session and sent members home — not only delaying my ability to take office, but also allowing the government to shut down without even letting the House work toward a solution. That’s how far Republicans are willing to go to block me from serving. Republicans know that once I’m sworn in, it won’t just chip away at their razor-thin majority — I will become the decisive 218th signature to force a vote on releasing the Epstein files. This is nothing more than a desperate power play to protect Trump while denying the people of my district a voice in Congress when it’s needed the most. As Speaker Johnson drags this out, we’re going to prove that our grassroots power can’t be silenced. Each day he continues to delay, we’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 to keep our momentum going as we work to take back the House in 2026. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split contribution will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Juntos, Adelita S. | | Peter, I don't say this lightly, but it's God's honest truth... Right now, the Democrats are the party of anger and rage. They hate President Trump, plain and simple. **And make no mistake, that will translate at the ballot box.** _Yes, President Trump and Republicans are delivering victory after victory ..._ _Yes, we are winning on truly every key issue with voters ..._ _Yes, we are more popular than the Democrats ..._ **But at the end of the day, if the anger and hatred among the Left translates to voter enthusiasm and turnout**** _(_**_**_and it already is!_**_**_)_****, then nothing else will matter.** Sadly, this **"enthusiasm gap** " among our voters and the Democrats is the uphill battle we're facing for the midterms. body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Hi friend,

October is Breast Cancer Awareness Month, a time to honor the brave fighters and survivors battling this disease across the country. Their courage is inspiring, and their fight deserves our full support.

But while we raise awareness, President Trump and his cabinet have slashed cancer research funding, putting countless lives at risk and undermining hope for breakthroughs and cures. Cutting billions from the National Cancer Institute and related programs is nothing short of a slap in the face to every person fighting cancer and their families.

Our nation should be investing in life-saving research, not focusing on bogus science to fit an agenda.

I’m committed to fighting back against these dangerous cuts and advocating for the funding necessary to accelerate cancer research and save lives.

I need your help to stay in the fight and keep Democrats in Congress to continue battling for funding for critical research. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Oct2025-FR-October?&refcode=E15710-20251017-BreastCancerAwarenessMonth-SL-GOP&amount=25]

Fight Back [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Oct2025-FR-October?&refcode=E15710-20251017-BreastCancerAwarenessMonth-SB-GOP&amount=25]

Together, we can make sure no politician’s budget decisions get in the way of hope and healing.

- Eric

Our future rests in your hands, Patriot. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. _This is a humble request from the heart, so _please_ read it all the way through._In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.**Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few _SERIOUS_ challenges right now:**
---
**While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was _legally_ barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. **But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising _**BIG TIME**_ while I've been working hard in our capital. **Seriously,_a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond!_**
---
Now Spanberger has a _**GIGANTIC**_ fundraising advantage, Patriot. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a _serious_ cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission __**will**__ be cut short. **Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; __please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign!__**
---

clean_body: I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart.| I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart.| | | | I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart.| | | | Our future rests in your hands, Patriot. I wrote this email to give you an update and to make a plea from the heart. This is a humble request from the heart, so please read it all the way through.In 2021, my team and I put together a historic victory to help flip every one of Virginia's highest offices RED! Ever since taking office as Lieutenant Governor, I have been notching big wins for my friends, neighbors, and every one of my fellow Virginians.Now, I'm running for Governor so that we can keep up the amazing work we've been doing here in the Commonwealth and make history once again.Unfortunately, I 'm facing a few SERIOUS challenges right now: While I was in the Virginia legislative session, I was legally barred from accepting even a dime in support of my campaign. But my Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, was fundraising BIG TIME while I've been working hard in our capital. Seriously,a Soros-backed, far-Left group dumped $500K into Abigail Spanberger 's campaign coffers and there wasn't a single thing I could do to respond! Now Spanberger has a GIGANTIC fundraising advantage, Patriot. Polls show that my race is tied, but Spanberger has a serious cash advantage. Look, if we can't make up the difference, our conservative mission will be cut short. Today, I 'm making a plea to you as a faithful Christian, a mother, and a Marine; please send in any amount you can spare to support my campaign! I am not exaggerating one bit when I tell you this: without your support, we will fall even further behind. The Democrat elitists will log a win and the Commonwealth will regress down a path to irreversible socialism! I wouldn't ask you to stay in this fight if I didn't think the battle was worth it. And Patriot, I know we will win if we hold strong and fight this together. If you cannot afford to keep fighting for the future of our Commonwealth, our children, and our nation, all I ask is you please keep me and my team in your prayers!I am asking you from the bottom of my heart; please stick with me and help us keep the conservative movement thriving!Ever Forward,Lt. Governor Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant Marine First black female Lt. Governor of VA . Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor.I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born.Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. name: Jason
subject: just a quick note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
| | | Friend, I wanted to send you a quick note this afternoon as my team and I are going over our budget for the final two weeks of this campaign. We will decide what we can afford to fund, and what we may have to cut out of our budget because we don’t have the money to pay for it. I’ve received texts and emails from friends saying this race is over because of the indefensible text messages my opponent has sent.**That’s just not true.** Jay told reporters on Friday that he raised _$500,000_ after his debate performance on Thursday night. I am not slowing down for one second. I am crisscrossing the state; meeting with voters, talking to the media, and trying to make sure every voter hears my message — that the Attorney General’s job is to protect everyone — regardless of whether they are a Democrat or a Republican, or if they like me or hate me. A criminal doesn't ask someone’s party affiliation before they attack... I know I’ve asked a lot of you already, and you have stepped up every time, _but this is it._ We have just over two weeks, and I need to know if I am going to have the resources to fund the rest of our TV plan, our get-out-the-vote efforts, and our digital campaign. **[_Can I count on you to contribute today to help make sure I have what I need to win this race? There is too much at stake to leave anything to chance._](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/Fi-cv_vwPKixooRaaC7ClvKIFFdnQw7KthpQXgD-9PMn7_ZtVlMvSN4ZOrAkOhBUyanlKRI5ImdR3HscUJE_F1uDNs6hiyHPOrz4HAP8UFxIYwIzvabhV3bmthbHPfk_RTQxT8D1WTskIufDhfgllMnzm6T3wieqiUpZpaJYJPluYRCK-pzqerMcB9ja1z_GwoL6tQvzHW_eyutmqGSPKpY3UZd5SJzC6WU5yJmi_yvd9IV4Em8NBUzpUppw21Q3KO3G1MkcgtQ3h8wp2UeMbt3kihznjeDD1jY_RmigcwWgYky4II17rmvl-0lvvmBSiaSGfr-0cGfelQqs7RQMIHZ9TERL61BJPWX3ESbxLUxM5e55XeS0O8Agngbs1b2kgQo-A8OgJwbEgMstkvvPYxiJ1Vzx2QVR9Es3eKlnqDKMLereHtkMoBQbeC_67yvqKj20jI7JjJS2mXQKCQKeo1deLyLdXJ6Gfv5Uww5ybEQJzZF9QkclnjPojdpMq9uFtggxdxl3QejUHhw1QPsK2muvnrt-pQw0KzshyNuBbFGIPL10UkHlt71QkhJW6BpiVMuATcRCiUNG8gDWY1-SDoByEr992C5m5eck6hA/jrdNUFFsQVl2Fiis8AXZg-DJwlnh14df/14)** Thank you,Jason

subject: We're building something powerful
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
And I want you to be part of it. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117591623/576994672/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_LastChanceMSG_101925&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTEyMDYzNjAtMmFhZC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ao-bveKvV9jXY9C9Jw2rDZBiS8_TZ10GHGrilS98Rl4=&emci=109ebf3c-a2ab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=a1206360-2aad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=32374386)
---
Peter — it's Jose. **[Before I ask for your support today,](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117591624/576994673/-2108063729?refcode=em_JJR_FR_LastChanceMSG_101925&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTEyMDYzNjAtMmFhZC1mMDExLThlNjEtNjA0NWJkZWQ4YmE0IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ao-bveKvV9jXY9C9Jw2rDZBiS8_TZ10GHGrilS98Rl4=)** I wanted you to hear this from me personally: We're building something different here.**A campaign ready to take on corruption and fight for Florida families who've been ignored for too long.** Right now, we have momentum. Trump just endorsed my corrupt opponent and put our race in the national spotlight. Every dollar we raise shows that Floridians are ready to reject corruption and fight for a People's Lawyer who will actually stand up for working families. name: Dana Criswell
subject: Hold My Keys
body:
When bitcoiners say "hold your own keys," we're not being cute--we're describing ownership in plain English.

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2744e800-75a3-4d44-a14f-e71255c239a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [Maria Ziegler](https://substack.com/redirect/3ca58506-0574-4c0b-ab0d-37d56af9fd30?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/f29ac0ef-bc32-4632-a709-9432b801002f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
When bitcoiners say "hold your own keys," we're not being cute--we're describing ownership in plain English. A "key" is just a very long private number (a 256-bit secret) that unlocks your bitcoin. From that private key, software derives a public key and address--the place your coins sit on the blockchain. Because that long number is impossible to memorize, wallets back it up as 12 or 24 random words (a "seed phrase"). Those words recreate the same private number if your device is lost. Whoever controls that private key--or those words--can move the coins. If an exchange or ETF holds the key, you don't own bitcoin; you own a promise.
Self-custody is the antidote. It means you secure your savings with keys you control, not keys someone else "manages." And here's my advice _(but, do your own homework because I 'm not your mamma and take zero responsibility for your actions or decisions)_: buy a [Bitkey](https://substack.com/redirect/b4efcc5d-d008-419a-9dd4-5bd2c323c450?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Bitkey is Block's self-custody wallet built around a simple but powerful 2-of-3 multi-signature design: one key on your phone, one on the Bitkey hardware, and a third key held by Bitkey's service that can't move funds without one of your keys. Any two approve a spend. Lose your phone? You still have the hardware and the service key to recover. Lose the device? Your phone and the service key get you back. You stay in charge; middlemen don't.
Mississippi's [Joel Bomgar](https://substack.com/redirect/3a727518-6117-462a-9664-0eeb46876205?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) has been crystal clear on this point: stop trusting luck and move off exchanges. His plain-English write-ups and videos about Bitkey emphasize the same thing I'm saying here--self-custody with a sane recovery plan beats hoping a platform will be solvent on the day you need your money. Bitkey's defaults make that easy for normal people without watering down sovereignty.
Why Bitkey over a single hardware wallet? Single-signature puts everything on one secret; if that seed phrase is lost or exposed, game over _(ask me how I know, it was painful)_. Bitkey's default multi-signature kills that single point of failure. It also smooths the two places most people mess up: recovery and inheritance. Recovery is guided and doesn't require you to be a cypherpunk. For inheritance, you can provide a clear path so your spouse or executor can access funds without turning your estate into a scavenger hunt--and without giving any one party enough power to drain the account.
Here's the playbook: Order a Bitkey. Set it up, practice a small test send, and walk through a recovery drill while the balance is low. Withdraw from the exchange. Store the device securely, keep your phone locked down, and write plain-English instructions for your heirs. Review once a year.
If you want freedom, hold your own keys--your own long number, backed up by your own words--and make it simple enough that you'll actually do it. Bitkey makes that practical. Bitcoin gives you sovereignty. Don't hand it back.

If we want to defeat Jason Miyares in 16 days, we need your help to reach our $15,000 daily fundraising goal by midnight tonight. But folks, my team relies on grassroots donors like you to fund my campaign, not MAGA billionaires.
That's why it's critical that we reach tonight’s fundraising goal. In a race this close, we can't afford to fall short. name: Katie Porter HQ
subject: Our average donation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
A small average donation is proof we’re not bankrolled by lobbyists trying to buy influence.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40287%2E3422442%2ErQ83r5)
Peter,
Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters. Don’t believe us? Just take a look at our average donation:
[](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21659?c0=em_ms_kp_20251019_1_ak.9ouo9X&refcode=ema20251019-40287&t=3&akid=40287%2E3422442%2ErQ83r5)
That’s right — it’s less than $30. And we think that number means something.
**A small average donation is proof we’re not bankrolled by lobbyists trying to buy influence.** It means Katie’s campaign is funded by thousands of Californians chipping in what they can, when they can — because they know Katie will fight for them.
Katie proudly rejects money from corporations because she puts working families first. Our grassroots donors make sure she can take on the biggest fights with a bold, progressive message: lowering costs, fighting Donald Trump’s attacks, and standing up to special interests.
**[Katie’s shown that people power beats big money — and we can do it again. Can you donate $29.77 or whatever makes sense for you today to help us prove it?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21659?c0=em_ms_kp_20251019_1_ak.9ouo9X&refcode=em20251019-40287&t=4&akid=40287%2E3422442%2ErQ83r5)**
[Donate $29.77](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21659?c0=em_ms_kp_20251019_1_ak.9ouo9X&refcode=em20251019-40287&t=5&akid=40287%2E3422442%2ErQ83r5)
Thank you,
Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20251019-40287&amounts=&t=6&refcode2=40287_3422442_rQ83r5&akid=40287%2E3422442%2ErQ83r5)**

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=40287&t=8&akid=40287%2E3422442%2ErQ83r5)

Katie Porter for Governor 2026

body:
We are reaching out to ask you to pitch in $2 to Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign and Maggie Hassan today — _and no, that’s not a typo!_

We know $2 might not sound like much, especially when the Republican party is preparing to spend hundreds of millions of dollars to try to flip Jon’s seat red...

But when thousands of grassroots supporters are all chipping in $2 at time, _it all adds up!_

In 2021, this team was able to defy the odds and win a historic run off election alongside Rev. Warnock and secure the Senate majority — all because of $2, $10, and $25 donations from supporters just like you.

Now, we’re counting on your support once again to help Jon win what will likely be the most expensive and competitive race in the nation.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Now, more than ever
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Our voter registration work doesn't end, folks.
Despite vote-suppressing state legislatures making it harder to register to vote -- passing bills to stop organizations like ours and our partners on the ground from helping potential voters navigate the increasingly murky rules around voter registration -- we're still pulling out all the stops to bring voters into the system.
Voter registration is a critical part of grassroots efforts to protect voting rights. The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help .
Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you chip in $12 or more today to help register 4 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=101925_2&amount=12]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=101925_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=101925_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=101925_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=101925_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=101925_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=101925_2&amount=36]
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
The next election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference. Please, can you pitch in with $12 or whatever you can to help us register a wave of new voters ahead of this year's registration deadlines? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=101925_2&amount=12]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=101925_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=101925_2&amount=20]

name: Tobias Read
subject: I refuse to give into this lawless administration
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251019em-lawless [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251019em-lawless]
Hi, it’s Oregon Secretary of State, Tobias Read.
I’m reaching out not just as Secretary of State, but as a citizen who cares about our democracy and the privacy of every Oregon resident.
The Trump Justice Department is demanding access to highly sensitive voter registration information beyond what is publicly available from states like ours.
But I refuse to back down to this lawless administration — not as it tramples on our Constitution, our citizens’ fundamental rights, and our very democracy.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251019em-lawless [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251019em-lawless]
Here’s what you should know:
FIRST: The Justice Department has requested full voter-registration records, including driver’s license numbers and Social Security numbers — data that Oregonians expect to remain private.
THEN: I responded by affirming that I will not compromise the privacy or safety of Oregonians by handing over sensitive personal data — and that I do not trust an administration that has repeatedly undermined civil liberties and treated basic constitutional norms like optional suggestions.
SO NOW: I’m asking for your help to continue fighting back against the Trump Administration as they continue to undermine our fundamental rights and pressure Oregon’s elected leaders to comply with their illegal demands. Can I count on you to join the fight by chipping in $5, $10, or more right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251019em-lawless]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251019em-lawless]
This is not just a legal or institutional battle. It’s a fight over who our government serves — the people, or the powerful.
Together, we can send a clear message that Oregon will not surrender the personal data of its citizens. Oregon will not bow to threats or to demands that exceed federal authority. Oregon will protect its democracy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251019em-lawless]
Thank you for being part of this effort,
Tobias Read
Secretary of State, Oregon
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=251019em-lawless]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IMahE5FQZEyEjGesjn_XSA2?unsubscribedata=Gtaoja9xAFhDJ88lmKzVqkAcsjX0JFhbJnXuuE7H3ES8mlTc5foEeRuHyCV%2BRopjXf9oIQdRtaZReAnULExUU6Gh01hgrwwwthT3zfJYHhAZqW47LCG3PrEBU4h2z5KaleDP6ed87%2F%2Bpqb5oy2FkC0Yml3wtKR5UvmBJtISKsFnAFqnfNMd5daztRIPLfiicokar1N10fDwrn49piDnSYzNR765NboITvR%2B71g%2FfsFVD7ke4nzWuJGNrK05eyIiYzPAbblZvaWEqfIOH5sjT6wfSxF0sjecSeeJobotlgg%2FF3FBqZ%2BXM2gvyyezqoBQWKs8A%2FZJh3yWDslXahJR%2FtVocNInb6BWcr07e%2FMalzpylsZaMI8oy47vLGUcqKEYxsgigfK2giSMM2CVFAJAM39NJY0KBJR49MYlEaq2ZPnpHI589uEPREVn7hVo9lDET .

body:
In a race this close and with the stakes this high, we need to have the resources to be able to fight back, and we can only do that with your support.
Hey, I know my team and I have been emailing you a lot recently asking for your support. But I wanted to take a second to explain why your support matters in this crucial race.
Not only is my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, endorsed by Donald Trump – he’s also a faithful advocate for the most disastrous elements of Trump’s agenda, and wants to implement them here in New Jersey. He was one of the _biggest cheerleaders_ for the Republican price hike bill that will throw hundreds of thousands of New Jerseyans off their health care.
And now, Ciattarelli’s being supported by a MAGA super PAC that’s pouring _millions of dollars_ into negative ads that make one false assertion after another about my record and my character.
**[In a race this close and with the stakes this high, we need to have the resources to be able to fight back, and we can only do that with your support. Can you split $10 (or whatever you can) between my campaign and Heartland Patriots so we can stop our opponent and protect New Jersey?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96779?refcode=em20251019-9596&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9596%2E614464%2ERJHH1c)**

---
But this race isn’t about what we’re fighting against — it’s about what we’re fighting _for._
**My vision for our state is simple: Make life better for New Jerseyans.** I’ll fight to bring health care, housing, child care, and energy costs down, tackle crime and keep our communities safe, and defend our constitutional freedoms from the right-wing extremists who are taking our nation down a destructive path.
Here’s the deal — we’re in an extremely competitive race, but lots of voters still haven’t made up their minds. **[Your support helps us spread our message across New Jersey, so we can build the coalition we need to win this race. That’s why I’m humbly asking you to split a contribution between my campaign and Heartland Patriots — it’ll make a critical difference in helping us protect New Jersey.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/96779?refcode=em20251019-9596&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9596%2E614464%2ERJHH1c)**

Mikie

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

If you would like to pause emails from Team Warner until the federal government reopens,[_**please let us know by completing this form**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117592572/576997853/222818858?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_TheNumbers_251019_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzI5NWZhYi0zMGFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=J3jq3FapEYXrZhFzduTBAvdMDBgUZe-vy8avAWQT-5E=&emci=e419a04d-c7aa-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=3c295fab-30ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=4568237)._ I’ve been doing this job for a long time now, Derek.

I’ve seen red-wave and blue-wave election years. I’ve witnessed razor-thin recounts. In 2017, control of the Virginia House of Delegates even came down to ONE VOTE. I’ve seen folks lose elections they expected to win.

That’s why I can confidently tell you right now that Election Day (in just 16 days!) will set the tone for 2026 and beyond.

Fascists have small dictators
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117592681/576998200/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDY3NTE3Yy0zMmFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eoJpy95jnHUHOJrQGk0ito3AIIaX7aN_Ec1Fr_2LFSw=)
Hi folks, it’s Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia.
Across the country yesterday — from D.C. to Long Beach — people flooded the streets, parks, and town squares for one simple idea: in America, we don’t do kings. We do democracy. We do accountability. We do the peaceful transfer of power. And when a president acts like he’s above the law, we show up. In our millions.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117592682/576998201/142174378?refcode=251019_RG_nokings-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDY3NTE3Yy0zMmFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eoJpy95jnHUHOJrQGk0ito3AIIaX7aN_Ec1Fr_2LFSw=&emci=f44c3797-f7ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e067517c-32ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**
**This movement is big, it’s hopeful, and it’s happening right now in thousands of communities.**
**[So whether you marched with me today in Long Beach or you just followed along at home, I need you to add your voice by signing my petition to declare that we oppose Trump’s attacks on our democracy. We oppose fascism in every form; America is no place for dictators; And we will not be silent while this administration shreds our constitution.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117592683/576998202/142174378?refcode=251019_RG_nokings-pet-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDY3NTE3Yy0zMmFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eoJpy95jnHUHOJrQGk0ito3AIIaX7aN_Ec1Fr_2LFSw=&emci=f44c3797-f7ac-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=e067517c-32ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=16877361)**

Robert Garcia

Across the country yesterday — from D.C. to Long Beach — people flooded the streets, parks, and town squares for one simple idea: in America, we don’t do kings. We do democracy. We do accountability. We do the peaceful transfer of power. And when a president acts like he’s above the law, we show up. In our millions. This movement is big, it’s hopeful, and it’s happening right now in thousands of communities. Thank you for standing up this weekend. In solidarity, Robert Garcia = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . Peter, _**Want to know the real story behind Alligator Alcatraz?**_

It started with a simple video I posted, proposing we build a maximum-security detention facility in the Florida Everglades -- surrounded by alligators -- to house the most dangerous illegal aliens threatening our communities.
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/K4rF4umdHIUmBwXnmYwF7EHYd67bDkwBNW1dfwMONxSeWnhz_3485GlsrFyPlxNYdg1Z9EWGYOFUlLyS0d2fyo2l0X5N85ms-qySmtuOMKeFnVvpH8c6d9tm8sBzkIEPI4hTYxTBqc-xSAnCmd0KpQWaV_VEyX3hCF2Gl8lQGXUEOvchyBxFXVuaOrD5Uxn4oBNvxQgWGG1lbOgvZXdmZmF8rpyDnRGYcmxdLipihCk3WroyN-AZ8z6uq4xSdoDn4yEbkFBuNvhEeiP-4iayrbWS_F-lICB_b1UEEvJtbMGk_SlnK766nwczSTtXvPFSdFt2eneh8MTR0YwQeUtKVwzc9D7KkPQgB_0kcABh8kvD8akonWHmZ4iGxxp1oJWPgYWe_DRHvFjpBQPiyczTOoWpqG5JjHzvwiBK1rEpuNQu1PENhTd7LYQDCxap40UZSfC7w1CvWSy5ywYj18PnQdE6bmNz95acwtDwaQDXo8OBoEL2tFY0V-4n6rGqi2xztqikybtKomWdiACVZRK4OQB0J1JFthe4DwqWFBq8NDNEanBzrvB3uvyzlC7o8XhpyFXqM38FNNlKpYtDQ32QlPBU7qOdRugFXjHuTRSstcs2au_bELgF6TDdhE0pP3QABEnoAmiuvUcE_yvozdsf3n8I1AEHizZtCjffZOQs7pqLLXjo2ppNXXeNwbpSKb9KVqQ8Jd6gg4UuA6cZvq8I/1Dvn6kgR9nkSQSAfuMyyttDTq3UAP9-U/14)
---
Within hours, that video exploded into a national sensation.

And within days, the Left launched their predictable attack machine.

They called it "inhumane." They called it "extreme." The mainstream media had a collective meltdown. Liberal politicians clutched their pearls.

But their tantrum didn't shake my resolve.

[**This is exactly why President Trump just gave me his Complete and Total Endorsement for Florida Attorney General.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/XzNc4L41ifMWncoWPdgpOsu_ilXboe6JJfsUNm0v4wEaBLLq7TvYegFLOecQ3JtZzlR1_VjSzHV5jeKCvPSsgZMWqqUUtD6j5SjEsinq1vVgvyDyE591v0MMO9--N0Kzl-OFbCO0XwCReWxDH1SyFmABJqWPc13eb_vVZnUPHPVn-6Wi_1EsKJlXur0LIxTaM-KNkFDbxk2FPWlvGJHwzS9lW3Rr6ccN2oFle6GAGg2x9zZ_N54Jf6GvRYsjy__3iNCS_d0J4s6DFh_hF4vB3xuFekMLRaLY1slCVSj_I6_R9GP7_Eiaas-Qfj8my0KmfM_09-uIrSv-kfS0eYViLKc4F_XWYN_gJfqvy1x7Ykx-jb2OQjc5dfmhKXRbBOOZvVX-BCAypPqxrZ6clxXbnzTpeTAQMngTXcAGio6vkqhXc1_4ezplz8JBPqHScjf8nrhiybNyI1uvt-yyMIzAcMwNoyheyG8SN1Iwh0ggAyRxZW8FAMSCftV42CmGG7R8uQL6OAHYCl3tBMgkVOOao50xkFJpRlDhQXCZHTgiPKT5iNzoyfo4g6S3JWXxvHtp_3r0T_1RrilVN_YE0Cxkgg8thBolO2Jlb8_6NrloqWFFmp6EuC_M4OeWB3x08iNdJEOIOwk4OEEMcAU537-DS52iVPfnbmg1am45fQ4N44Eo4r75e-P5KPRMZJ6qAbXOT_Sa4YD1oRGl_PurRj-A/IZ8ghwLod3-U8Ck1YuG6ayX5c8p3Crkp/14)

_When other states are releasing criminals early and defunding police, Florida is building facilities to keep the worst predators locked away from our families._
_ _
_When other attorneys general are prosecuting parents at school board meetings, I'm prosecuting pedophiles and human traffickers._
_ _
_When other states are rolling out the red carpet for illegal aliens, Florida is building detention centers in the Everglades._
_ _
_The radical Left wants to tear down ALLIGATOR ALCATRAZ and everything it represents. They want to empty the prisons, defund the police, and turn Florida into another crime-ridden liberal wasteland. Soft on crime policies do not work!_

_**I will not let that happen.**_

body:
Roy Cooper needs your help. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117592879/576998924/823540626?refcode=ea.78d6edf7-35ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ms=ea.78d6edf7-35ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OGQ2ZWRmNy0zNWFkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=If_XJddC6UaiGW3z2LJBKw7Vjzq-sjSLDu8yROsaCbE=&emci=f1b38b94-9fab-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=78d6edf7-35ad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=17205535)

clean_body: Peter, I know you get a lot of these messages. You're the best of the best, and we would never say otherwise. You've been with us through every battle. You've shown loyalty that's rare in this world. We're not here to question that. We're here to ask you to ACTIVATE it. Thankfully, there's still time. But you deserve to know the complete unfiltered truth. Our voter verification efforts have been slipping! And right now, we're significantly behind pace in your state. Our voter verification process is time-consuming, tedious work. Getting every single Republican voter to respond takes a lot of emails, texts, and outreach. But as frustrating as it can be, it's the most important thing you can do to ensure our majority can continue to thrive in 2027 and beyond! We have a historic opportunity to mobilize America during a time when this country needs patriotism, common sense, and our Conservative values more than ever. And we're not lying to you in saying it "takes just 1 minute of your day" to complete your verification! We can't emphasize enough how important 100% verification is for holding the House Majority. It's not going to be easy. But when you verify your voter status, you're doing more than checking a box. You're standing on the front lines with House GOP in our critical mission for America. Unfortunately, we can only give you until midnight to complete your submission before it's CLOSED! So please, don't wait to submit it. Thank you for your continued loyalty. God Bless America, House GOP Records Department | | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (21818). NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. Terms and Conditions . |

As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. # [District Round‐up 10.19.25](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F10%2F19%2Fdistrict-round-up-10-19-25%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=5ec6da430927d7c6821355c5d2326278&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| By **Elizabeth Farnham** on October 19, 2025
---
Dear Neighbor,
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-farnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=102bb27386a588686775be3b16e0a29a71962e3cc59ccce43ca1b00e507037c2&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5241&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=9609881b6a1905290c780b3e63c97945&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=6083fe4ab15d816494e44059cfb55824)
Where was our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, last weekend?
[](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=5cc1ea8c9ce2b21207cbc8b505167a6d7428c63be9e2a2b738274a97fd77d7b2&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5241&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=65fa92141513b90f73ce625a8f9b711e&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=6083fe4ab15d816494e44059cfb55824)While I was out in our 13th Congressional District, including festivals in Altoona and Hollidaysburg (Joyce's home turf), listening to the valid concerns of our voters about the criminal and disastrous scheme that is the Trump administration, Joyce was...
Not holding an in-person town hall with his constituents.
Not criticizing US House Speaker Mike Johnson for failing to swear in Adelita Grijalva.
Not advocating for the continuation of ACA subsidies to end the government shutdown.
Not criticizing Trump for his incompetent tariff-by-tweet policy that has sky-rocketed the cost of living for Everyday Americans.
Not speaking out against Trump's murders of people in boats who, without any evidence, simply look like drug smugglers to Trump.
Instead, Joyce made an appearance at a Charlie Kirk vigil in Altoona.
Charlie Kirk was a person whom Joyce isn't known to have ever mentioned until Kirk's violent murder.
Was that because because Charlie Kirk advocated the release of the Epstein files?
Who knows?
But Joyce is certainly leveraging Kirk's death now for political gains.
We don't need that multimillionaire hack who only pretends to align with the hearts of many PA-13 voters when it suits his political career.
He doesn't actually care about any of us Everyday Americans and it shows.
It shows in his awkward distance from voters.
It shows in his slobbering sycophancy for Trump and his murderous administration.
And it shows in his Congressional votes against the needs of his constituents - like his votes against The Infrastructure Bill, The American Rescue Plan, The Inflation Reduction Act, the Women's Health Protection Act, and the Respect for Marriage Act.
But you can do something about John Joyce's failure to serve us.
Please vote for me, Beth Farnham, next year to represent us because I am with The People of PA-13, advocating improvements of our lives and protecting our Precious Democracy, no matter what famous person has passed away.
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=29b02b54b9a15547d125c020d99886995247b0b9e6306670ecf27cef6e6f7a91&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5241&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=5f632b15df28209bc16e55ba0bbf1953&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=6083fe4ab15d816494e44059cfb55824) and real representation
Photo credits: [Christina Palesky](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=370384851a2fd83766d49d647b5fc376540660adbdf256be494028e4c1d74565&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5241&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=0a13e67446cc62a7ef300940d23416f6&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=6083fe4ab15d816494e44059cfb55824) , the Altoona Mirror
On Tuesday, I attended the Bedford County Democratic Committee dinner at Whispering Hollow .
[](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=5cc1ea8c9ce2b21207cbc8b505167a6d7428c63be9e2a2b738274a97fd77d7b2&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5241&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=65fa92141513b90f73ce625a8f9b711e&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=6083fe4ab15d816494e44059cfb55824)It was a terrific gathering of those who care about our precious Democracy, Reproductive Freedom, our high cost of living, and so much more!
The food was delicious, the fellowship was heartwarming, and the dancing was lots of fun.
On Thursday, I spoke to members of the Carpenters and Joiners Local #423 union before their meeting.
I [](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=5cc1ea8c9ce2b21207cbc8b505167a6d7428c63be9e2a2b738274a97fd77d7b2&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5241&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=65fa92141513b90f73ce625a8f9b711e&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=6083fe4ab15d816494e44059cfb55824)truly appreciated the opportunity to introduce our congressional district to members as our own useless representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, hasn't answered invitations to come there, despite the fact he's supposed to represent these hardworking Americans and he lives minutes from the impressive training center.
I would be honored and privileged to represent Pennsylvania's 13th Congressional District and that includes the union members who manifest our First Amendment Rights every time they assemble peacefully for meetings.
We have the improved working conditions we do because of the sacrifices of union members across the generations and I will never forsake them. I would so much rather represent hardworking families rather than billionaires who take advantage of labor.
Please vote for me, Beth Farnham, to represent us next November.
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=2b492d857b6ef9e09262aeba1e2a0599edf801341f871f468e1b5923623a1478&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5241&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=55ca8c28950d02d1b9fb1db5e11330b6&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=6083fe4ab15d816494e44059cfb55824) and UNION STRENGTH!
Photo credit: Jack Stansbury
And on Saturday, PA-13 stood strong and said, "NO KINGS!"
Many thanks to all of the organizers for today's historic rallies - Adams County Democratic Committee, [Indivisible - Blair County](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=f7ad8ac67aebbe09324b408dd321ed4c9650819d44c813262ad40fd0394bc70a&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5241&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=ead380990b63fe5505f48e17b96243f1&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=6083fe4ab15d816494e44059cfb55824), [PA Franklin County Democratic Committee](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e3095cbd78b9dc2d7b02b2d5e1f09276bb5c1e7f40d9526088f7386f981bf585&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5241&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=e0da49c5deb13295e709989d4e59655b&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=6083fe4ab15d816494e44059cfb55824), Kierson Daily, [Mifflin County Democrats](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=ccb0e4c28076ebb150e3d95fc95254c7d2231615f19392ece1340564337f5fa1&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5241&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=d5eaf46222a175c8e3815cde2871d8a9&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=6083fe4ab15d816494e44059cfb55824), and [Juniata County Democratic Committee](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4c34ac9d4d206d4d1d7066404ae698669b19a8bba11d5e2f1bbccf10fc505c81&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5241&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=7e6e4bb3a8dcb91ab4dab0a829f1dd19&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=6083fe4ab15d816494e44059cfb55824).
I especially appreciated the opportunity to address the crowd in Gettysburg.
Many thanks also to everyone who attended events in Harrisburg, Washington DC, Pittsburgh, and everywhere else we say "NO!" to Trump's authoritarianism.
Honestly, we wouldn't have to do any of this if Republicans in Congress, like our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, would just uphold their oaths to the US Constitution and DO THEIR JOBS OF HOLDING TRUMP ACCOUNTABLE AND REPRESENTING THE AMERICAN PEOPLE.
Alas, Joyce and others have yielded their power to Trump.
But we can turn this around by voting for me, Beth Farnham, next year.
Together, w,e [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=d4f7c4c88a822d824fce663b124c99653fe8c1bc5332b7af10b32a382bfa7468&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5241&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=6b6dbeaedf1d21f72082c34210a7815f&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=6083fe4ab15d816494e44059cfb55824)
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
Sincerely,
Beth
