Charlie Kirk was a person whom Joyce isn't known to have ever mentioned until Kirk's violent murder. Was that because because Charlie Kirk advocated the release of the Epstein files? Who knows? But Joyce is certainly leveraging Kirk's death now for political gains. We don't need that multimillionaire hack who only pretends to align with the hearts of many PA-13 voters when it suits his political career. He doesn't actually care about any of us Everyday Americans and it shows. It shows in his awkward distance from voters. It shows in his slobbering sycophancy for Trump and his murderous administration. And it shows in his Congressional votes against the needs of his constituents - like his votes against The Infrastructure Bill, The American Rescue Plan, The Inflation Reduction Act, the Women's Health Protection Act, and the Respect for Marriage Act. But you can do something about John Joyce's failure to serve us. Please vote for me, Beth Farnham, next year to represent us because I am with The People of PA-13, advocating improvements of our lives and protecting our Precious Democracy, no matter what famous person has passed away. Together, we and real representation Photo credits: , the Altoona Mirror On Tuesday, I attended the Bedford County Democratic Committee dinner at Whispering Hollow . was a terrific gathering of those who care about our precious Democracy, Reproductive Freedom, our high cost of living, and so much more! The food was delicious, the fellowship was heartwarming, and the dancing was lots of fun. On Thursday, I spoke to members of the Carpenters and Joiners Local #423 union before their meeting. I appreciated the opportunity to introduce our congressional district to members as our own useless representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, hasn't answered invitations to come there, despite the fact he's supposed to represent these hardworking Americans and he lives minutes from the impressive training center. I would be honored and privileged to represent Pennsylvania's 13th Congressional District and that includes the union members who manifest our First Amendment Rights every time they assemble peacefully for meetings. We have the improved working conditions we do because of the sacrifices of union members across the generations and I will never forsake them. I would so much rather represent hardworking families rather than billionaires who take advantage of labor. Please vote for me, Beth Farnham, to represent us next November. Together, we and UNION STRENGTH! Photo credit: Jack Stansbury And on Saturday, PA-13 stood strong and said, "NO KINGS!" Many thanks to all of the organizers for today's historic rallies - Adams County Democratic Committee, , , Kierson Daily, , and . I especially appreciated the opportunity to address the crowd in Gettysburg. Many thanks also to everyone who attended events in Harrisburg, Washington DC, Pittsburgh, and everywhere else we say "NO!" to Trump's authoritarianism. Honestly, we wouldn't have to do any of this if Republicans in Congress, like our own US Representative, multimillionaire John Joyce, would just uphold their oaths to the US Constitution and DO THEIR JOBS OF HOLDING TRUMP ACCOUNTABLE AND REPRESENTING THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. Alas, Joyce and others have yielded their power to Trump. But we can turn this around by voting for me, Beth Farnham, next year. Together, w,e If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. Sincerely, Beth | | | | | Beth Farnham for Congress © 2025. or . | | | | Get the Jetpack app Subscribe, bookmark, and get real‐time notifications - all from one app! | | | | ---|--- | | | | Automattic, Inc. 60 29th St. #343, San Francisco, CA 94110 |

Peter, You may not have heard about Pennsylvania’s upcoming supreme court election. But the GOP certainly has. The state’s richest man, a billionaire businessman, along with loads of special interests, have been laser-focused on this off-year supreme court election – a special type of election called a “retention election” in which voters simply vote “yes” or “no” for each incumbent justice to be kept on the court. In this year’s election, three incumbent Democratic justices are up for retention, with no alternative Republican candidates on the ballot. Here’s why: The Pennsylvania Supreme Court has been a backstop for protecting Pennsylvanians’ voting rights for years — from extending the length of time voters could cast mail-in ballots, to striking down the egregiously gerrymandered maps passed by the GOP legislature. Republicans are playing the long game — hoping that by kicking out three Democratic justices, they’ll be able to push the swing state to be more conservative and even potentially pass another gerrymandered map without any check on their bad behavior. [**It’s up to us to stop them. That’s why we’re asking: In the final weeks of this election, will you help us reach voters in Pennsylvania and in battleground states across the country?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117593075/576999829/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_PAElectionUpdate_email_20251019-NDRC-Tier1-PAElectionUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251019-NDRC-Tier1-PAElectionUpdate_&utm_campaign=PAElectionUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMjJlYWYzLTM2YWQtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=exBoVdckswDTNTPLM2cJOtk4VgHt98ijLMLl_1ShqYA=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

We have our work cut out for us in Pennsylvania. And we’re up against billionaires and special interests who want to hand-pick their justices so they can force through their agenda. We simply can’t let that happen.
Justices Donohue, Dougherty, and Wecht are fair-minded and independent. These Democracy Defenders have fiercely protected the freedoms of all Pennsylvanians and stood for the rule of law. That’s why the NDRC is fighting just as hard for them.
[**Help us finish this election strong and compete against the billionaires and special interests trying to influence elections around the country. Donate to power our work in electing pro-democracy champions.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117593082/576999836/-80723829?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_PAElectionUpdate_email_20251019-NDRC-Tier1-PAElectionUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20251019-NDRC-Tier1-PAElectionUpdate_&utm_campaign=PAElectionUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmMjJlYWYzLTM2YWQtZjAxMS04ZTYxLTYwNDViZGVkOGJhNCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=exBoVdckswDTNTPLM2cJOtk4VgHt98ijLMLl_1ShqYA=)

Justices Donohue, Dougherty, and Wecht are fair-minded and independent. These Democracy Defenders have fiercely protected the freedoms of all Pennsylvanians and stood for the rule of law. That’s why the NDRC is fighting just as hard for them. = More soon, Marina Jenkins Executive Director, National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

name: Haley S.
subject: I'll always fight for Michigan families
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I'm humbly asking

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1122%2E49239%2E8msw3O)
null, I wanted to quickly follow up to make sure you got my note.
---
I'm still looking for another 105 grassroots Democrats to personally endorse my campaign to become Michigan's next senator, and**I noticed you haven't had a chance to add your name yet.**
**That's why I'm humbly asking one more time:[Will you personally endorse my campaign to keep Michigan blue, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's disastrous agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7162?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=1122%2E49239%2E8msw3O)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7162?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=1122%2E49239%2E8msw3O)
---
Thank you for your support. It means the world to have you by my side in this race.

Haley Stevens
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: What I'm hearing from folks like you
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7163?t=4&akid=1122%2E49239%2E8msw3O)
---
null,
On the campaign trail, I've been talking directly with Michiganders across the state – folks like you who are concerned for the future – and **here's what I've been hearing:**
🛟 People are worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

🩺 Folks in Michigan and across the country want improved and affordable access to health care.

💰 Working families need real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

⛓️💥 And many expressed deep concerns about the future of our fundamental freedoms, civil rights, and American democracy itself.
These aren’t just political talking points, null. They’re _real_ concerns from _real_ people. And they’re exactly why I’m running for Michigan's battleground Senate seat – **because I have a track record of getting things done.**
📌 I helped stabilize the auto industry and save over 200,000 Michigan jobs as chief of staff on President Obama's Auto Rescue Task Force.
📌 I played a leading role in passing the bill to grow our manufacturing economy by bringing America’s semiconductor industry back to where it belongs: Michigan.
📌 Most recently, I introduced the Stop Trump's Abuse of Power Act – a bill to ban the president from deploying active duty troops on U.S. soil without consent from state or local leaders.
That barely scratches the surface, and I know there's a _lot_ more work to do. So it's a good thing I grew up the Michigan way: surrounded by grease, grit, and hard work. And I'm in this race now so I can continue fighting for Michigan's working families in the U.S. Senate.
But with polling showing that I'm the Democrat with the very best shot at beating MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, the GOP is getting scared – **and they're gearing up to spend millions to flip this seat red.**
**So, null, I need****you on my grassroots team to help me****keep up my track record of fighting for hardworking Michigan families.****[Will you join me by endorsing my campaign today? My team set an ambitious goal to get 15,000 signatures by midnight, and right now, I’m still 33% short.](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7162?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=1122%2E49239%2E8msw3O)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7162?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1122%2E49239%2E8msw3O)
---
Thank you so much for your support,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** Null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7162?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=1122%2E49239%2E8msw3O) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/7163?t=8&akid=1122%2E49239%2E8msw3O)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: No kings has been our thing since 1776
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
Yesterday, I rallied with Arizonans in Phoenix to demand that Trump stop acting like a king and start acting like a leader. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117593336/577000651/1969321904?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251019_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzAzYjkxNi0zY2FkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3TnxohU2HPYnX_G9M3dZHn2uob36RD3ng1ZBbV4zyg=&emci=6f69d4ff-afaa-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=0703b916-3cad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=45157234) In the nearly nine months of his second administration, Donald Trump has used law enforcement agencies and the National Guard as his private army to cause terror in cities run by leaders who have dared to challenge his authoritarianism. He’s called peaceful protestors “terrorists.” He’s called judges who are upholding due process “insurrectionists.” He’s attacked the free press on multiple occasions. **Nine months have felt like nine years. These are the actions of a wannabe king and dictator, not the President of the United States.** My family fled an authoritarian regime in Iran–I’ve heard about the signs all my life. **[Here in America, we don’t do kings. Sign on to stand with me and demand that Donald Trump stops acting like a king, and legislates like a democratically elected leader:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117593337/577000652/1969321904?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251019_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzAzYjkxNi0zY2FkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3TnxohU2HPYnX_G9M3dZHn2uob36RD3ng1ZBbV4zyg=&emci=6f69d4ff-afaa-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=0703b916-3cad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=45157234)** | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/117593338/577000653/1969321904?refcode=AU_YA_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20251019_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNzAzYjkxNi0zY2FkLWYwMTEtOGU2MS02MDQ1YmRlZDhiYTQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A3TnxohU2HPYnX_G9M3dZHn2uob36RD3ng1ZBbV4zyg=&emci=6f69d4ff-afaa-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&emdi=0703b916-3cad-f011-8e61-6045bded8ba4&ceid=45157234)

**AND NOW:** Trump is DEMANDING access to state voter data across the nation, which could include personal information and Social Security numbers!

**We MUST answer the Obamas' challenge:****We ALL must fight for voting rights or risk losing our democracy.** We're launching an urgent EMERGENCY petition to defend the right to vote, and we need your signature ASAP, **so please, don't delay:**

# [The Great American Grift: Trump's Luxury Lemon for the Commoner](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=176368250&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2MzY4MjUwLCJpYXQiOjE3NjA5MTQ3ODEsImV4cCI6MTc2MzUwNjc4MSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.YZo2UJLQhoz_XvpK2-eJHNTT6o0sk9q7N4sPZbSLAI0)
### The con man who promised you he'd make everything cheaper instead is destroying your personal finances because that's just what he does...
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster) and [Cliff Schecter](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)
---
| Oct 19
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)| | [](https://substack.com/@cliffsedge)

| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=176368250&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTc2MzY4MjUwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2MDkxNDc4MSwiZXhwIjoxNzYzNTA2NzgxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.meyTyc65v4aCENdKHopzGFPxGvHXIw1bgo9UaXnBPPg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

_**🔥[We Fight Fascists & Brave Threats Every Day. As Reader-Supported Media, We Rely On Paid Subscriptions. For Just $1.50/Week, Your Support Can Keep Us Fighting](https://substack.com/redirect/3472b763-afb7-4591-8d0c-b6fd7a74fca0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)🤜**_
[Keep Us Fighting For Democracy!](https://substack.com/redirect/3472b763-afb7-4591-8d0c-b6fd7a74fca0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3472b763-afb7-4591-8d0c-b6fd7a74fca0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Once upon a time an honest American could buy a modest car without mortgaging his or her soul.
That time has long-since passed, driven off a cliff by the blundering baby hands of Donald J. Trump, carnival barker turned President.
A greasy used car-salesman. And one who somehow convinced millions a gold-plated con man from Queens gave a damn about their grocery bills or gas tanks.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e96dfaaf-2aab-42ae-8c71-bf92852349bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump came to office in his 2nd term on a flaming chariot of bluster and bullshit.
[He promised economic and financial salvation to the commoner](https://substack.com/redirect/0b147d4f-f51e-4232-a943-40136a203c9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg); the auto worker, the truck driver, the small business owner still paying off a 2015 Chevy with balding tires and a cracked windshield.
Inflation, Trump said, would be slashed, crushed, obliterated under the boot of Trump's magnificent genius. We know where this promise ended up, right?
In the same place as any RFK Jr. health announcement. In other words, Trump's magical cure turned out to be snake oil.
According to the Kelley Blue Book, the average new car transaction price in the United States in September _topped $50,000 for the first time ever_.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c3eb0fd2-a044-4f44-bd3c-f1194e7e4473?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
That's [4 percent more expensive than the average new car transaction exactly a year ago under President Joe Biden](https://substack.com/redirect/e96dfaaf-2aab-42ae-8c71-bf92852349bc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). A sum that, for most Americans, might as well be a ticket to Mars
(Not with Elon though, because they don't want to get blown up).
Want a pickup truck? That will average of $66,000. An SUV? Cough up $76,000 and sell a kidney while you're at it.
These are not exotic imports. These are Fords and Chevys -- the machines that once defined American muscle and mobility, the very foundation of America's economic prowess.
They're now priced as if they come with a private chef and diplomatic immunity.
What sorcery has produced such absurd figures? None.
* * *
[Keep Us Fighting For Democracy!](https://substack.com/redirect/bda33491-5f11-43da-90cc-4d650eb9351d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
Just the familiar mix of incompetence, greed, and economic sadism that characterizes every Trump endeavor. Tariffs--that proud, blunt instrument of the economically illiterate--have jacked up the costs of steel, aluminum, copper, and parts.
Trump imposed tariffs that benefitted from the same intellectual rigor he applies to windmills and bleach injections, so now working-class Americans are paying the price.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0b147d4f-f51e-4232-a943-40136a203c9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But tariffs are just the warm-up act. [The real horror is systemic.](https://substack.com/redirect/0cec8412-cb82-47c7-97e5-41e7308b8269?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Under Trump's "leadership"--a word that will always require quotation marks when applied to a man who couldn't lead a parade of farm animals--the affordable car has become a relic.
The $20,000 sedan is extinct. Dead. Buried.
Rolled into t[he same shallow grave as common sense](https://substack.com/redirect/807bf8ac-67a0-4bca-b8f0-6a484257b59a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), international allies, and affordable health care.
Car makers, like all predators, have adapted. They've abandoned middle-and-lower-class Americans. The very saps who bought the MAGA hats and showed up at his never-ending rallies.
Now, [ the automakers cater almost exclusively to the wealthy](https://substack.com/redirect/c3eb0fd2-a044-4f44-bd3c-f1194e7e4473?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The well-heeled. The country club caste that always wins in a rigged casino economy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c3eb0fd2-a044-4f44-bd3c-f1194e7e4473?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And that's what we we have now under Trump. Nothing more than a con game.
We are, as the analysts put it, living in a "K-shaped" recovery. It's a term so sterile and abstract [it could've been coined by your average lying lunatic at the right-wing Heritage foundation](https://substack.com/redirect/0b147d4f-f51e-4232-a943-40136a203c9c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
But in plain English, it means this: The rich get richer and the poor don't even get a car to sleep in.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8dead344-d764-42ea-b017-479daefd2046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.r5tQqsAaRSLZ0a-vpsd1C9mcllBj_eEt60mMVSQYV14?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=176368250)
This is the great irony of the Trump era.
The man who built his brand on the illusion of luxury--golden toilets, gaudy, eye-sore towers, steaks tougher than his tax returns--has as President, extended this illusion to tens of millions of gullible Americans.
That same illusion now animates a nation where the [basic building blocks of middle-class life have now become luxuries themselves](https://substack.com/redirect/8dead344-d764-42ea-b017-479daefd2046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
The automobile, once a symbol of freedom, self-reliance, and dignity, has become a badge of class division.
It's no longer an emblem of the open road, but of all the American opportunities Trump has repossessed.
It's a luxury item reserved for hedge funders, ass-kissers and crypto grifters, including inbred Trump family members.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3472b763-afb7-4591-8d0c-b6fd7a74fca0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So here we are, in the broken showroom in Trump's America. The economy is a gleaming Cadillac Escalade for the rich, and a busted bicycle is reserved for everyone else.
The man who[ promised to fight for the "forgotten men and women" of America has, predictably, forgotten them](https://substack.com/redirect/8dead344-d764-42ea-b017-479daefd2046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Though, in his defense, if the Secret Service weren't there he'd probably forget to put on pants most days.
But!..When he needs a crowd to cheer his latest demented tantrum or distract from the Epstein files, his memory magically returns.
Of course, many of the poor souls who attempt to attend a Trump MAGA rally (or drive anywhere else) must worry about their old clunker catching fire while driving on the freeway.
Because they were sold a bill of goods by the rear-ended Ford Pinto of political con artists Ladies and gentlemen, start your engines...if you can afford one.
The rest of you can walk.

name: True The Vote
subject: Across the Nation, Light Is Breaking Through
body:
Pray. Serve. Vote.
| | | October 19, 2025 |
---
|
### Open Records, Honest Elections
Across America, the work of election transparency is underway. True the Vote has now submitted 250 public records requests — one to every state and to the 200 largest counties — seeking a single answer:

_**“Please describe any actions you have taken, or intend to take, to ensure compliance with President Trump’s Executive Order 14248: Preserving and Protecting the Integrity of American Elections.”**_

The responses have been telling. Some states are cooperating. Others are resisting. Still others behave as if citizens have no right to ask — or don’t have any knowledge of the EO. Wild. Btw,[ ](https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/k0uzok29gmh6h56mgzwclhokxz577h8hx68kr/x0hph6hee6lle6a5/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2hpdGVob3VzZS5nb3YvZmFjdC1zaGVldHMvMjAyNS8wMy9mYWN0LXNoZWV0LXByZXNpZGVudC1kb25hbGQtai10cnVtcC1wcm90ZWN0cy10aGUtaW50ZWdyaXR5LW9mLWFtZXJpY2FuLWVsZWN0aW9ucy8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFjcm9zcy10aGUtbmF0aW9uLWxpZ2h0LWlzLWJyZWFraW5nLXRocm91Z2gmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1uZXdzbGV0dGVyJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9bmV3c2xldHRlci50cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmc=)[if you want to read EO 14248, you can see it here](https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/k0uzok29gmh6h56mgzwclhokxz577h8hx68kr/x0hph6hee6lle6a5/aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cud2hpdGVob3VzZS5nb3YvZmFjdC1zaGVldHMvMjAyNS8wMy9mYWN0LXNoZWV0LXByZXNpZGVudC1kb25hbGQtai10cnVtcC1wcm90ZWN0cy10aGUtaW50ZWdyaXR5LW9mLWFtZXJpY2FuLWVsZWN0aW9ucy8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFjcm9zcy10aGUtbmF0aW9uLWxpZ2h0LWlzLWJyZWFraW5nLXRocm91Z2gmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1uZXdzbGV0dGVyJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9bmV3c2xldHRlci50cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmc=).

And, you can follow the latest updates and read all the state and county responses as they arrive on our [Open Records: Honest Elections page](https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/k0uzok29gmh6h56mgzwclhokxz577h8hx68kr/e0hph7h77g2278h8/aHR0cHM6Ly90cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmcvb3Blbi1yZWNvcmRzLWhvbmVzdC1lbGVjdGlvbnM_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWFjcm9zcy10aGUtbmF0aW9uLWxpZ2h0LWlzLWJyZWFraW5nLXRocm91Z2gmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1uZXdzbGV0dGVyJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9bmV3c2xldHRlci50cnVldGhldm90ZS5vcmc=)on the True the Vote website.
### SCOTUS and the Voting Rights Act’s Defining Moment
This week, the Supreme Court heard arguments in Robinson v. Landry, a pivotal Louisiana redistricting case that could reshape how Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act is applied nationwide. At the heart of the case is a fundamental question: should states be compelled to draw districts based primarily on race. Activists on the Left argue that the Voting Rights Act requires race-conscious districts to ensure minority representation. Meanwhile, those on the Right contend that such mandates violate the Constitution, warning that “separate but equal” solutions cannot deliver genuine equality. The outcome won’t just affect Louisiana; hundreds of similar lawsuits are pending across the country, and all will be impacted by the Supreme Court’s ruling. For ongoing legal updates and background, you can consult [the](https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/k0uzok29gmh6h56mgzwclhokxz577h8hx68kr/owhkhqhwwv77w0tv/aHR0cHM6Ly90aGVhcnAub3JnLz91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWNyb3NzLXRoZS1uYXRpb24tbGlnaHQtaXMtYnJlYWtpbmctdGhyb3VnaCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1uZXdzbGV0dGVyLnRydWV0aGV2b3RlLm9yZw==)[ American Redistricting Project’s dedicated site](https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/k0uzok29gmh6h56mgzwclhokxz577h8hx68kr/owhkhqhwwv77w0tv/aHR0cHM6Ly90aGVhcnAub3JnLz91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249YWNyb3NzLXRoZS1uYXRpb24tbGlnaHQtaXMtYnJlYWtpbmctdGhyb3VnaCZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPW5ld3NsZXR0ZXImdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1uZXdzbGV0dGVyLnRydWV0aGV2b3RlLm9yZw==)**.** In case you’re wondering, it’s our position that every eligible citizen, regardless of race or region, deserves equal treatment under the law. Disproportionate impact is real, and can be difficult to address, but grouping people by ethnicity is absolutely not the solution. This case will set a national precedent for how representation and equality are defined. We will keep watching closely.
### Tina Peters: A Call for Justice
Many of us have followed the story of Tina Peters, the former Mesa County Clerk from Colorado who raised serious concerns about election security and paid a steep personal price for doing so. Tina has been in prison since October 2024. There’s been a positive update in her case!

Earlier this year, a grassroots Amicus Brief, led by citizen advocate Terpsehore Maras and signed by over 3,000 Americans from all 50 states, was filed in federal court supporting Tina’s petition for habeas corpus — a request to be released from prison while her appeal is heard. [You can read and download the Amicus here.](https://click.convertkit-mail2.)

That filing, made in February 2025, is now being actively considered by the court after the State of Colorado formally objected to its admission. The brief argues that Tina was denied bail not because she posed any risk of flight or violence, but because of her speech — a punishment the Amici say violates her constitutional rights under the First, Eighth, Ninth, and Fourteenth Amendments.

Now the court must decide whether an American can be imprisoned for her words while awaiting justice.

As this case unfolds, please keep Tina in prayer — a prayer for freedom, for truth to prevail, and for courage for every citizen who stands for integrity.
### Help Wanted: Dallas County, TX Hand-Count Ballot Team
We’ve been notified that Dallas County, Texas, urgently needs more volunteers for its hand-count ballot team. To qualify, you need to live in Dallas County, be registered to vote, and can count ballots for four hours on March 3, 2026.

Training is provided by the GOP, but all qualified voters are welcome, so it is a nonpartisan endeavor. This is your chance to make a real difference where it matters most: inside the process.

If you live in or near Dallas County, please consider signing up today. [Contact Dallas County GOP by clicking here.](https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/k0uzok29gmh6h56mgzwclhokxz577h8hx68kr/x0hph6hee6ll98h5/aHR0cDovL2RhbGxhc2dvcC5vcmcvaGFuZGNvdW50Lw==) _And if you hear of similar local needs for election workers in your own area, let us know at_[ _info@truethevote.org_](https://click.convertkit-mail2.com/k0uzok29gmh6h56mgzwclhokxz577h8hx68kr/6qheh8hllgddnkuo/bWFpbHRvOmluZm9AdHJ1ZXRoZXZvdGUub3Jn) _We’ll help spread the word nationwide!_
### Closing Thoughts
There’s a lot happening — across many fronts, in ways both seen and unseen — to strengthen and protect election integrity. From courtroom battles to county audits, from volunteers in polling places to citizens digging into public records, the movement for transparency is alive and growing. Please stay engaged. In the weeks ahead, we’ll be announcing new ways for you to get involved and serve, right where you are. Every action matters. Every truth told moves us closer to the country we’re meant to be. Keep the faith. Hold the line. Never quit. Ephesians 6 FTW! Ever Onward- |

name: Amy Klobuchar
subject: Holding New Hampshire is key to flipping the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I wanted to reach out to explain why I’m supporting Congressman Chris Pappas for Senate in New Hampshire
_Hi, this is Senator Amy Klobuchar -- I wanted to reach out to explain why I’m supporting Congressman Chris Pappas for Senate in New Hampshire:_
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251019_2_klobuchar.dFN_gu&refcode=em20251019-2&t=1&akid=2947%2E582294%2E765ZHn)
_Chris and me in Keene, New Hampshire_
Recently, Chris and I met with small business owners and heard about the challenges posed by tariffs on their small, family-owned businesses. The chaos and confusion have made it impossible for them to make investment decisions and plan for the future.
**I'm supporting Chris for Senate because he will stand strong and fight for sane trade policies.** With Donald Trump imposing reckless tariffs, Chris’s small business background couldn't be more important right now.
[**It’s time to put American businesses and families first. If you’re with us, will you make a quick $5 donation to support Congressman Chris Pappas’s campaign?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251019_2_klobuchar.dFN_gu&refcode=em20251019-2&t=2&akid=2947%2E582294%2E765ZHn)
Holding New Hampshire is key to flipping the Senate in 2026 -- let’s elect Chris and keep rubber-stamp republicans out of Congress.
[**Will you help us flip the Senate with a $5 contribution to Congressman Chris Pappas’s campaign today?**](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251019_2_klobuchar.dFN_gu&refcode=em20251019-2&t=3&akid=2947%2E582294%2E765ZHn)
Thank you for being a part of our grassroots team.
\-- Amy
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20251019-2&t=4&refcode2=2947_582294_765ZHn&akid=2947%2E582294%2E765ZHn)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=5&akid=2947%2E582294%2E765ZHn)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=6&akid=2947%2E582294%2E765ZHn)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=2947%2E582294%2E765ZHn)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Senator Mike Lee
subject: Before midnight: my fight for free speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I just recorded a short message I need you to see. |
Fellow American -

I just recorded something important.

Because enough is enough.

When Americans are afraid to speak their minds... we lose what makes this country America.

The radical Left doesn't want debate - they want silence. They want control. And I can't stay quiet while they try to erase our First Amendment rights.

**Please - take 60 seconds to watch my message. Mike Lee

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 10/19/2025
body:
Jeffco board member’s remark sparks outrage after school shooting
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/sarcf8d5375)
---
**October 19, 2025** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Readers,
This week at **Rocky Mountain Voice** , we launched a new 12-part investigation—**The Douglas County Dirty Dozen** —spotlighting one of Colorado’s most ideologically divided school districts.
**So far, we’ve uncovered:**
* **Day 1:** How [explicit sexual content remains on school shelves](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s5gfe4b4ebb) under the guise of inclusion laws.
* **Day 2:** Where out-of-touch board members [refused to guarantee that school resource officers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s8r260439da) will remain in every school.
* **Day 3:** How the “Healthy Kids Colorado Survey” questioned students [as young as 12 on sensitive topics](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/scte8ddc449) like sex, gender, and firearms—without full parental consent.

**And we're just getting started.** [You can catch up here: [Instagram](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/scj5a2ee833) | [Facebook](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s7n905cd0e1) | [X (Twitter)](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/seo48693f6e) | [TikTok](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s5n8468cfd0)]
The same tensions are playing out in districts far beyond Douglas County. These stories aren’t about partisanship—they’re about transparency, accountability, and protecting kids.
In **Jefferson County** , parents were outraged when board member Erin Kenworthy [told grieving families that “safety is a privilege.”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s7md42d8037) Her comment came just weeks after the Evergreen High School shooting, leaving many feeling dismissed and furious.
Meanwhile, in **Cherry Creek** , two [former board presidents are urging a “course correction,”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s7l17a84629) warning that years of ideological priorities have undermined academic excellence and parent trust. And on the **Western Slope** , local and state teacher unions are [dumping tens of thousands of dollars into school board races](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s7ib53ae04a) to tilt control away from local families.
But there’s another story—one of leadership done right. In **Mesa County Valley District 51** , [Kent Zook credits reform-minded board members](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s3o66af8430) for driving academic gains, strengthening security and maintenance, and raising teacher pay to invest directly in students. Their success shows that when communities push back against outside influence, schools—and kids—thrive.
**This November, don’t sit out.** Your local school board election decides who protects parental rights, ensures safety, and keeps classrooms focused on learning— not ideology. It starts in your neighborhood, with your vote.
Stay bold, stay grounded, and stay in the fight.
– Team RMV
---
| | |
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[Two doors and an insurance policy: Inside the legal backstops in Tina Peters’ October 16 hearing](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/scme9d47f51)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/sbu1b4c2cd5) After more than four years of courtroom battles and appeals, former Mesa County Clerk Tina Peters’ fight now hinges on a single federal question: whether Colorado courts violated her constitutional rights by denying her bond pending appeal. The Oct. 16 motions hearing was part of a broader federal proceeding stemming from Peters’ Application for a Writ of Habeas Corpus filed in February.
**[The County That Said No](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/sbte1c25de7)** BY SEAN POND, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s9v82e0cdf9) _There are moments in history when ordinary people must decide if they will remain silent or rise up. If they will be ruled or govern themselves. If they will allow outsiders to rewrite their way of life, or if they will draw a line and say, “This far, and no further.” Montrose County just drew that line._
**[Why is Denver trying to buy Western Slope school boards?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s5t1c415b3a)** BY CHRISTY ANDERSON, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s3sa00fc910) _In the Grand Junction area you may have seen flyers in your mailbox accusing our current school board members, Andrea Haitz, Angela Lema and “Willie” (Will) Jones of being “enemies” who “cannot be trusted.” These false attack ads come from Denver’s “Students Deserve Better” campaign. After digging into the financials, Students Deserve Better is also majorly funded by none other than the Colorado Education Association._
|
---
**STATE**
**[Colorado Officials Admit “Unacceptable” Error That Freed Parolee Before Deadly Chase](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s5lc39a8ee0)** [CBS COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s5m2aabedde) The Colorado Department of Corrections says a mistake made by their department allowed a man who violated parole to walk free. That ultimately is what led to Tuesday’s chase involving law enforcement and head-on crash which resulted in the death of an innocent person.
**[Parental Rights Debate Deepens After Supreme Court Rejects Colorado Case](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s1u3edd2c27)** [CBS NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/sdhf109478d) The Supreme Court on Monday rejected a bid to revive a lawsuit brought by two Colorado families who alleged their parental rights were violated when their children attended school-sponsored club meetings that included discussions of gender identity and sexuality and were allegedly discouraged from telling their parents about it.
**[Voters face a $56 million question: Should “free lunch for all” come from your refund?](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/saqe9483341)** [INDEPENDENCE INSTITUTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s6t973e9946) Coloradans only have two ballot measures to consider this year in the 2025 election, and both pertain to the state’s Healthy School Meals for All (HSMA) program. The first, Proposition LL, would allow the state to retain and spend excess revenue collected in FY2023-24 and all future years to continue funding HSMA.
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/sfn6dad8800)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Young Americans are dropping trans and queer labels, study finds sharp cultural shift](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s7sff652978)** [THE WESTERN JOURNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s6mbb97da57) Critics of transgenderism have often described the trend as a “social contagion.” A blistering new report from the Centre for Heterodox Social Science just gave that label newfound heft.
**[‘Nothing off the table’: U.S. targets citizenship fraud in major enforcement push](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s2m61405006)** [JUST THE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s1q0f21b698) After a joint operation by U.S. Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) found “mass patterns” of marriage and other immigration fraud in Minneapolis, the agency’s director says denaturalization and prosecutions are on the table.
**[Report: Jan. 6 Committee’s Massive Data Sweep Targeted Conservatives and Trump Allies](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/sck0637e1bd)** [JUST THE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/sdi63249b19) Congressional investigators collected a stunning 30 million lines of phone data mapping contacts between conservatives and the Trump White House in the name of investigating the Jan. 6 Capitol breach, a massive dragnet that raises civil liberty concerns about the lack of limits on the ability of lawmakers to snoop on Americans’ private phone calls.
**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s6re8876f16)**
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Colorado Town Begins Recovery as Pagosa Springs Reopens After Major Flooding](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/scle9c0628a)** [CBS NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/scj5c0a7cd7) Evacuations have been lifted and U.S. Highway 160 has reopened in Pagosa Springs after what officials in southern Colorado described as “extreme flooding conditions.” Mandatory evacuations were ordered late Saturday night after the San Juan River more than doubled its average flow.

**[Progressive Activists Target Northern Colorado Elections in Local Power Push](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/scj8f8bda4f)** [COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/sekc2012c59) One of the state’s most extreme left-wing political organizations is back on the campaign trail, endorsing candidates for public office in various local races during this off-year election, including a significant focus on northern Colorado.
**[At Mesa County rally, Anthony Watson challenges crowd to trade outrage for obedience](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s9g7be0e9f8)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s2j76000797) No bulls, no broncs—the arena lights belonged to a different crowd. Sun broke in strips across a clouded sky after a full day of rain. Over 500 filled the grandstands for a different kind of roundup with local pastors, community leaders and a two-time Olympian. Bookcliff led off with the Star-Spangled Banner and closed beneath candlelight with God Bless America.
**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s2l4df1e583)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[Vote smart, Colorado: Your TABOR refund and your schools depend on it](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/sbr1007d5c2)** [CHRISTIAN HOME EDUCATORS OF COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/sar4dc3a83f) _Our country is unique in that the government receives its powers “from the consent of the governed.” That’s us. We are the governed and our consent and direction is required at the ballot box on November 4th._
**[A small river with big influence: How the La Plata shaped western water law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s5ha8acfb2d)** BY STEVE HARRIS,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/scs36e4b209) _The La Plata River Compact is also over 100 years old. It was negotiated between Delph Carpenter from Colorado and Stephen Davis from New Mexico during 1922 and finalized at Bishop’s Lodge in Santa Fe, New Mexico._

**[It’s YOUR Money – Not The Government’s](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s3rf7c77a1a)** BY RUSS MINARY,[ ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/semb43f4648) _Ronald Reagan was a Democrat with conservative values, unlike many in his party. So he switched parties and became a Republican, serving two terms as California governor (1967–1975). He went on to national office, serving two terms as president (1981–1989)._

**[Colorado’s “Budget Crisis” Rings Hollow Amid EV Giveaway Surge](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s0kd022f50e)** [COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s4gd479dc4e) _Colorado’s governor just made this statement “The market has made it clear, EVs (electric vehicles) are here to stay.” I agree with him. Electric cars, unlike 8-track tapes and rotary-dial phones, will continue to be available to consumers for a long, long time. Cool. But why he made the statement puzzles me._

_**[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s5m481a3ef6)**_

|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
📖**DID YOU KNOW?** **The world’s first novel might not have an ending.** Written in the 11th century by Murasaki Shikibu, The Tale of Genji is considered the world’s first novel. After 54 chapters, it ends so abruptly that scholars still debate whether it’s complete—some believe Shikibu finished it as intended, while others think the final pages were lost to history.
|
---

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.-A/s8rd5fe5979)
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “The liberty enjoyed by the people of these states of worshiping Almighty God agreeable to their consciences, it not only among the choicest of their blessings, but also of their rights.” – George Washington
|

name: The Spanberger Campaign
subject: We're down to the wire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor

The nation is looking to Abigail Spanberger to win big and deal a blow to Trump's extreme MAGA movement.
